clean_body: | | | | Get your Ride for the Brand Merch here! Friend, We launched our first video of the campaign and it’s getting attention all over Wyoming! Take a quick look in case you missed it: We know Harriet will Ride for the Brand and stand up for Wyoming, unlike Liz Cheney who has sold out to DC special interests and Nancy Pelosi. We’re emailing you today to see if you’re ready to Ride for the Brand, stand with Harriet, and ensure Wyoming is protected from the Radial Left. We are going to win this election because we have America First Wyomingites like you on our team. Get your merch today and show everyone that you Ride for the Brand. Together, we will Defeat Liz Cheney! Thank you, Team Hageman | | | |

---
| | |
####
# #TogetherWeCan
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|

| Jay has been busy on the campaign trail across the district promoting his common sense platform and gaining support with every step.
We need to invest in our economy, in our rural areas, teachers and our environment. That looks like a lot of different things for a lot of people which is why Jay is getting out there and showing up to answer the tough questions.

---
|
---
|
### **We need your support!**
Here's how you can support Jay Carey:
* Share your support on social media
* [Buy a T-shirt](https://jaycareyforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12fcf73a455ed3a3ff101405d&id=f5c89de07c&e=9cbf9f5985)

* [Make a monetary donation!](https://jaycareyforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12fcf73a455ed3a3ff101405d&id=821d82aabf&e=9cbf9f5985) $10, $15, $25 all adds up and supports Jay's travels

name: Morgan Harper HQ
subject: Reproductive rights in Ohio are under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Republicans are hard at work to fully eliminate abortion access in Ohio. We can’t let them.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211208-445-footer-ak&t=2&akid=445%2E90090%2EPgYhlU)
**Abortion access in Ohio is under full-blown attack right now. The future of abortion access is quite literally on the line _right now_. **
Ohio Republicans just passed SB157 — a draconian bill that creates extreme felony charges around abortions — in the Ohio House today.
SB157 requires doctors to perform life-saving care on fetuses that survive failed abortions and would close Southeast Ohio’s last abortion clinics. The proposed law would also require health care providers to report these incidents to the Ohio Department of health or face _third-degree felony charges._
Furthermore, SB157 forces clinics in Cincinnati and Dayton to find new doctors to work with because the bill bans physicians who teach medical students or those affiliated with public hospitals from contracting with abortion clinics.
[**_Click here to watch Morgan’s statement on this attack on reproductive rights and abortion clinics in the state of Ohio. You can also split a donation between our campaign and Planned Parenthood Advocates of Ohio._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17560?t=3&akid=445%2E90090%2EPgYhlU)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17566?refcode=em20211208-445&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=445%2E90090%2EPgYhlU)**
[__Morgan’s Facebook Video on SB157. Click here to see the full video.__](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17560?t=23&akid=445%2E90090%2EPgYhlU)
Let us be very clear:**Abortion is health care, and health care is a human right. Full stop.**
And when we take this campaign to the United States Senate, you’ll never have to question where Morgan stands on this issue — ever. **Morgan is the only candidate in this race who has always stood for abortion and reproductive rights.**
As a Senator, Morgan will fight to unrig Trump and McConnell’s stolen Supreme Court by expanding the Court — and will always protect abortion access for Ohioans.
[**_Please join us in taking a stand for abortion access by splitting a donation with Planned Parenthood Advocates of Ohio today. Anything you can donate helps protect abortion access in Ohio_**** _right now_****.**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17560?t=24&akid=445%2E90090%2EPgYhlU)
In solidarity,
Morgan Harper HQ
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17560?t=25&akid=445%2E90090%2EPgYhlU)
Morgan for U.S. Senate in Ohio
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211208-445-footer&t=26&refcode2=445_90090_PgYhlU&akid=445%2E90090%2EPgYhlU)**
---

Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

name: Mark Meuser
subject: Free Pizza
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Meuser for U
body:
The mother of a 13-year-old student at Barack Obama Global Prep Academy says that her son came home from school with a brand new vaccine card |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6b6e2e27f06146babbe6fc65fd123562&_e=pp1XNB6cnSba7lL3Ts8071O8fgEK5vrA7rResLloYVGUzIx4Rx4jYe_A1aK2crGx_AtFTo-3nWySGxbBAczOBl9n8EvMsieCKWY_dDcoLowtg_V-3b-ddLNDObVSN2Ni4Ay-Nw5ydT_ZqERsh0sojgHLCJb_OBhQvxF7v-BdqqxHl6QWV3RBLdQKCONmjHu_kA7mu9B8zMZXK4LtC_fyINgyG18WypwbFqn8PBs4KJiUe2_nyX4oEiwwXuN2lFNWE-u5Bt2lCjV6VSnk2mL775pBJ2ywzUx0L4i71TlNqPwf8E6_ULeoHHnFhOChrxL1QHa9wigKUkHPOVgP0a5gBg%3D%3D)

---
Peter-

Free pizza has gone from being a Student Body President's campaign promise to a lure used by the Los Angeles Unified School District to get students vaccinated without their parents' permission.

[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6b6e2e27f06146babbe6fc65fd123562&_e=pp1XNB6cnSba7lL3Ts8071O8fgEK5vrA7rResLloYVGUzIx4Rx4jYe_A1aK2crGx_AtFTo-3nWySGxbBAczOBl9n8EvMsieCKWY_dDcoLowtg_V-3b-ddLNDObVSN2Nito4jFgwSie-70AdzSxQHuwUk5KKMBJdIDQ8OL0khz0-ahIjhTwFEumMmvTON7I9WVhD7yCTrugFXGJTVqhsA3CvKRVCe_ECePBr2DGmyR9sfqmCNm5BpcnbIAS70KkW6iPpfJKA4N2w6viLtMKRemWK6Vu6w9SvUdlaO9c2x4eCEBOKecvWPKubTJZBfPJVrI88JxHDSMxj5Ih8KX84g_g%3D%3D)
The mother of a 13-year-old student at Barack Obama Global Prep Academy says that her son came home from school with a brand-new vaccine card. **The _minor child_ said he agreed to get the vaccine when a school employee offered him free pizza if he let her vaccinate him.**

_**The school employee then told the student not to tell his mom, or they would both get in trouble.******_

In California, a 13-year-old cannot consent to a medical procedure; the parent must authorize the treatment. **In this case, not only did the parent not consent, she was adamant that her son not get the vaccine because of his asthma and his allergy issues.**

School employees are preying on students' vulnerabilities and silencing them with snacks. They have entirely undermined the rights of parents.

**This has become more than just a mandate; this is the government forcing its way into your life.**

As I travel around the state of California, I see so many Californians fighting to restore their parental rights. It is becoming evident that 2022 will be the year of the Parent Party.

[** SUPPORT MARK TODAY**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6b6e2e27f06146babbe6fc65fd123562&_e=pp1XNB6cnSba7lL3Ts8071O8fgEK5vrA7rResLloYVGUzIx4Rx4jYe_A1aK2crGx_AtFTo-3nWySGxbBAczOBl9n8EvMsieCKWY_dDcoLowtg_V-3b-ddLNDObVSN2NibtSZU5Ckb0FDVpO66hdrsIcRgvNS11ZiVwQBjICIDejhXMA6ViE1LzFsVCOoz3OrP6Yu5vW8t4WsO_Pffc0PbSYdeuEsVbff1SqB2gtsEQhBqi3h3TJHTyHJzwiPtE-WbFP1KO6JMTzkxPRngQmA6D9NZcvsyeRYHVsIwYGne2eRyxg7gm44WV_u-OyJxFSPcsZLYLvQZAj4ShlgkFu6Zg%3D%3D)
Parents are fed up with politicians putting special interests ahead of their children. They are done with politicians playing politics with their children's education. They are over their children being pawns in the Left's political agenda.

2022 will be the year that Parents step up and hold their elected officials accountable for ensuring that their children receive a proper education and are protected from the political whims of the Left.

**I believe that parents are the only people that should make health and education decisions for their children, and I will take that belief to Washington D.C. with me.**

[**I have been fighting to protect your rights every day of my career. That won't stop when I'm elected to the Senate. Can you make a contribution to my campaign to help me defeat Senator Alex Padilla?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6b6e2e27f06146babbe6fc65fd123562&_e=pp1XNB6cnSba7lL3Ts8071O8fgEK5vrA7rResLloYVGUzIx4Rx4jYe_A1aK2crGx_AtFTo-3nWySGxbBAczOBl9n8EvMsieCKWY_dDcoLowtg_V-3b-ddLNDObVSN2NiPSB9PKo6E90nxnV0VQn1qKhBiy9bfX_M8UwEWdRZyQfkrBcKZkT4ICz4gsaDbEPJG4z75TSX9uo6vMDxPb2SvAV_ZZpp_RaunuMLRNxHrPWglDKHQiR8WSi3VHH5-qAkJCnWqgufwXNzF7umaPSstZxpHoA6AsQZfDzs6PHVhZFduyGKSa1oFjae49twOXplYKAmc8XiAXD4UmqtC4x5Ww%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Mark Meuser
Republican for U.S. Senate, California

[**P.S. As you know, my team has set a very ambitious goal to find 500 patriots who will make a contribution to this campaign of at least $100 by the end of this year. We are off to a great start but we still have a long ways to go to reach 500 contributors. Can I count on your support to make a contribution today and help me reach the goal of 500 contributors this month?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6b6e2e27f06146babbe6fc65fd123562&_e=pp1XNB6cnSba7lL3Ts8071O8fgEK5vrA7rResLloYVGUzIx4Rx4jYe_A1aK2crGx_AtFTo-3nWySGxbBAczOBl9n8EvMsieCKWY_dDcoLowtg_V-3b-ddLNDObVSN2NiGyYdEP5tXjTDm_hODpM2H96vDkAw89-i4yh2ba3xGxuQcydztNRsEvt4r90B3PqkrqpetHs9H2NoncGMYWi5scg3pt3bIYbwzZkA8PcQNjrYY-KzwD6nyU597HRcwciucpUzV6OrEm3PKElpGvomi101thmMKmImcGY9JrvcMxkmBNUeth_iK8aqb7YJOzuHEj6P8Q2fv5HTmKhWdKwXyg%3D%3D)

[** SUPPORT MARK TODAY**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6b6e2e27f06146babbe6fc65fd123562&_e=pp1XNB6cnSba7lL3Ts8071O8fgEK5vrA7rResLloYVGUzIx4Rx4jYe_A1aK2crGx_AtFTo-3nWySGxbBAczOBl9n8EvMsieCKWY_dDcoLowtg_V-3b-ddLNDObVSN2Ni9Wp8basKO5aKJ-fHK6Tm_Ii59SJAmu-tovUA6543sMAJZgTUx2sGI1Zmr_5xwNGf4NpERGdXL4qPi7nb2Vja1KhjUIIvSQRdNZy3MgoJLQD92LSgfsH_dxOOXX7j6axJe1YyEFIsG2yDA7G__93VduJp-SK4LGMse9MY1wk2PUFMk7MFl8OrfKN3qwnHByg0FgbevoT-9hLmakLN1DW2FQ%3D%3D)

In this case, not only did the parent not consent, she was adamant that her son not get the vaccine because of his asthma and his allergy issues. This has become more than just a mandate; this is the government forcing its way into your life. As I travel around the state of California, I see so many Californians fighting to restore their parental rights. It is becoming evident that 2022 will be the year of the Parent Party. Parents are fed up with politicians putting special interests ahead of their children. They are done with politicians playing politics with their children's education. They are over their children being pawns in the Left's political agenda. 2022 will be the year that Parents step up and hold their elected officials accountable for ensuring that their children receive a proper education and are protected from the political whims of the Left. I believe that parents are the only people that should make health and education decisions for their children, and I will take that belief to Washington D.C. with me.** Thank you, Mark Meuser Republican for U.S. Senate, California | | Paid for by Mark Meuser for U.S. Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: We’re facing an existential crisis point right now as a nation.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for Attorney General
body:
Peter,

When I led the first Trump impeachment investigation, I knew that I was up
against someone who didn’t believe in the rule of law or accountability.
At the time, his actions were an unprecedented presidential abuse of
official power for personal gain, and honestly, we thought it couldn’t get
any worse.

It’s been over a year and a half since that investigation. And in that
time, many of his supporters have descended much further into his
anti-democratic, authoritarian movement that has stretched well beyond
Donald Trump to state legislatures around the country.

I’m running for New York Attorney General because we’re facing an
existential crisis point right now as a nation. Our values are under
attack, and I want to get back on the front lines to once again lead the
fight for our democracy.

We must protect voting rights, reproductive rights, hold everyone
accountable to the rule of law, and fight for social justice and equal
rights. And it’s going to take all of us, including you,
Peter.

[ https://act.dangoldmanforag.com/go/426?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211208_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=28%2E63204%2E9holtf ]We’re setting an ambitious goal of bringing in 5,000 grassroots
Founding Donors in the first month of this campaign. Can you chip in to
help us deliver one standard of justice for all? Any amount you can give
(even $5!) makes a big difference and gets us closer to our goal.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin?=
subject: Introducing Kevin Dellicker for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress
body:
Veteran, Small Business Owner, Family Man | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a3dcce242745/happy-thanksgiving-15232504?e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| |
---
| | Dear Neighbors,

Please let me introduce myself. I am Kevin Dellicker, a Republican candidate to represent the greater Lehigh Valley in the U.S. House of Representatives. I'm not a politician. I’m just an ordinary guy with an extraordinary story, devoted to helping working men and women achieve the American Dream.

When I first decided to run for Congress, a close friend asked me why. “You have a great job, a great family, and a great life. Why do you want to go to Washington, DC?” he asked me.

It’s a good question and he’s right – I’m married to my best friend Susan and we have three wonderful boys: Will, Jake, and Eli. I own my own small business, am invested in our church and community, and have served in the National Guard for 26 years. But that is _exactly_ why I’m running for Congress.

America has always been the land of the free. It’s this freedom that’s given me the opportunity to raise my family, launch my own business, and serve my community. That is freedom worth defending, so I donned a uniform to do just that. Now, that call to serve is calling me to defend that same freedom in Washington.

We must keep America free, and I hope you’ll join me in that mission. Please always feel free to drop me a line and I look forward to connecting throughout this campaign.

Sincerely,

Kevin Dellicker

---
|
---
**Meet Kevin** Kevin Dellicker is a candidate for Congress in the 7th congressional district of Pennsylvania (currently Lehigh, Northampton, and part of Monroe Counties). He is a devoted husband and father who has lived and raised his family in the Lehigh Valley over the past 35 years. He previously served as economic policy advisor to Pennsylvania Governor Tom Ridge. And, he currently owns and operates a successful technology company that managed $275 million in broadband infrastructure projects. Kevin is also a 26-year veteran of the United States military and has deployed four times in the Global War on Terrorism.

When not at work or on military time, Kevin has served on his church council, as a youth sports coach, and in various other community roles. He is a committed Phillies and Iron Pigs fan and enjoys hunting, fishing, and hiking in the woods. Kevin and his wife Susan authored a book about life in National Guard entitled, _Twenty Percent Soldiers: Our Secret Life in the National Guard_.
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=75d03a17b7&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
**Kevin by the Numbers**
* 26 years of uniformed service in the U.S. Army and U.S. Air Force, with four combat-zone deployments as a PA National Guardsman
* 22 years of marriage to Susan, a talented teacher, business partner, public speaker, community volunteer, author, and Fulbright scholar.
* 20 seasons as a youth coach in wrestling, baseball, and soccer
* 16 years of business experience as founder and owner of the technology company Dellicker Strategies
* 8 years of government experience as economic and environmental policy advisor in Pennsylvania and New York
* 5 college degrees, including history, public administration, military science, environmental resource management, and divinity (Dec. 2021).
* 3 sons – 21 (Grove City College), 19 (Elizabethtown College), and 17 (Northwestern Lehigh High School)
* 1 book – Co-author with Susan Dellicker of _Twenty Percent Soldiers: Our Secret Life in the National Guard_

| [Contact Kevin](mailto:kevin@dellickerforcongress.com "Contact Kevin")
---
| **KEEP AMERICA FREE**
Visit www.dellickerforcongress.com
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=297a2bafe6&e=1090c5c412)
---
| | [](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b8c68a3176&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---

---

body:
| | | This year, nearly 6,000 children have been killed by gun violence.
Instead of dealing with the crisis, Republicans in Congress like Rep. Lauren Boebert are posting photos of their kids with assault weapons.
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC8bjqfm1q-7L5Ge5Ma2_uPXqE5Ddiyuyx8xS1Yz0p11kG41GvKiv4cJ_xDv9p139m7syoy2qKIIdShFtL9cniMeNZr4TjKPfwXcxcsbXeU6UMXnf9H8NK1GjijPlkrymVQCkSugTyxUF7Z6PspNXHZeDOPaRFYIqu4R0Zh72gVZvyzlKtY8m4FR1SkiORpGjxs_wAD_wChPbNV2leqHa3baBH-89DuN6L9H6qYDdkzmp9vle8igEcGoZuLRV-WBGx3iNM4KtjQDlH2HClYA0ML5vYiwBX7pX-FsJGYfQikrzCe672hAvyo_C_TLVwxEZ4U/3hp/BdL8wMR8S3WAIle2cjro4Q/h0/Ls8KUFKl-vIxPhwAvA_y705oS3HWiLMmdF3zCrSxRZM)
I'm trying to keep our kids safe from guns, not put them in harm's way. I’m running for Congress to pass common sense gun safety laws to protect our families and communities.
****[**We can’t let extremists like Lauren Boebert take the majority in Congress. Can you donate to my grassroots campaign to hold a toss-up, open seat in the House today?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC8bjqfm1q-7L5Ge5Ma2_uPX7CwzjSNEdehKM6kmGcUg4MC6jEsXWnuCbnMlli9PQZDqZd-hqZNmvVmJZi9phA0lCZMw7THK7aKdSzfh6_uOwAx6nz6-v_NvPcwB8CchaRi9gZBZXuHmdTAQyiPfgbYp6Q39IPaJgCrrM2lBcu1BfGdkyE0s5iiQ76b5rQFu-QhZ5U-nye04WD98A3VlUooJBpVzyKXB48on8i9LSKgnhgUfjPZ5MwjwcSbBF2Cy6n3dLez0FCtIw8hShf5CEqziV49Pz7WW406cuwMSx9ecG58g464BtoX1ED0euwIHswM/3hp/BdL8wMR8S3WAIle2cjro4Q/h1/TN2jYtXDsp7fDElB3OrJc60dLrcVpCZK9v5pz4B8rAc)
[****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC8bjqfm1q-7L5Ge5Ma2_uPX4Ci05Hu6IK59iWuwVOsSKgYwOln9AKS_5bAaPLNliK87kE9PiiDU8OiHRGuHWX1Kwic_W4AHUGJV1OyRyZ1lSwGrG1QQHUGwA3wF92PmZiCg5RlkCirmtG3Z0sQBwUvc_z-luGsAn9cQ_B4lOjS3eTXDlc8qvG0kS0DRjJvdjVvKFfxF5qLunw5RFS5PbtSbspdVuaKdo3hCo3EzWgvtP6K5TMeQZHE8KXjod5xAirdNXyZ0kQUCutkXneiHQy6PpYf_3WHCzrBHwtdnT-ZNE29eidVipQrnFvbG7Es9ouM/3hp/BdL8wMR8S3WAIle2cjro4Q/h2/6iF9rBNc200nN5h-fE6ATgVjpP9RRPR6piHzFqzxMDI)My kids are forced to endure the trauma of lockdown drills and fear of school shootings. **
** **That’s why I’m a proud Moms Demand Action volunteer, running for Congress to pass 6 common sense solutions to our gun violence crisis:**
* **Universal Background Checks** would require all gun transfers and transactions to be recorded, and go through the National Instant Criminal Background Check System (NICS), closing what is sometimes referred to as the private sale exemption.
* **Federal Red Flag Laws** or “extreme risk protection orders” allow courts to temporarily remove firearms from a person who is a danger to themselves or others.
* **Banning Assault Weapons****and High Capacity Magazines** would get weapons of war off our streets.
* **Creating a National Licensing Program** for guns, like you need a license for a car.
* **Banning Ghost Guns** to stop homemade, untraceable weapons.
* **Ending Dark Money in Politics** , to stop the NRA from spending millions on lobbying and SuperPACs.

[**I’m running in a must-win open Democratic seat in the House. Can you stand up for safer gun laws and donate to my campaign today?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC8bjqfm1q-7L5Ge5Ma2_uPXfV1_YSFf-VpqY7S2X_xGMc5y8e_NT4UslloY_MpQdyJQa0BbIkYdbz4yOYF_MSLmwyUIW-DUuyRLozqPeAVSdEcLq2lPvebQdTlPwAnpcz5mZ78TJ4vJ88M5pv2JEY6WyD_B20veT-ismCoK_DyyR0MmOBqe8go_7LBxCM8U4bEUic-tbgKQblDCuHdi87Z9AFh9gRE-VGsDx19OYSugAlZjTMORjIbUG__N5bAKbMPtkraOB1EHfr30piMl09owSUDeULCLiSLHxvpw9vo0_N_zmbcbIh-hrxwupX1bA2k/3hp/BdL8wMR8S3WAIle2cjro4Q/h3/7tQg366IJuUXCx8YwPwdNlgBxcybQvwXTzueZPrfIoo) Thanks for standing up. \-- Melanie D’Arrigo

clean_body: | | | This year, nearly 6,000 children have been killed by gun violence. Instead of dealing with the crisis, Republicans in Congress like Rep. Lauren Boebert are posting photos of their kids with assault weapons. I'm trying to keep our kids safe from guns, not put them in harm's way. I’m running for Congress to pass common sense gun safety laws to protect our families and communities. ** kids are forced to endure the trauma of lockdown drills and fear of school shootings. That’s why I’m a proud Moms Demand Action volunteer, running for Congress to pass 6 common sense solutions to our gun violence crisis: Universal Background Checks would require all gun transfers and transactions to be recorded, and go through the National Instant Criminal Background Check System (NICS), closing what is sometimes referred to as the private sale exemption. Federal Red Flag Laws or “extreme risk protection orders” allow courts to temporarily remove firearms from a person who is a danger to themselves or others. Banning Assault Weaponsand High Capacity Magazines would get weapons of war off our streets. Creating a National Licensing Program for guns, like you need a license for a car. Banning Ghost Guns to stop homemade, untraceable weapons. Ending Dark Money in Politics** , to stop the NRA from spending millions on lobbying and SuperPACs. Thanks for standing up. \-- Melanie D’Arrigo | is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Melanie D'Arrigo, please .

name: Beto for Texas
subject: The last time Abbott made this promise, millions lost power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Let us tell
you a story in headlines.

A day after Governor Greg Abbott “guaranteed” he’d keep the lights on last
winter, millions lost power and over 700 people died.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50398?refcode=ema20211208-166091&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=166091%2E444211%2EPrc3RC ]“We’re in it alone”: Power outages leave millions of Texans desperate
for heat and safety

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50398?refcode=ema20211208-166091&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=166091%2E444211%2EPrc3RC ]Death toll from Texas winter storm continues to rise

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50398?refcode=ema20211208-166091&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=166091%2E444211%2EPrc3RC ]As Texans went without heat, light or water, some companies scored a
big payday

In the aftermath, one thing was clear: We needed Texas leaders to fix the
power grid to make sure this could never happen again. That left Greg
Abbott with a choice: take care of Texans, or make his donors happy. He
chose his donors.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50398?refcode=ema20211208-166091&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=166091%2E444211%2EPrc3RC ]Texas governor's biggest donors: Energy industry that failed

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50398?refcode=ema20211208-166091&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=166091%2E444211%2EPrc3RC ]Power grid not among issues prioritized by Gov. Abbott for Texas
special session agenda

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50398?refcode=ema20211208-166091&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=166091%2E444211%2EPrc3RC ]Everyday Texans overlooked in state lawmakers' response to power
outages during winter storm

Now, winter is here, and Greg Abbott is betting our lives on the weather.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50398?refcode=ema20211208-166091&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1007&akid=166091%2E444211%2EPrc3RC ]Despite lack of teeth in new Texas power grid rules, Abbott says he'll
'guarantee' no failures this winter

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50398?refcode=ema20211208-166091&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1008&akid=166091%2E444211%2EPrc3RC ]‘People should probably be worried’: Texas hasn’t done enough to
prevent another winter blackout, experts say

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50398?refcode=ema20211208-166091&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1009&akid=166091%2E444211%2EPrc3RC ]Gov. Abbott & power assessors disagree on if the lights will stay on
during extreme storms this winter

There
are no shortage of reasons to fire Greg Abbott. Leaving Texans to freeze
to death in their homes — and then refusing to do anything to keep it from
happening again — is chief among them.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50398?refcode=ema20211208-166091&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1010&akid=166091%2E444211%2EPrc3RC ]We can’t afford another four years of Greg Abbott. The future of Texas
is on the line. Please, if you’re in a place to do so, make a donation
today to our campaign as we fight to elect a Governor who will fix the
power grid, hold energy companies accountable, and take protecting our
lives seriously.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50398?refcode=ema20211208-166091&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1029&akid=166091%2E444211%2EPrc3RC ]Contribute $3

We will never forget. We will fight back.

—Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1030&akid=166091%2E444211%2EPrc3RC

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: STACEY ABRAMS ANNOUNCEMENT (via DCCC)
subject: PLEADING with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **STACEY ABRAMS: "I'M RUNNING FOR GOVERNOR"**

**[Stacey just announced she's running for governor against the Republican who signed one of the worst voter suppression bills we've EVER seen. We're calling for a MASSIVE response -- 5,000 gifts in celebration of Stacey's announcement -- to raise the funds needed to elect amazing House Democrats who share Stacey's vision in Georgia and nationwide. Will you rush $3 to help give House Democrats who support Stacey's pro-democracy agenda an UNBEATABLE foundation for victory? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_)

**FIRST:**

Stacey stunned the world and helped FLIP Georgia -- and the entire Senate -- blue.

**NOW:**

She just announced she's OFFICIALLY running for governor!!

After everything Stacey Abrams has done for us and our democracy, we're over the MOON to see her continuing the fight in her home state.

**[That's why we've set a goal to raise 5,000 gifts in the next three hours to lead House Democrats who support her pro-democracy efforts to VICTORY. >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-jf40y-)** | [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.)

---

We watched Stacey fight tirelessly against EVERY Republican voter suppression bill.

**[Let's show Stacey that we will continue her fight for voting rights nationwide with 5,000 gifts before midnight to help propel pro-voting House Democrats like her to victory! Will you rush $3 to defend our House Majority in this historic moment? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)**
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_qfgpe4-)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/vWPEQ9_)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)
---
| [**Or donate another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)
---

Thank you,

DCCC

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46074656&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MDk1MTE4NQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46074656&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MDk1MTE4NQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Peace through Strength
body:
Weakness only invites aggression.. No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-trdino-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Peace through Strength](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-j/)
Joe Biden's weakness, projected across the globe, is making the world a more dangerous place. Bad actors, like Russia and China, are doing what bad actors do - acting badly. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Democrats - Weak on Crime](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-d/)
There are a lot of reasons Democrats are likely to get shellacked in the upcoming midterm elections. None is more important than how weak-on-crime they are. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [A Truly Awful Bill](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-u/)
Perhaps the most irresponsible bill in the history of our nation passed the House last week. If it actually becomes law, hold onto your wallets. Wasteful spending will skyrocket. Taxes will spike. The National Debt will go up trillions. And inflation will get even worse. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [The Democrats Are About to Raise Your Taxes, Again](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-n/)
Hold onto your wallets. Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi are trying to raise your taxes again. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-q/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-a/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trdino-kujkulhluu-f/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-trdino-kujkulhluu-v/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-trdino-kujkulhluu-e/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-trdino-l-s) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. body:
| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=998%2E878179%2EOL4Tcv)
---
**_TEAM, THIS IS AN INCREDIBLE UPDATE!_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Dec_Stand_With_DOJ/?refcode=VPP_20211208_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=998%2E878179%2EOL4Tcv) [Team – Merrick Garland and the Department of Justice are taking a STAND against MAGA freaks trying to wipe out the right to vote! IF YOU SUPPORT THEM, CITIZEN COSPONSOR THE LAWSUIT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Dec_Stand_With_DOJ/?refcode=VPP_20211208_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=998%2E878179%2EOL4Tcv) | [20,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED, SIGN NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Dec_Stand_With_DOJ/?refcode=VPP_20211208_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=998%2E878179%2EOL4Tcv)
---
Team, this is incredible.

**_FINALLY_ someone is taking a stand against MAGA voter suppression!**

**If the DOJ wins this lawsuit, it sets a precedent that will reverberate across the country!**

But if we fail to hit our 20,000 signature goal, Republicans will win this lawsuit... _We can’t let down Merrick Garland and his team in this critical moment!!_

[They need our support, Team — Republicans won’t let their plan crumble without a fight! COSPONSOR THE DOJ LAWSUIT NOW » ](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Dec_Stand_With_DOJ/?refcode=VPP_20211208_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=998%2E878179%2EOL4Tcv)
[20,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED, SIGN NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Dec_Stand_With_DOJ/?refcode=VPP_20211208_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=11&akid=998%2E878179%2EOL4Tcv)
---
Thank you,

_VPP_

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=998%2E878179%2EOL4Tcv). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=998%2E878179%2EOL4Tcv).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=998%2E878179%2EOL4Tcv) to request fewer emails. subject: We Had a Great Time at the Elkhorn Christmas Parade!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, we attended the Elkhorn Christmas Parade over the weekend and we had a great time! It was very nice to see so many of you there.
Hi Peter,**Over the weekend, I attended the Elkhorn Christmas Parade! Everyone had a great time. We enjoyed walking around prior to the parade and seeing everyone's creative floats and entries!** I thoroughly enjoyed my time in Elkhorn on Sunday. It was so nice seeing all of you on the campaign trail and experiencing the Elkhorn Christmas spirit. **Please make sure to follow my social media here:[Twitter](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjyahk-idtjvlhlh-r/), [Facebook](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjyahk-idtjvlhlh-y/), [Instagram](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjyahk-idtjvlhlh-j/) to see what I'm up to! I wish everyone the best this holiday season.**Merry Christmas!Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjyahk-idtjvlhlh-t/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjyahk-idtjvlhlh-i/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjyahk-idtjvlhlh-d/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjyahk-idtjvlhlh-h/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zjyahk-l-n) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

A fighter and a true patriot.

Georgia has gone to the dogs...

I promised you that I would do everything in my power to Keep America Great, and I'm committed to Making Georgia Great Again.

**That starts by putting a strong, conservative fighter in charge, which is why I am very proud to endorse David Perdue as the next Governor of Georgia.**

I know the Woke Democrats and Fake News Liberal Media are going to start their attacks on David and me before you even finish reading this email, so I am asking you to DOUBLE DOWN on your support by donating to David's campaign before Midnight so we can show the Left we're not afraid of a fight.

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover jou
_Sponsored message_
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zoma4slei1v782npnurgknq98fgitqbtk1c9abe8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gmeor5c3h2bs)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2rccnvk76e9a1s6qcrdle3k813p1jp0v65iopo8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gmeor5c3h2bs)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsfq77j3k6n92mos3rv5otrnndi1o0uiugefl8ng_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gmeor5c3h2bs)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4s6i8snu59cqgfblh5p4lq5tjd8tj9kfjqs1k2g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gmeor5c3h2bs)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3t8d0ig02crba063l7qjqm5gmn590d8lk3guopg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gmeor5c3h2bs)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zr0b50a1hva1b3g92ed0ou5rdrr0t720tki11bl0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gmeor5c3h2bs)** [**DONATE**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfj9gdj4qjn2t5hfhot3s1fvtg4bmj9bvtge6b1g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gmeor5c3h2bs) [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zs3a72dc6f6trbjecvlp9thlnbciagjlqrlnuqk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gmeor5c3h2bs) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. [Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsajbqoetlcvt74ukiapls27vonp3ma14b4pd1k8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gmeor5c3h2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z096a41cljdpbo02ig8oabs39qk5rrt01li7sn90_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gmeor5c3h2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606
---

But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back. I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS. In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases. The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help. The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all! And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends. That's why David needs your financial support today. I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? ** The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. © Thomas More Society | 309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Re: Why are you running for Congress? My answer is simple...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
This is who I am, what I stand for, and how Northern Michigan and the U.P. can have ethical honest representation in Congress **It's my duty to run for Congress because our current Rep does not work for the people. ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39482003/320060235/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzhkODI4ZS1lNjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GvFlz70uaTza5q1xSCm-KHryuH5UooOwaM_-wNzl6JE=) _**I am running for Congress out of a strong sense of duty to my community and country. If you're tired of division and partisanship, I need your help getting to Congress. **_ _**My opponent stood against the will of the people three times and still refuses to say the U.S. held a legitimate election. This is unacceptable. If you agree it's time for honest, ethical change, can you pitch in?**_ [MAKE A CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39482004/320060236/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzhkODI4ZS1lNjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GvFlz70uaTza5q1xSCm-KHryuH5UooOwaM_-wNzl6JE=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39482005/320060237/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzhkODI4ZS1lNjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GvFlz70uaTza5q1xSCm-KHryuH5UooOwaM_-wNzl6JE=) [ONE-CLICK $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39482006/320060238/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzhkODI4ZS1lNjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GvFlz70uaTza5q1xSCm-KHryuH5UooOwaM_-wNzl6JE=) Hi Friend, A Congressman is someone who represents their community members on a national level – someone who advocates for constituents on a national platform. I am running for U.S. House of Representatives in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula because we _**do not**_ currently have someone who believes this is true. **My background** To start my career as a public servant, I thought it necessary to be well educated, so my master plan included obtaining advanced degrees in social work, public health, and medicine. I was blessed and I started my career in social work at a veteran's hospital, followed by three years working in Indian Health Service as a family physician. In 1989 I moved my family to the beautiful state of Michigan and practiced as a family physician in Marquette for two decades. Then Peggy and I joined the State Department's Foreign Service out of a sense of national duty. I served as a diplomat doing tours in Pakistan, South Korea, Afghanistan, Morocco, and North Africa for ten years, followed by Iraq. After my last two-year tour in Iraq, I returned home to retire, but instead, I became medical director for the health department during the worse pandemic our country has seen in 100 years. Why? – a sense of _**duty and service**_. Now I wish to continue my public service to represent you in Congress. **What service means to me** **Service is what has guided all my professional decisions** I hope to offer Northern Michigan true, honest and ethical representation. I'm confident I can be an effective member of Congress and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American. I am running on a bedrock of principles — **wisdom, justice, courage, kindness, democratic freedom, and equality under the law.** ** ** I believe we all deserve a change. We deserve a Representative with a moral compass, integrity, someone who speaks the truth and tries to embody all that is best in this great District. We deserve a Congressman with a vision who can recognize problems on the horizon and develop reasonable solutions, someone who can build a consensus to achieve that vision. You deserve a member of Congress that listens to you - and that represents you. I hope to be that person. **What I stand for** I support**universal healthcare, childcare, and the expansion of Medicaid and Medicare.** No one should suffer the consequences of not being able to afford access to medical care.
* When I look at my 200 thousand hospital bills from a simple but bad gallbladder problem, I worry about those faced with a similar situation but without resources.
* We are still in a pandemic, and we must move forward together. Vaccination is the best strategy we have to address COVID along with appropriate masking. I am committed to advocating for science and data to inform our response.

**I support sound environmental policies to protect our future** and especially for us, our Great Lakes. As our Native American colleagues' Seventh Generation Principle, today's decisions should result in a sustainable world seven generations into the future. **I support jobs with living wages** \- if an adult is working a full-time job, they should not have to count on food stamps to sustain their family. **I support critical investments in our infrastructure**. It will ignite the economy and bring much-needed jobs to our District--putting money in working families' pockets and food on the table, all without raising taxes.
* Especially important for the First District is Broadband expansion - A nation without rural connectivity is unacceptable. For our first District, it will be an economic boom for businesses, jobs, and education, not to mention our quality of life.

**I support federal solutions to the affordable housing crisis.** Housing costs have risen at rates that are outpacing stagnant salary growth. I want to be part of a national solution to this ongoing challenge in our district. **I support our democracy, election, and voters' rights**. I believe our democracy is stronger when it is accessible to as many eligible voters as possible, built on inclusion, equal treatment, and participation. **I support a thriving economy.** Nearly every solution we propose must relate directly back to a healthy, vibrant economy. I have offered dozens of robust solutions to inflation, supply and demand issues, work shortages, off-shoring, and reigniting small businesses. **These important issues and many others separate each of us in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula from our current representation in Congress.** **How we'll get there** _**It's time to unite. **_ You don't need to hear it from me, but we all know that the United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. We are even divided on science.
* It's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities.
* I will strive to be Northern Michigan's voice of reason in Washington.
* I'm eager to continue my service.
* I am seeking to be a true representative of the needs of the people.

**What I need from you** Asking for help does not come naturally, but with complete admission that we need campaign finance reform so candidates can concentrate on proposing solutions instead of raising money, we still have to compete. This race requires a lot of resources. Currently, we are funded exclusively through small contributors like you and we're holding our own in fundraising, but we can't let up and need your help maintaining momentum through December. Please consider donating to our campaign today to advance our cause and bring authentic representation for Northern Michigan to Congress in 2023. \- Dr. Bob [ONE-CLICK IMMEDIATE $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39482007/320060239/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzhkODI4ZS1lNjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GvFlz70uaTza5q1xSCm-KHryuH5UooOwaM_-wNzl6JE=) subject: Time to Register for the Virtual Townhall - Topic: People moving to Idaho
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Peter,Idaho is one of the fastest growing states in the United States. People moving to Idaho is a concern on the minds of many Idahoans, even those that just moved here. We don't want to see Idaho become a Nevada or Colorado and certainly not a Washington or Oregon! Let's discuss what the solution is. There is a way to handle growth and still [Keep Idaho IDAHO](https://www.votebundy.com/about/keep-idaho-idaho-plan/). The solution is much simpler than most people may consider. Let's talk and then act! In order to be part of the Virtual Townhall you must register. Here is the link to register: <https://www.votebundy.com/campaign-events/virtual-townhall/>
See you then, Ammon Bundy
P.S. During this Virtual Townhall we will also be announcing a very exciting guest who will be coming to Idaho in support of my run for governor. Tune in!

body:
Hey,
If you don't know me, my name is Steve Scalise - I'm the Republican Whip in the House. That means it's my job to help lead our group of dedicated Conservatives to hold Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi accountable and defend President Trump's incredible legacy.
[**I 'm hoping I could get your help with something.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58967122:6bOjdTENb:m:1:3299561967:C56F83FAF70E4BACCEB81B69D269D762:r)
I just got word that Pelosi, The Squad, and all their radical Democrats are plotting a NATIONWIDE blitz and holding 1,000 events to reach as many voters as they possibly can. In America's closest battleground races, Democrats are storming in to spread their propaganda. **I 'm DEEPLY worried.**
_I 'm watching these close races like a hawk because even a few votes can change everything. One race was decided by just SIX VOTES._
Pelosi's Democrats could reach thousands - even millions - of voters, and this is just phase one. [**I 'm asking you for just 10 dollars. I need your help to get the word out, set the record straight, and fight back against the Liberal propaganda.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58967123:6bOjdTENb:m:1:3299561967:C56F83FAF70E4BACCEB81B69D269D762:r)
If we don't spring into action now, we'll be forced to play defense all next year!
**I 'm afraid I have to ask for 100% participation.**
That's what it will take to deploy enough resources to the closest battleground districts. I know you receive lots of emails but I must insist that you respond to this important - and urgent - request.
[**Can you spare just 10 dollars? I 'm hoping I can count on you.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58967122:6bOjdTENb:m:1:3299561967:C56F83FAF70E4BACCEB81B69D269D762:r)
For America,
Republican Whip Steve Scalise

name: Dr. Ben Carson, American Cornerstone Institute
subject: Standing for life
body:
---
|
---|---

Peter, On Wednesday, December 1st the Supreme Court heard oral argument in the case of _Dobbs v Jackson_ Women's Health Organization. In that case the court has been asked to overrule _Roe v. Wade_ , which found that the Constitution protects the right to an abortion. The American Cornerstone Institute is committed to sending _Roe_ to the dustbin of history, and filed a [brief](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59287067:st85DEHNs:m:1:2394957096:F94BA98FB75D7269086ABA8F793CC626:r) arguing that Roe was wrongly decided because the Constitution, which is devoted to securing the natural right to life, cannot recognize a right that involves taking the life of an innocent human being. But oral argument reinforced a fundamental truth that conservatives must always remember: overturning Roe will not be the final victory in the fight to protect life. Justice Kavanaugh, whose vote would almost certainly be needed to rule in favor of life, repeatedly suggested that overruling Roe would just recognize that "the Constitution is silent and, therefore, neutral on the question of abortion? In other words, that the Constitution is neither pro-life nor pro-choice on the question of abortion but leaves the issue for the people of the states or perhaps Congress to resolve in the democratic process." If Justice Kavanaugh is right, and the issue of abortion will return to the states, then overturning Roe is not the end of the fight. It is not even the beginning of the end. As Churchill said in a different context, it is just the end of the beginning. If Roe is overturned, the real work begins of fighting state by state in legislatures to enact pro-life statutory regimes that protect innocent life to the maximum extent practical. And the American Cornerstone Institute intends to be there fighting every step of the way for life. With the help of your donation and support, we can make a post Dobbs world, a pro-life one. Sincerely, Ben Carson
Founder, American Cornerstone Institute [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59287068:st85DEHNs:m:1:2394957096:F94BA98FB75D7269086ABA8F793CC626:r) |
---|---

Peter, Did you hear the big news? Stacey Abrams has officially announced her campaign for Governor of Georgia. But we all know the truth – Stacey never conceded her 2018 loss, and she never _really_ stopped running for Governor. She has spent the last three years:
* Building a **_dark network of ultra-liberal mega-donors_**.
* Courting the mainstream media with **_constant TV appearances_** _._
* Lining her pockets with **_lucrative book deals_** and speaking engagements.
* Building the biggest **_army of far-left activists_** in the history of our state.

And she’ll say and do virtually anything to make it happen. **That’s why I urgently need your help to FIGHT BACK, Peter.** As you know, we had planned to go dark on digital fundraising through the end of the year, but this changes everything. We MUST raise every dollar we can to Stop Stacey from taking over Georgia and destroying our freedom-loving way of life forever. So please, make a special donation in any amount to help us DEFEAT Stacey Abrams in 2022.

subject: How well do you know Elaine?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39486711/320072584/1090192600?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211209_FR_PhotoMontage_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTExNTk1Mi1mODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-o_62ml9bTVLAFjGBP436JBOplHIKATMvRwxFwctGY=) Folks -- this is Elaine Luria. She joined the Naval Academy when she was just 17 years old -- _only 17 years after women were allowed to serve._ She was one of the first women ever accepted into the Academy’s nuclear power program. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39486712/320072585/1090192600?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211209_FR_PhotoMontage_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTExNTk1Mi1mODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-o_62ml9bTVLAFjGBP436JBOplHIKATMvRwxFwctGY=) Elaine served in the Navy for two decades, and during her deployment to the Middle East she oversaw _eight_ nuclear reactors and was responsible for training all 700 nuclear operators onboard. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39486713/320072586/1090192600?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211209_FR_PhotoMontage_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTExNTk1Mi1mODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-o_62ml9bTVLAFjGBP436JBOplHIKATMvRwxFwctGY=) During her time in the Navy, she made major strides for women in the Armed Forces and our National Security. When she retired, she wanted to focus on being a mom and managing her small business, but she couldn’t shake the desire to do more for the country she had served for the past two decades. That’s why Elaine ran for Congress, and since she’s been there, she’s done a hell of a job -- she was even ranked the second most effective member of the House! We need to keep Elaine in Congress so she can keep fighting for legislation in line with our values. [**Will you chip in $25 or more today to give Elaine the resources she needs to defend her seat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39486715/320072588/1090192600?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211209_FR_PhotoMontage_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTExNTk1Mi1mODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-o_62ml9bTVLAFjGBP436JBOplHIKATMvRwxFwctGY=) | | | [Chip in $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39486718/320072618/1090192600?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_211209_FR_PhotoMontage_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTExNTk1Mi1mODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-o_62ml9bTVLAFjGBP436JBOplHIKATMvRwxFwctGY=)

name: Admiral's Report
subject: November was a very special month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39486997/320073462/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTExNTk1Mi1mODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-hV2b9ZoMLhYAuHVHpuW5KtOXQyA4daAdFCR__HQ9dY=&emci=b3c541b5-6758-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=91115952-f858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39487000/320073482/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTExNTk1Mi1mODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-hV2b9ZoMLhYAuHVHpuW5KtOXQyA4daAdFCR__HQ9dY=&emci=b3c541b5-6758-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=91115952-f858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Permit me to begin by mentioning that since launching our campaign in mid-October, we have been overwhelmed by the enthusiasm from people of all ages, urban and rural, for my candidacy. If you would like to join our team as well, I would like to welcome you aboard. [Please sign up here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39487004/320073505/-2014200876?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTExNTk1Mi1mODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-hV2b9ZoMLhYAuHVHpuW5KtOXQyA4daAdFCR__HQ9dY=&emci=b3c541b5-6758-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=91115952-f858-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6371843#join_our_team) to help us get our message to every household in Iowa.
November was a very special month for the campaign. It marked the beginning of our outreach of events that meant a lot to my family and me.
First, I want to thank everyone who came out for my birthday celebration on November 8th. Just so happens that November 8, 2022, is the date Senator Grassley gets beat in the general election and proceeds to his retirement. Hence, the birthday became about remembering another year and anticipating the next. Oh, and I’d be remiss if I didn’t mention that my brother, Dan, drove from Virginia Beach to be part of his little brother’s big day. That’s him and me in that bottom picture hamming it up. Thanks for the birthday, everyone.
A few days later we traveled to North English and Cedar Rapids to attend several, local Veterans Days events, then motored down to Keokuk for Lee County’s Democrat Party fundraiser.
You’ll notice that the N. English grade school turned out for Veteran’s Day. A school gymnasium full of veterans and grade schoolers, the high school choir and a brass quintet, speaks volumes about small town America. Love it! Thank you to my grade schoolteacher from Kinsey Elementary in Sioux Center, Iowa, Mr. Ron Van Berkum, for sponsoring the visit. Jordan and I had a very nice time.
The passage of another Veterans Day means significantly fewer WW II and Korean War vets are with us. Their numbers are dwindling, fast. It is hard for many of us who witnessed these proud, tough, soft-spoken veterans slowly fade from life, my dad included. But my hope is that my generation of veterans will honor those before us and continue to be that stabilizing influence in our country.
As I said in my Veterans Day message: _Veteran’s Day for me is about honoring those who gave, those who endured, and the families who persevered. I salute them!_
The endorsement list is getting longer. We added another list of influential Iowans, elected officials, and notable movers in the state to a second set of endorsements. I am fortunate to have so many substantive and forward-thinking leaders on my team, and I am immensely grateful for their vote of confidence in the campaign and trust in me.
And finally, I was fortunate to spend this Thanksgiving holiday with my wonderful family. This Thanksgiving holiday, my appreciation extended to those who are behind the scenes every morning.
_It’s the delivery driver whose route begins two hours before sunup; the 11-to-7 hospital worker who can never quite catch a good day’s sleep; the night mechanic working to ensure the equipment stays up; the farmworker who handles your food, and the legions of military personnel standing watch at desks, outposts, and conns of ships both here and afar._
_These people keep the wheels of commerce going, the lights on, the sick on the path of healing. My thanks go to them who give us pleasant mornings, good food, and a safe environment every day._
_My appreciation is tinged with sadness in knowing that on Thanksgiving there are those who have no one. They live on the street or alone, unseen and lonely on a day when such things shouldn’t be._
Hence, my family celebrates Thanksgiving with a customary circle of friends and a twist — we find a few people who haven’t anywhere to go and share the day with them. It has led to interesting conversations, an expanded understanding of others, fewer leftovers, and bigger smiles.
In closing, below is a list of upcoming events. Yes, you are invited to any event you want; we’d love to see you. If you ever have questions or want to invite us to an event in your community, please email us at info@frankenforiowa.org!

Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39487009/320073522/-42398318?refcode=em20211209am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTExNTk1Mi1mODU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-hV2b9ZoMLhYAuHVHpuW5KtOXQyA4daAdFCR__HQ9dY=)
Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc

PO Box 13401
Des Moines, IA 50310

VICE ADMIRAL FRANKEN (RET) IS A FORMER MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY. USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE.
