name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Not a Cheney-Kinzinger-Mace Republican
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58967312:JD-XDTENt:m:1:3103520637:F3DDA2B1251F07992E1EFD62D5D40451:r "Headline") Peter, Crazy. Nutjob. Extremist. These are just SOME of the names I have been called. **These are the extremist views that offend them so much:** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58967312:JD-XDTENt:m:1:3103520637:F3DDA2B1251F07992E1EFD62D5D40451:r "Tweet")I support the Constitution. I support your right to make your own medical decisions. I believe that abortion is murder. I believe that the smaller our government, the freer the people. **_For this, they call me a nutjob and other names._** Then, they tell other Republicans to "tone down" this message to win voters, but it never works. President Trump and I won because we refused to apologize for our conservative principles. When other Republicans do the same, **_we will never lose again._** **[I need your help to fight off the left's attacks. So please, donate as much as you can before the end of the year, so I can keep fighting the swamp here in DC.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58967312:JD-XDTENt:m:1:3103520637:F3DDA2B1251F07992E1EFD62D5D40451:r "I
need your help to fight off the left’s attacks. So please, donate as much as you can before the end of the year, so I can keep fighting the
swamp here in DC.")** Here is the truth that they simply cannot fathom: I am not an extremist. On the contrary, I, and those who stand with me, represent the mainstream of the Republican Party. Like our Founding Fathers, I'm standing with Americans who support our freedom of speech, our 2nd Amendment, want our border secured, and the government out of every aspect of our lives. That makes me a SERIOUS threat to the DC Swamp, which is why they keep coming after me. **Unlike the Cheney-Kinzinger-Mace wing of the Republican Party, I rejected the unconstitutional impeachment of President Trump, Nancy Pelosi 's January 6th witch hunt, sleepy Joe's socialist spending, and the Jihad Squad's Anti-Semitism.** I will keep being a thorn in their side as I fight to restore our freedoms, but they keep coming up with new and different ways to attack me. **Now, they are redrawing my district to add as many Democrat voters as possible, hoping I will lose my Congressional race in 2022.** **[I need to show them that no matter how they try to stop me, this movement is too strong- the only way they will believe it is if I raise as much money as possible to gear up for the election.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58967312:JD-XDTENt:m:1:3103520637:F3DDA2B1251F07992E1EFD62D5D40451:r "I
need to show them that no matter how they try to stop me, this movement is too strong – the only way they will believe it is if I raise as much
money as possible to gear up for the election.")** Please, I know that times are tough, but we must stand together and WIN and take our nation back. **[Your donation could make all the difference.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58967312:JD-XDTENt:m:1:3103520637:F3DDA2B1251F07992E1EFD62D5D40451:r "Your donation could make all the difference.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58967312:JD-XDTENt:m:1:3103520637:F3DDA2B1251F07992E1EFD62D5D40451:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) P.S. Every day, I work hard for my constituents and people around this nation who are counting on me to put an end to Biden and Pelosi's tyranny. I will never stop fighting. **[Not when I have patriots like you on my team who will donate $50, $100, or even $1,000 to help me.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/58967313:JD-XDTENt:m:1:3103520637:F3DDA2B1251F07992E1EFD62D5D40451:r "Not when I have patriots
like you on my team who will donate $50, $100, or even $1,000 to help me.")** Thank you.
---
| **PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC.**

Talk soon, Marcus Flowers = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Nina Turner
subject: Ears, Teeth and Eyes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
Last I checked...
#

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39490772/320088801/1761773496?refcode=211209_FR_bbbhealthcare_img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDM5YjMwNC1mZjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OWLszZ_sou-LY-ucxmdGdgQByX3_YKwLYZ7Idl7zY_c=)
Friends,

Like many of you, when I get ready for the day, I’m blessed that my ears, eyes and teeth are pretty healthy and aside from support from my spectacular glasses, everything works pretty darn good.

**_Last time I checked, a person’s ears, teeth and eyes were all part of the human body. So why is healthcare coverage for dental and vision not covered under Medicare?_**

Can you believe that?

I mean, with the assistance of my spectacular glasses, my eyes are pretty good, I can still hear okay, listening intently when my grand-babies are sleeping for any rustling or noises on the monitor, and thank heavens I still have all of my teeth! (well most of them, except the ones in the very back.)

**I’m okay, but everyday I wake up and ask, “But what about everyone else?”**

That is why we cannot allow anyone, not Republicans, not Joe Manchin or anyone to make major cuts to the Build Back Better Plan that benefit the poor, working poor, and barely middle class.

Progressives are fighting to ensure the latest bill expands Medicare so that it includes vision, dental and hearing. We must support Senator Sanders and other progressive leaders to keep this important component of the bill in tact.

**In what world does it make sense to separate these key areas of healthcare?**

I am using my platform to elevate the importance of passing the BBB and organizing a movement to help build momentum. Our hope is that together, we can hold the line and demand more for the people - not less.

With your help, we can create enough public pressure and urge Congress to take action immediately. [**Will you help us amplify the urgent demand to include vision, dental and hearing coverage in the Build Back Better Plan with a donation to support our movement?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39490774/320088803/1761773496?refcode=211209_FR_bbbhealthcare_L1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDM5YjMwNC1mZjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OWLszZ_sou-LY-ucxmdGdgQByX3_YKwLYZ7Idl7zY_c=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39490775/320088805/1761773496?refcode=211209_FR_bbbhealthcare_btn1&express_lane=true&refcode2=1d39b304-ff58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDM5YjMwNC1mZjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OWLszZ_sou-LY-ucxmdGdgQByX3_YKwLYZ7Idl7zY_c=)**
Thank you,
Nina Turner
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39490777/320088806/1761773496?refcode=211209_FR_bbbhealthcare_btn2&express_lane=true&refcode2=1d39b304-ff58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDM5YjMwNC1mZjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OWLszZ_sou-LY-ucxmdGdgQByX3_YKwLYZ7Idl7zY_c=)**

* * *

Nina Turner for Us
PO Box 91956
Cleveland, OH 44101
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, [click here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/bada27e3-bc56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/1d39b304-ff58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDM5YjMwNC1mZjU4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OWLszZ_sou-LY-ucxmdGdgQByX3_YKwLYZ7Idl7zY_c=&id=113311558) to unsubscribe.

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: More than an old sweatshirt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
(Photo attached)
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39492530/320097039/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk442-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDFmOWQ2MS0wMTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OT85RYFOk-7fPX825dy8yH8Nl1Dxc0JoCCxezn5jY6g=)
Peter – you might be wondering why I’m dropping into your inbox with a photo of me holding an old sweatshirt peppered with burn holes. Well, that sweatshirt has a lot to do with why I'm running for Iowa's Senate seat to defeat Chuck Grassley, so I hope you’ll allow me a moment to explain.
You see, my parents couldn’t give me a trust fund or debt-free college experience, but they gave me something worth a heck of a lot more: They taught me about seeing work to be done and doing it. About treating people with respect. And to never think you’re better than anyone else, no matter what you do or where you go.
I come from a working class family, and working class families are who I’ve been fighting for my whole career in public service – because far too often, it’s the big guys with the fat wallets that get what they want from our government, when it should be the other way around.
When I was elected to Congress, I took this sweatshirt that my dad wore while welding as a union pipefitter with me on my very first day, to remind myself every day why I was there and who I was fighting for.
**I’m in this fight for working families like the one I come from – because Sen. Grassley has stopped showing up for us and representing our interests. **
[**If you believe Iowans need a stronger voice – if you’re with me to flip Iowa blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority – then I’m asking you to pitch in a grassroots contribution. Please give whatever you can before midnight tonight to fuel our fight for working families, defeat Sen. Grassley and win in Iowa.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39492532/320097040/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk442-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDFmOWQ2MS0wMTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OT85RYFOk-7fPX825dy8yH8Nl1Dxc0JoCCxezn5jY6g=)

name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: expanding my story of opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I know I can win and deliver better leadership for the people of Florida
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39492698/320097979/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1837-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzFmOWQ2MS0wMTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qs9uwdKUKDRzZzWCPYdoLE2pVmADawxIVayGnu8THw4=)
**I truly believe that only in America could a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have this unlikely story of opportunity. **
|
---
Friend, growing up, I learned quickly you've _got_ to have faith. Faith is what inspired my career in public service, and faith is what drove me to run for U.S. Senate – so I can expand this story of opportunity to more Americans.
**With recent polls showing this race in the margin of error and a strong grassroots team of supporters by my side, I _know_ I can win and deliver better leadership for the people of Florida – the people I've known and served my whole life.**
But national Republicans have amassed more than $85 million they can spend to defeat me, and this is already turning out to be one of the most expensive Senate races in history. **With Senate control on the line in Florida, this could not be more important:**
[If you want to defeat Marco Rubio, defend our Democratic Senate majority and give more Americans – no matter what they look like or where they come from – those opportunities for a brighter future, will you donate $5 or more to my campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39492699/320097980/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1837-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzFmOWQ2MS0wMTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qs9uwdKUKDRzZzWCPYdoLE2pVmADawxIVayGnu8THw4=)

name: Sen. Richard Blumenthal
subject: Let's talk about Republicans' so-called concern with life.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=sP5P3tttq990%2B2EfT5ZS5Xj42FWcSMj1&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend: For decades, conservatives have waged an all-out assault on the private healthcare decisions of American women - supposedly in the name of "protecting life."
Now their assault on reproductive freedom has reached the Supreme Court, where their challenge to _Roe v. Wade_ has been heard by a right-wing majority who seem determined to roll back the clock to the 1950s.
**I can 't help but be astounded by the blatant hypocrisy of conservatives' supposed zeal for "the sanctity of life" when it involves controlling women's bodies and their personal decisions - juxtaposed with their utter lack of regard for "the sanctity of life" in all other areas of American life. **
Where was Republicans' concern for life last week, when a young man stormed his school in Michigan and brutally killed four other students?
Where is their concern for life as a majority of Republicans in Congress work _against_ President Biden's lifesaving vaccine mandates, allowing COVID-19 to spread, mutate, and kill our population?
Where is their concern for life when year after year, session after session, they work to repeal the Affordable Care Act, hoping to make it more _difficult_ for Americans to get medical care or prescriptions they need to _live_ healthy lives?
As America's children go to school, fearing for their lives, as more vaccine skeptics risk their own lives and the lives of others by not getting vaccinated, as millions of Americans still can't afford healthcare, Republicans have the audacity to claim they "fight for life," while they simultaneously block measures that would truly protect and save the lives of those they represent.
**It makes me sick to my stomach, Friend. Enough with the hypocrisy. Enough with Republican obstruction of lawmaking that would _save_ lives. They do not care about the lives of women, they just want to control and dominate the lives of women.**
**This is not "The Handmaid's Tale." This is America. **
**It 's time for concerned Democrats everywhere to expose the hypocrisy of the Republican Party. Speak out now: Do you think the GOP _actually_ supports life? **
**[Click here to make your voice heard and hold Republican lawmakers accountable for their hypocritical and blatant attacks on women's reproductive rights. I need 1,629 more members of this team to speak out urgently before 11:59 p.m. tonight.](http://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-gop-hypocrisy?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1110-su-nd)**
The Republican Party's tacit endorsement of gun violence - while claiming to be the party that protects the sanctity of life - is stomach-churning. Their contempt for medicine and healthcare - whether it is vaccines, prescriptions, pre-existing conditions, or hearing aids and dental care for seniors - is nauseating. It's all gone on for far too long. But we must resolve, always, to hold them accountable. To be the party that _truly_ fights for and protects every American's life. Thank you for doing your part.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=9cfE0ENZWS5e%2BKZozRF3v3j42FWcSMj1&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

Where is their concern for life as a majority of Republicans in Congress work against President Biden's lifesaving vaccine mandates, allowing COVID-19 to spread, mutate, and kill our population? Where is their concern for life when year after year, session after session, they work to repeal the Affordable Care Act, hoping to make it more difficult for Americans to get medical care or prescriptions they need to live healthy lives? As America's children go to school, fearing for their lives, as more vaccine skeptics risk their own lives and the lives of others by not getting vaccinated, as millions of Americans still can't afford healthcare, Republicans have the audacity to claim they "fight for life," while they simultaneously block measures that would truly protect and save the lives of those they represent. It makes me sick to my stomach, Friend. Enough with the hypocrisy. Enough with Republican obstruction of lawmaking that would save lives. They do not care about the lives of women, they just want to control and dominate the lives of women. This is not "The Handmaid's Tale." This is America. It 's time for concerned Democrats everywhere to expose the hypocrisy of the Republican Party. Speak out now: Do you think the GOP actually supports life? The Republican Party's tacit endorsement of gun violence - while claiming to be the party that protects the sanctity of life - is stomach-churning. Their contempt for medicine and healthcare - whether it is vaccines, prescriptions, pre-existing conditions, or hearing aids and dental care for seniors - is nauseating. It's all gone on for far too long. But we must resolve, always, to hold them accountable. To be the party that truly fights for and protects every American's life. Thank you for doing your part. Dick

body:
As we approach Christmas with COVID-19 cases on the rise, I want to make sure you have the resources you need to stay safe and healthy. Peter,

As we approach Christmas with COVID-19 cases on the rise, I want to make sure you have the resources you need to stay safe and healthy.

Here in Kentucky, cases, test positivity, and hospitalizations are increasing. While this escalation is not what we hoped for, we have the tools to manage the spread, and we will get through this together.

We must remain diligent and do everything we can to protect ourselves and our neighbors -- and that means masking up, social distancing when you can, and getting vaccinated.

Anyone over the age of five is eligible to receive the vaccine, and anyone over the age of 18 is eligible to receive their booster if they've been fully vaccinated for six months. **[If you haven't received your vaccine yet or if it's time to receive your booster, follow this link to schedule an appointment today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39494152/320103533/19699264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGM3Yjc3Zi0wMzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efGGh3yUwEe03yxyWRR7LQtoSY20u8huy_B8RO3FAn8=&emci=df9026a7-9757-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=50c7b77f-0359-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1437603)**

clean_body: | = | | This is urgent, folks: North Carolina Republicans are trying to gerrymander their way to victory in 2022, causing the North Carolina Courts to halt candidate filing and push the date of the primary back to May 17th. While the courts deliberate on the constitutionality of the state’s congressional maps, Donald Trump and Madison Cawthorn convened a meeting at Mar-a-Lago to discuss their plans for electing their acolytes. Their plan is to take over North Carolina one district at a time, planting a hand-picked Trump crony at each stop. Trump and Cawthorn are desperate to make sure their preferred far-right candidate, Bo Hines, wins this seat so he can carry forward their radical agenda. = | | | = Republicans know that they can’t win elections on their merits and policy alone -- they need to rig the system in order to do so. That’s why we’re disappointed but not surprised that North Carolina Republicans stooped so low as to try and gerrymander their way to a dark red state and a Republican-controlled House and Senate. name: Eric Lynn
subject: Piney Point disaster - DeSantis moves to dismiss case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
body:
The Piney Point disaster demands justice https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-piney-1209 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-piney-1209]Hi friends,
Back in April, 215 million gallons of polluted water were pumped into Tampa Bay from the Piney Point phosphate plant.
It was a dangerous and consequential move that threatened our entire ecosystem here in the Tampa Bay area.
A federal lawsuit was rightfully filed against the state by the Center for Biological Diversity, Tampa Bay Waterkeeper, Suncoast Waterkeeper, Manasota-88, and Our Children’s Earth Foundation. They allege that Governor DeSantis and other state officials have long mishandled the site and violated the federal Clean Water Act.
DeSantis just asked a federal judge to toss out the lawsuit so that his administration can avoid being held accountable for their actions. [https://www.tampabay.com/news/environment/2021/12/07/florida-seeks-to-scuttle-environmentalists-piney-point-lawsuit/]
Our environment must be protected if we hope to create a sustainable future for our children, and I’m committed to implementing stronger safeguards at the federal level. If you support us in this effort, please consider contributing to our campaign today to help bring my advocacy to protect our environment to Washington. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-piney-1209]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-piney-1209?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10] Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-piney-1209?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-piney-1209?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-piney-1209?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-piney-1209?express_lane=true&amoount=250&refcode=express_lane_250] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-piney-1209]This dump from Piney Point caused deadly blooms leading to the largest red tide we’ve seen in Pinellas, which killed hundreds of tons of fish and wildlife. It will likely cause deadly algae blooms again that disrupt our local economy, and endanger the health of people and animals in the surrounding area.
Governor DeSantis, local agencies, and private businesses cannot be allowed to get away with polluting our waterways and disregarding safety standards.
I hope you’ll join me in standing up to fight to protect our environment. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-piney-1209]
Thank you,
Eric Lynn

body:
I have big news.

**
From the Desk of Donald J. Trump**
_45th President of the United States_

Peter,

As one of my top supporters, I wanted you to be among the first to know that **I am giving my _complete and total endorsement_ to David Perdue as the next Governor of the great state of Georgia**.

David is a true patriot who is committed to getting Georgia back on track, but this is going to be a very tough fight. Stacey Abrams and the radical Left have been laying the groundwork and building up their war chests to flip Georgia blue since her embarrassing loss three years ago.

_I am asking you to rush in a donation of any amount to David 's campaign so he can get a head start in what will be the biggest fundraising race anyone has ever seen. _

**Become a Trump Georgia Patriot - Donate in the next 15 minutes:**

****[DONATE $500](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58970413:63o5JTEaN:m:1:3253819041:37DEEA4EFAA51DECEF8AF79000D780B6:r)****

I cannot be any more clear: Georgia will be GROUND ZERO in 2022.

All eyes have been on Georgia since Stacey REFUSED to concede her race in 2018 -- she still thinks she's Governor!

**It 's time for strong, principled, CONSERVATIVE leadership in Georgia, which is why I back David one hundred percent.** I could always count on David to fight for the American people and me in the U.S. Senate, and I know that as Governor, he will deliver on his promises and make Georgia great again!

**David is not afraid to go toe-to-toe with the Woke Democrats and stand up for what 's right. What about you, Peter?**

[**< < RUSH DONATE >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58970417:63o5JTEaN:m:1:3253819041:37DEEA4EFAA51DECEF8AF79000D780B6:r)

Donald J. Trump

name: NH SENATE ALERT (via MaggieHassan.com)
subject: NEW: The Boston Globe predicts "the 2022 midterm elections could be among the best ever for Republicans"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
**"...the 2022 midterm elections could be among the best ever for Republicans."** – _The Boston Globe_ Did you see this, friend? **_The Boston Globe_ is predicting that 2022 will be a very good year for Republicans**, and they’ve named Maggie Hassan as the number one most vulnerable Democratic Senator. Republicans are one seat away from taking back the Senate majority, and Maggie Hassan is at the top of their list. Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies have already spent **almost $7 MILLION** to defeat Maggie, and they're fully prepared to fund her Republican opponent. In a swing state like New Hampshire, we aren't taking anything for granted. No matter who the Republican nominee is, this race is going to be an uphill battle. name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: Contact your lawmaker to support abortion rights today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

We need abortion liberation NOW!

It’s now clear that by this time next year, Americans will not have the abortion rights they have today.

The Supreme Court, which is overrun by Trump-appointees, is going to allow a Mississippi abortion ban to remain in place, threatening our constitutional right to abortion all over the country.

That means 36 million women in 26 states, and more who can become pregnant, will lose access to abortion. We know that abortion is health care. And if we lose that right, people will die. The people who will be harmed the most are those in Black, Brown, rural, and low income communities, as well as young people. It hurts those who are already struggling.

This is BARBARIC — it’s so barbaric that the United Nations called it a human rights violation.

In Pennsylvania, our conservative lawmakers have been chomping at the bit to make abortion illegal with only our Governor standing in their way.

Contact your lawmakers. Tell them that you support abortion rights and they should, too!

CONTACT YOUR LAWMAKER
[https://keystoneprogressaction.com/support-abortion-rights-today/]

We have to fight at the polls by electing progressive lawmakers. Make sure you're voting for candidates who support this essential right.

In solidarity,

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=120921 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=120921]

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Just when we thought Elise Stefanik couldn’t get any worse...
| Just when we thought Elise Stefanik couldn’t get any worse, she not only has a reputation for her extremist views on reproductive rights, she voted **_in favor_** of a government shutdown last week – _the second time in 2 months!_

I’ve experienced firsthand the impact a government shutdown has on our nation – thousands of my intelligence and law enforcement colleagues were furloughed, and many experienced financial strain from weeks without pay. Short staffing led to inevitable gaps in our national security and morale was severely damaged.

**_Listen, Elise Stefanik’s actions no longer surprise us, but she continues to put her party over NY-21 and it needs to end!_**

Listen, Elise Stefanik’s actions no longer surprise us, but she continues to put her party over NY-21 and it needs to end! = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thankfully, she lost this key vote, but if she’s voted twice to shut down our government and put thousands of people out of work, we know she’ll do it again! There are lives at stake with every decision Congress makes, and Elise continues to be on the wrong side. = Thanks for your help! Team Castelli | = | Matt Castelli is a former CIA officer and Director for Counterterrorism at the National Security Council who served in both the Obama and Trump White Houses. He lives in Saratoga County and is running to represent the people of NY’s 21st Congressional District. | ** Paid for by Castelli for Congress Castelli for Congress PO Box 2341 Wilton, NY 12831 United States **

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: I’m assembling an A-Team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard
body:
Friend, My name is Mike Waltz and I am the **first** and **only** Special Forces Green Beret to serve in Congress. I am a proud Florida native, Colonel in the National Guard, former White House and Pentagon policy advisor, small business owner, and proud dad. I believe that public service is the highest honor, and I will fight for you in Congress with the same intensity as I did on the battlefield.

For over two decades, I served as an elite U.S. Army Green Beret. As a congressman,**I will continue to safeguard our nation from our enemies, foreign and domestic.** Fighting for border security to keep gangs, drug cartels, and terrorists from penetrating our southern border is one of my biggest priorities.

As a Florida native, a small business owner, and a national guardsman, I have worked alongside members of our community and heard their concerns. We are tired of Washington’s tax and spend policies. We are disgusted by Liberal politicians calling to defund our police while Antifa and BLM criminals bring havoc to our streets. We are ashamed by the Biden Administration putting America last, caving over and over to China’s communist government.

**I will fight Nancy Pelosi and radical left-wingers promoting socialism with the same intensity I brought to the battlefield as a Green Beret.**

As the Liberal mob attacks our essential freedoms and threatens our very way of life, **I am your fighter on the front lines**.

[**Will you chip in $10, $25, $50 or $100 today so that I can keep up the fight in Congress?**](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxdUMFugzAM_ZpwowLDwjhwWEd72g6dtK23yCQuTZcEBGFV-_ULHdqmSZEjP9vPfk9VkBd5RpGuIIE0haRMb99KguIJ5o3iRSbpHlmeWGwRpdedQ0ODX8nORseqyeQdR46ySJqyBMnxUFBJKUKugOf3kamO3vcjyx4YbMMbSU4Drc7aDaRmkoBZLY9I5ozGX0OK40i2Mdq1Mcae0MaOZdvJW2FJ6cmyrCaL2jDgMzh20yApgO3b52l6geuzj500Am1v9OGydMmQom4DU71o5fEchLbid6FAJ1DMO4XVHySWk74ZOufJ-UAQ2ON9Ub5uYJ-vZSgLZ7QKhX_gUasgvLapk5t9vYuGSvVnbYweeREcbWcRNx-XUytWrBnAbQzgZhn8EfW-6-LNyT4lcxEeQ_SXnn46F5LV4g2wov4Ccyeaiw) [**< < JOIN THE A-TEAM >>**](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxdUMFOhDAQ_Zpyg8DQAB44qOzGg2uyxqi3ZmgLdLctBIpk_XrLStSYNNPMm5k3854ogeY0lYEqIYYkgfgmuX4RB5HFSGuR5SmXBRIaG2wRuVO9RS1HF_HeBF3ZNEVN04LnNS9oSiFGzjEXRcabLAZKA112zg0TSW8J7P2bJJ9HGS3KjlKsJB4zinco9YLaffoUp0maWivbhhg6iSa0JN3PzjAjhZoNSStpUGkC2QpO_Txy6cH29eM0P8PnwYWWa4Zm0Kq5bF3cp6haz1RtWrNwDUwZ9ruQoWXI1p3MqLNk20nfDL110jpP4NlD8bS0y0N6OL_4MrNaCV_4B3ZKeOGVSSzfvVfHYCzFsCit1ZTl3tF2FXH1cTu1JPkdAbiOAVwtgz-i3o59uDuZx3gtwr2P7jLIn86NJNq8AZJXX15NnBs) Together, we can take on our enemies and continue to make America the greatest nation on earth. This is a fact, Peter: More than 17,000 Tennesseans have died from COVID-19.
And now, with a dangerous variant on the rise and spreading across the country, Bill Lee stands silent while GOP members of the General Assembly continue to spout lies and misinformation. **As an entire party, they are more interested in scoring political points than carrying out their duty to serve.**
Let’s not forget, just six weeks ago in the Special Session, their legislative priorities sought to:
1. Outlaw mask mandates and vaccine requirements, even in private businesses, preventing them from being able to protect themselves from the pandemic
2. Saddle small businesses with legal costs related to vaccines
3. Consolidate the Governor’s emergency powers, which he has routinely used to override the will of the people

**Put it all together and it means that Tennessee is woefully unprepared for a dangerous new variant like Omicron.** We can do so, so much better. We _have_ to do better.
I am not a career politician. I am not “the establishment” candidate — but I am a fighter. I am a truth-teller, like it or not. I am a respected physician, a concerned dad and husband, and a dedicated Tennessean.
[Let’s bring common sense back to Tennessee. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bridie Farrell for US
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39503431/320132833/-1207607143?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211208sexist_full_bf_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTk0MjI2YS0xNDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sIfqCQIDC20moXC2aa9_jjwUUXNAWKaFS4pdQUf7NpE=)
---
Friend. _**NY-21 County Chairs just jumped in front of your vote.**_ Eleven County Party Chairs tried to wire the NY-21 primary for a candidate without a vote of the people and six months before election day. **Their goal was simple: get everyone except one guy to drop out and leave the voters with no one else to choose from.** They didn’t even interview all the candidates before endorsing one. _This is the backroom deal-making that turns people off and leads to reduced enthusiasm for political engagement. But the backroom didn’t stop there._ One of the chairs, Todd Kerner, called me to say I should drop out. When I pointed out that he hadn’t even met with me yet to discuss why I’m running, he said _**“As a man, I’m not comfortable meeting with you alone.”**_ When I said, “What?” he replied, “Not with all that you’ve said and put out there.” _Clearly, he was referring to my outspoken opposition to child sexual abusers._ He then went on to tell me I was just like Tedra Cobb, last cycle’s nominee, and that _she and I are the problem with the Democratic Party because we make gender an issue._ I am not running on my gender, but neither can I, nor will I, run from it. Frankly, my exchange with Todd underscores the further problem with all of this. How is a county chair who throws around misogynistic tropes and accuses a sexual abuse survivor of being a reputational risk to him the kind of person whose judgment we should trust to select the next Democratic standard-bearer against Elise Stefanik? I believe we are much wiser and much safer placing our confidence in the will of the voters to decide who will take on Elise. That’s exactly what I am doing in this race — placing my trust in the people who live, work and call the North Country home. [**If you’re with me, could you chip in a donation of $10, $25, $50 — or any amount — so we can prove that North Country voters can make up their own minds?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39503433/320132835/-1207607143?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211208sexist_full_bf_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTk0MjI2YS0xNDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sIfqCQIDC20moXC2aa9_jjwUUXNAWKaFS4pdQUf7NpE=) **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Number one battleground state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
We’ve got some big news. **[In a piece released by the New York Times on Tuesday, they name California as the number one battleground state in the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39504110/320136585/1576895101?referringSource=articleShare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGM5YmRkOS0xOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hc2QoddhNHsy4qjUYiegzMNfd0PZR4AWeLNVxDVnfb4=&emci=be118f04-0c59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=30c9bdd9-1959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=21617867)** Yes, you heard that right: not Georgia, or Texas, or Pennsylvania, but our own state of California. Let’s examine why.

**Unlike many other states, California’s redistricting process is led by an independent commission, not a partisan one.** Whereas other states—largely Republican-held ones—are redrawing districts for partisan advantage (read: gerrymandering), California is striving for fairness.

Residents of each Congressional district should be able to walk from one part of the district to another without crossing into one or multiple other Congressional districts, a measure designed to keep Congressional districts reasonable and not gerrymandered. But they also pay attention to caveats for fair representation of minority populations and keeping “communities of interest” together. **This means that there will be many more competitive districts in California than there have been in election cycles for the last decade.**

**[There’s a good chance that our new district will give us an advantage over the current one, making our race officially more competitive as a red to blue race. Will you contribute today to help build our winning edge?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39504116/320136593/-2083257137?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGM5YmRkOS0xOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hc2QoddhNHsy4qjUYiegzMNfd0PZR4AWeLNVxDVnfb4=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39504120/320136597/-2083257137?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGM5YmRkOS0xOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hc2QoddhNHsy4qjUYiegzMNfd0PZR4AWeLNVxDVnfb4=)
In the recent versions we’ve seen of our Congressional district, we will most likely become more compact, losing some of our northern and more rural communities. **We will likely lose some Republican areas and pick up some more urban, Democratic ones.** We don’t yet know how much it will even the score in our district, but we don’t have to wait long to see. Final maps are released tomorrow, and certified at the end of the month.

**That means we’ll finally be able to do accurate data analysis and begin to target and engage our true electorate.** In other words, this is a Big Deal, folks! These new maps are just the beginning of this race turning a new page. We’re counting down the days of our final quarter and looking to reach an ambitious goal. **In the New Year, we plan to hire new staff, execute a strong political program, and begin organizing our field department. We’re gonna need to raise like hell in order to do it.**

**[That’s why I’m asking you personally to donate to our campaign today and set us on the right track come Election Year. Any amount helps—can I count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39504128/320136604/-2083257137?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGM5YmRkOS0xOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hc2QoddhNHsy4qjUYiegzMNfd0PZR4AWeLNVxDVnfb4=)**
In solidarity,

**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-08

name: Melissa King
subject: Be the reason John’s message is heard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
This moving story of progress fuels so much of what my husband does.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39504439/320137680/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211209-1-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=cf84611e-1a59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjg0NjExZS0xYTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pT4Z8I6PKWdFep4J_XzV88xgCSInnLEzs0stEPWSuZw=)
---
Peter,

This week, my husband and his campaign launched a new ad sharing John’s extraordinary family story and his vision for the future of Maryland – and he needs your support to make the biggest impact possible. [_**Will you chip in to his ad fund today to make sure John’s story on the power of progress reaches as many Maryland voters as possible?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39504440/320137681/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211209-1-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=cf84611e-1a59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjg0NjExZS0xYTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pT4Z8I6PKWdFep4J_XzV88xgCSInnLEzs0stEPWSuZw=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39504441/320137682/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211209-1-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=cf84611e-1a59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjg0NjExZS0xYTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pT4Z8I6PKWdFep4J_XzV88xgCSInnLEzs0stEPWSuZw=)
---
I’ve seen firsthand how John’s story and ancestral history of enslavement less than 25 miles from where our family lives now can serve as a starting point for complex but necessary conversations about the challenges we face today. Acknowledging past injustices is essential to our progress as a state, but there are those on the far-right who would rather rewrite the history of slavery and segregation in this country — **and this ad demonstrates just how hard John is working to stand up to their malicious attacks.**

I’ve also seen how John inspires Marylanders across the state when he shares how just three generations later, John went on to serve in the cabinet of our nation’s first Black president.

**This moving story of progress fuels so much of what my husband does – from advocating for equity to making sure opportunity exists for more than just those at the top — and I know it will fuel his plans to prioritize equity in everything he does as governor.** That’s why it’s so essential that we support John now and make sure this ad has as much of an impact as possible: voters across this state need to hear John’s truth and know why it matters now.

[_**We only have a few more days to power our outreach efforts, and we’re still short of the $30,000 we need to do it effectively. clean_body: This moving story of progress fuels so much of what my husband does. | = Peter, This week, my husband and his campaign launched a new ad sharing John’s extraordinary family story and his vision for the future of Maryland – and he needs your support to make the biggest impact possible. = | = I’ve seen firsthand how John’s story and ancestral history of enslavement less than 25 miles from where our family lives now can serve as a starting point for complex but necessary conversations about the challenges we face today. Acknowledging past injustices is essential to our progress as a state, but there are those on the far-right who would rather rewrite the history of slavery and segregation in this country — and this ad demonstrates just how hard John is working to stand up to their malicious attacks. I’ve also seen how John inspires Marylanders across the state when he shares how just three generations later, John went on to serve in the cabinet of our nation’s first Black president. This moving story of progress fuels so much of what my husband does – from advocating for equity to making sure opportunity exists for more than just those at the top — and I know it will fuel his plans to prioritize equity in everything he does as governor. That’s why it’s so essential that we support John now and make sure this ad has as much of an impact as possible: voters across this state need to hear John’s truth and know why it matters now. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Grateful as always, Melissa King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . Dr. Caraveo is no stranger to tough battles, Peter.

As a first-generation American, being the first in her family to graduate from college was no easy feat, but she didn’t give up. She went on to graduate from medical school and become a pediatrician.

In the State House, she fought uphill battles to deliver guaranteed paid leave for every single Coloradan, lower the costs of prescription drugs, protect renters from eviction during the pandemic, and so much more.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39505180/320141229/1424041718?amount=25&refcode=ea.1f4e9bee-1b59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.1f4e9bee-1b59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjRlOWJlZS0xYjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0O4C4R04CnLa1LdOOEQNPJDmRmuWqbnu2i66Cl2tHwo=)

Colorado extremists will stop at nothing to win CO-08 and the House majority. They want to cater to special interests and their powerful pals back in Washington, but Colorado families deserve better.

**** ¡Buenos días! Mi nombre es Gabe Vasquez, y soy un orgulloso hijo de inmigrantes. Estoy postulándome para el Congreso en el sur de Nuevo México. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39505452/320142477/1497075507?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211209_GV_full_SLB_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjEyYzBkYi0xZDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H82JbDeJWIMSv5UAn43B6tbvsas-LZMV1xEWUCb7do0=)
---
Mi familia es de Juchipila, Zacatecas y Cd. Juárez, Chihuahua, lugares que han formado mi carácter e identidad. La mayor parte de mi familia todavía vive en México, desde Chihuahua hasta Sonora. Somos una familia binacional y bilingue.
Me postulo para el Congreso para asegurar que las familias y personas trabajadoras sean respetadas y valoradas. Me postulo para asegurarnos de que podamos tener acceso a atención médica de alta calidad, cuidado infantil asequible, salarios dignos y para mantener vivo el Sueño Americano.
He visto a mi madre trabajar duro toda mi vida, y por todo lo que tiene. Me ha inspirado a ayudar a mi comunidad. Hoy, les pido su apoyo y su ayuda para ser elegido al Congreso, donde voy a promover la reforma migratoria, ayudaré a combatir el cambio climático y me aseguraré de que nuestra próxima generación pueda prosperar en este estado que tanto queremos.
[**Pido humildemente su apoyo y los invito a unirse a nuestra campaña y ayudarme a llegar al Congreso.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39505453/320142478/1497075507?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211209_GV_full_SLB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjEyYzBkYi0xZDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H82JbDeJWIMSv5UAn43B6tbvsas-LZMV1xEWUCb7do0=)
Con respeto y gratitud,
Gabe Vasquez

Good morning!
My name is Gabe Vasquez, and I am a proud son of immigrants, running for Congress in southern New Mexico.
My family is from Juchipila, Zacatecas, and Cd. Juarez, Chihuahua, places that have helped me build my character and identity. Most of my family still resides in Mexico - from Chihuahua to Sonora.
I am running for Congress to ensure that working families are respected and valued. I am running to ensure that we can have access to high-quality healthcare, affordable childcare, living wages, and to keep the American Dream alive.
I've watched my mother work hard for everything she has, and she has inspired me to give back to my community. Today, I ask for your support and your help to get elected to Congress, where I will champion immigration reform, help combat climate change, and make sure that our next generation can thrive.
**[I humbly ask for your support and invite you to join our campaign and help get me to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39505455/320142480/1497075507?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211209_GV_full_SLB_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjEyYzBkYi0xZDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H82JbDeJWIMSv5UAn43B6tbvsas-LZMV1xEWUCb7do0=)**
With respect and gratitude,
Gabe Vasquez

clean_body: | = ** ¡Buenos días! Mi nombre es Gabe Vasquez, y soy un orgulloso hijo de inmigrantes. Estoy postulándome para el Congreso en el sur de Nuevo México. | = Mi familia es de Juchipila, Zacatecas y Cd. Juárez, Chihuahua, lugares que han formado mi carácter e identidad. La mayor parte de mi familia todavía vive en México, desde Chihuahua hasta Sonora. Somos una familia binacional y bilingue. Me postulo para el Congreso para asegurar que las familias y personas trabajadoras sean respetadas y valoradas. Me postulo para asegurarnos de que podamos tener acceso a atención médica de alta calidad, cuidado infantil asequible, salarios dignos y para mantener vivo el Sueño Americano. He visto a mi madre trabajar duro toda mi vida, y por todo lo que tiene. Me ha inspirado a ayudar a mi comunidad. Hoy, les pido su apoyo y su ayuda para ser elegido al Congreso, donde voy a promover la reforma migratoria, ayudaré a combatir el cambio climático y me aseguraré de que nuestra próxima generación pueda prosperar en este estado que tanto queremos. = Con respeto y gratitud, Gabe Vasquez PS — ¿Quiere recibir correos electrónicos en español? \---- Good morning! My name is Gabe Vasquez, and I am a proud son of immigrants, running for Congress in southern New Mexico. My family is from Juchipila, Zacatecas, and Cd. Juarez, Chihuahua, places that have helped me build my character and identity. Most of my family still resides in Mexico - from Chihuahua to Sonora. I am running for Congress to ensure that working families are respected and valued. I am running to ensure that we can have access to high-quality healthcare, affordable childcare, living wages, and to keep the American Dream alive. I've watched my mother work hard for everything she has, and she has inspired me to give back to my community. Today, I ask for your support and your help to get elected to Congress, where I will champion immigration reform, help combat climate change, and make sure that our next generation can thrive. = With respect and gratitude, Gabe Vasquez PS — Do you want to receive emails in Spanish? ** | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of southern New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

I have a big announcement for you, friend. **Today, I’d like to introduce you to my running mate and choice for Lieutenant Governor of Maryland: Aruna Miller.** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39506869/320149372/1512802716?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211209wes-announcement_wm_60da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2M0ZmZlZC0yMjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cv-2tm6LvyIkogoLLY7OSo2oqznJ0QaM4gxOTQ8Yyw0=)

This campaign isn’t about simply talking about big, bold ideas, but building the right team ready to execute them and get things done on Day 1 in office.
In Aruna, I’ve found a partner, an experienced and principled legislator, a civil and transportation engineer, and a leader whose background and immigrant story not only forms a historic ticket – but reflects the beautiful diversity of Maryland.
**[Before I tell you more about Aruna, will you pitch in $10 or more right now to support our ticket?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39506872/320149376/1512802716?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211209wes-announcement_wm_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2M0ZmZlZC0yMjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cv-2tm6LvyIkogoLLY7OSo2oqznJ0QaM4gxOTQ8Yyw0=)**

clean_body: HEAR THE AUDIO: this Democrat verbally assaulted me Despite hatred and vitriol from the far Left, I will never stop fighting for the things I believe in and standing up for our conservative values. We should never allow a small, radical minority to silence discussion. | Fellow Conservative, I knew that when I decided to run for public office, I would have my life scrutinized and that personal attacks come with the territory. However, I have to admit, I was shocked to receive this vicious voicemail from a member of the Democrat Party who preach “tolerance” and “feminism for all.” HEAR THE AUDIO: Warning - Graphic Language 2 I have spent my life fighting tough battles. I’m a working mom with three children. I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school. I’m a practicing attorney who donates her time fighting for the underdog and taking on tough cases. As a conservative woman, I dare to have my own views, I defy what is expected of me from the Democrat Party and step out of line to express my conservative values. That terrifies the Left, which is why they turn to insults and verbal assault. I am a strong conservative woman and these comments cannot harm me. What concerns me is that there are people out there that think these attacks are okay because I dare to be a conservative... I am proud to think for myself and I am proud to be a Republican. Every American was born with the God-given right of freedom of thought. I will not tolerate the hateful attacks from the left, simply because I dare to stand up for our conservative values and the freedoms we are guaranteed as Americans. Now, I need your help to bring this fight straight to Washington, as Nevada’s next female Republican congresswoman. Thank you, April Becker Republican for Congress (NV-03) | April Becker is a true Nevada success story. As a working mom with young children, April put herself through college and law school at UNLV. April is the owner of April Becker & Associates law firm and is a top-rated litigator and real estate attorney in Las Vegas. A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, April is the key to flipping a target district in the swing state of Nevada, ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid For By Becker for Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Rod Dorilas
subject: Do you still believe in the American Dream?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
I'm hoping you'll take a moment to watch my campaign introduction video this morning. It would be a great honor to me if you would. |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.electroddorilas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_s=f51b14f0c65c4b2796d90bb9209af35e&_t=xIZ-th1b47l-R9IZTSROzBxwnQRqfWBpK8gmH_37JCRSgxEiHSeB7Aqzf_22tYqxHNYewOj1XQTPdwyMej4gLkSf_C0kYUh3NMmCfQ5GANhxfLxobXwqV5f_6RSDYUGsh0dWU_3WpjQWuuFraS9TK2EUReuQBMMyk9qdhoIDzFM%3D).

[](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=f51b14f0c65c4b2796d90bb9209af35e&_e=W-L1HxOBZJGkXFXkNKWOfD7cru6LgtXfzjUzxnSI5pvfK1RN_AxbWOqES2BhQqeWGbn-R8xDx8unfkHLfRtyJUPa8f7f4xPswXxt8sanKnmTmWmxRSC-H5xaFFRL5kQQ1l2xSSVppx7D6jWJfTXDNsNpJ28eY48AVed9U4TRjhYI48ucNoZX49eIh456W4zatBbhwGiYR_0N_7yTSFCkzY8jwmcCvqRL5UckK81QA54435U27sIUY9HLVGJdaxXhckVBH3wFN84vNe2EyP8EDjBxfZc4NrZ0fgTiFYRVMsuDu45HUJpIkQrwegp0bFmyuZv1wD1Tu0shV9W23zFwzBWIh15BGaXjfFU3CrQPLLsOzZyItXZbAZckx1MSiLJKNYSVhen1KouvHLJ3tYWWbAtSByA2smbINElSDhH7s_JQdB3BArKx-sA67EK-5I3ZiGPGdWcFypFoGka3jWzJXY9_yQHjbLEB3vQ5mdlS_Ko%3D)

---
Fellow American,

My name is Rod Dorilás and I’m a candidate for Congress in Florida’s 21st Congressional District.

My opponent isn’t too terribly famous or even a household name. But she’s a Democrat who I’m not convinced still believes that the American Dream is alive.

**[Please take a second to watch my introduction video that I recorded several months ago and believe is worth the watch](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=f51b14f0c65c4b2796d90bb9209af35e&_e=W-L1HxOBZJGkXFXkNKWOfD7cru6LgtXfzjUzxnSI5pvfK1RN_AxbWOqES2BhQqeWGbn-R8xDx8unfkHLfRtyJUPa8f7f4xPswXxt8sanKnmTmWmxRSC-H5xaFFRL5kQQ1l2xSSVppx7D6jWJfTXDNsNpJ28eY48AVed9U4TRjhYI48ucNoZX49eIh456W4zatBbhwGiYR_0N_7yTSFCkzY8jwmcCvqRL5UckK81QA54435U27sIUY9HLVGJdaxXhEX-DophVs3D85nJuK8Meq6KYFc4BK_PQmKYduodfxeikTYzMbW3WcZqSbA7VlruOvXezpREyzueG4VF95FZV-uf0TsGXlV69B8cDw0inTbYDE-XMmWvh82bDRH-LZYDtG4QMHjCqU_UrIV6KaFBKZSc6P49LCj_J92VL71bwPzy8z1xEJmPmTBDyjO4hMlAhiBBP6EqqvR41nAC4Uk0LhQURl2QJ8VB8VLqh5Ep1xIw%3D)**.

[**WATCH MY LAUNCH VIDEO >> **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=f51b14f0c65c4b2796d90bb9209af35e&_e=W-L1HxOBZJGkXFXkNKWOfD7cru6LgtXfzjUzxnSI5pvfK1RN_AxbWOqES2BhQqeWGbn-R8xDx8unfkHLfRtyJUPa8f7f4xPswXxt8sanKnmTmWmxRSC-H5xaFFRL5kQQ1l2xSSVppx7D6jWJfTXDNsNpJ28eY48AVed9U4TRjhYI48ucNoZX49eIh456W4zatBbhwGiYR_0N_7yTSFCkzY8jwmcCvqRL5UckK81QA54435U27sIUY9HLVGJdaxXhbaLWtqCEpd3MZjBEWPYiLXBuhwltp3h04cWDLpQKmCbPJ2XvyLPpTPirwkJEMMVyj-Pp8HuS6S1CM543x9WKcqem-f2P6T6CBuIrSyUBsdBM8z5Ck788vOXo864qfXnemwlENMgjeQpbLMeQioYT4yHzeAAI3Ewk3G2tQQCk6ESPIJYyvJLpR0pJh5lI-oxtu63Xy_Ri2H-BlLySNpd76_YxNzPi6jyucSlpujnxAAo%3D)
A few key facts about myself that you may find informative:
* I’m a first generation American, the son of two Haitian immigrants. **My parents immigrated to the United States to pick crops** in order to provide for our family.
* At 17, I enlisted in the Navy and served six years planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles.
* I attended Syracuse University Law School on the G.I. Bill.
* Following graduation, **I worked for the Department of Commerce under President Trump** (the honor of a lifetime!).

[**SUPPORT A BLACK
TRUMP REPUBLICAN FOR CONGRESS>> **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=f51b14f0c65c4b2796d90bb9209af35e&_e=W-L1HxOBZJGkXFXkNKWOfD7cru6LgtXfzjUzxnSI5pvfK1RN_AxbWOqES2BhQqeWGbn-R8xDx8unfkHLfRtyJUPa8f7f4xPswXxt8sanKnmTmWmxRSC-H5xaFFRL5kQQ1l2xSSVppx7D6jWJfTXDNsNpJ28eY48AVed9U4TRjhYI48ucNoZX49eIh456W4zatBbhwGiYR_0N_7yTSFCkzY8jwmcCvqRL5UckK81QA54435U27sIUY9HLVGJdaxXhmqXZRPnSa7Lo_0RvduN6vNbi45ZSdH6F-XJgr9vV2O1Mc6gzE6AzscDIXotKym8vHdHO9eKff259p5dg7_HctppQMo5RPkYSG-IF8CCZMEfqdkm9uoCEZnNrX_-UgLXRyLfHCPRh8AcyBB_0gRznCMDukAF41vWgK1MRDXHzfYL7nJs7kd2jIuCek33-4MJCqU6BE4MsAYU0pmW0Meum5FLFXLjIjUIMTESM4h0CXDU%3D)
**With 435 members, the U.S. House is bigger than any one person**. However, my own personal story has taught me that just about anything in America is possible if you work hard enough. I believe that maxim still rings true today, and that’s why I’m asking you to send a few dollars to my campaign if you can.

For Country,

Rod Dorilás

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=f51b14f0c65c4b2796d90bb9209af35e&_e=W-L1HxOBZJGkXFXkNKWOfD7cru6LgtXfzjUzxnSI5pvfK1RN_AxbWOqES2BhQqeWGbn-R8xDx8unfkHLfRtyJUPa8f7f4xPswXxt8sanKnmTmWmxRSC-H5xaFFRL5kQQ1l2xSSVppx7D6jWJfTXDNsNpJ28eY48AVed9U4TRjhYI48ucNoZX49eIh456W4zatBbhwGiYR_0N_7yTSFCkzY8jwmcCvqRL5UckK81QA54435U27sIUY9HLVGJdaxXheuaGGgNUdxxZPOTYkcegLhT0zHwmkkk79g6HWKE5rN4i5d993yqrEj0M2OPHsq5RJzspFBbkGY_yai3iKRcI8Wm1lQUN4sl2o8lEAAUW-KpD87pwiwHEPSsjIPWJcCNHnMTDhVrOstkSkFlrrVesLtcyyBYf9JWOgAeSQZt0q5UJ_fRprOPufc4fUGU1eu7ZwzJV16EJaxUlAEuoy5tFl6xMes7wbZ6NeyxVMUxN4B4%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=f51b14f0c65c4b2796d90bb9209af35e&_e=W-L1HxOBZJGkXFXkNKWOfD7cru6LgtXfzjUzxnSI5pvfK1RN_AxbWOqES2BhQqeWGbn-R8xDx8unfkHLfRtyJUPa8f7f4xPswXxt8sanKnmTmWmxRSC-H5xaFFRL5kQQ1l2xSSVppx7D6jWJfTXDNsNpJ28eY48AVed9U4TRjhYI48ucNoZX49eIh456W4zatBbhwGiYR_0N_7yTSFCkzY8jwmcCvqRL5UckK81QA54435U27sIUY9HLVGJdaxXhU957v14ZHIezs3i918eEDOoq1H4RZeCznh7p8pOGXtGRAD-dCGABk-zSu1somT0HdIKVuYHRurSjM0AjqCEgxm4qhh3vjR0wEsTPG5BFLrwdS4vuWH6hJd0UtlZdR7T_uc1qOiOXmNPcNAOYeOYIZD-TPzdO9egLkgbgT3-SgRUezNffFdKaBf96DpwhwcCbLgsJEXbCIGqpAcNxHxfpidN7UbIcPW6J9XxLGd0W5Fs%3D)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.electroddorilas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_s=f51b14f0c65c4b2796d90bb9209af35e&_t=xIZ-th1b47l-R9IZTSROzBxwnQRqfWBpK8gmH_37JCRSgxEiHSeB7Aqzf_22tYqxHNYewOj1XQTPdwyMej4gLkSf_C0kYUh3NMmCfQ5GANhxfLxobXwqV5f_6RSDYUGsh0dWU_3WpjQWuuFraS9TK2EUReuQBMMyk9qdhoIDzFM%3D).

subject: New York City is just the first to do it

body:
You know I’m right

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zujbbthvevrqd02cfd61hi8rosipir8iav2ufvqo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1jm6ob6c5h2bs)
---

Friend,

**I hate to see New York City under Socialist control. Seeing Mayor Bill de Blasio announced the first vaccine mandate for private companies makes me sick to my stomach for the good people of the Big Apple.**

These measures are Draconian, and that’s putting it lightly. People should NOT have to choose between their jobs and their freedom. As an American, you shouldn’t have to choose one or the other. That’s why as conservatives, we’ve got to band together to stop the Socialist Agenda. It’s starting in New York, but if we don’t Take Back the Senate in 2022, then we’ll see mandates across the board.

**Help me fight for FREEDOM._Help me fight for YOU._**

subject: MAJOR update about Biden’s vaccine mandate
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
96https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/stop-mandat
es-defeat-warnock-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20
21dec9hf Friend — Last night, the U.S. Senate took a vote on
defunding enforcement of Joe Biden’s vaccine mandate for businesses and
workers.

Raphael Warnock voted to fund and enforce this unlawful
mandate.

I SUED Joe Biden to stop the mandate for federal
contractors and WON — a federal judge issued a nationwide injunction
halting the mandate on Tuesday. And I’ll never support this kind of
tyrannical overreach in the U.S. Senate.

If you ask me, that’s as
clear of a contrast as it gets.

|
ATLANTA, GA -- Yesterday, former Navy SEAL and Republican candidate for U.S. Senate Latham Saddler was joined by over 100 supporters for the launch of his Women for Latham coalition in Cobb County. The event was headlined by Star Parker, conservative activist, columnist, and founder of the Center for Urban Renewal and Education.

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Republican U.S. Senate Challenger Lahmeyer Would Ban Federal Money For Schools Teaching CRT
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Lahmeyer for Senate
body:
| |
---
[](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=vv3zx0h6q5myfkr63&linkid=0&link=41b3e8f168cc4df5b54b8c1818f993a3)
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Deember 9, 2021
**REPUBLICAN U.S. SENATE CHALLENGER LAHMEYER WOULD BAN FEDERAL MONEY FOR SCHOOLS TEACHING CRT** Insurgent Republican U.S. Senate Challenger, [Jackson Lahmeyer](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=vv3zx0h6q5myfkr63&linkid=1&link=229a0cb8a56746bf88a3720431540295), who is taking on veteran Washington legislator James Lankford for the 2022 Republican Senate nomination, announced today that as his first official act immediately after being sworn in, he will introduce legislation preventing any taxpayer funding to be disbursed to any school district where CRT is being taught. "_In the course of my grassroots campaign, the number of parents who are disturbed and angry about this radical teaching permeating our public and private schools, that erases our heritage and cancels our culture while insisting anyone who disagrees with it is a racist, is overwhelming. I share their concerns and opposition to this vile and hateful narrative which radicals extremists are using in an attempt to redefine our history, erasing our allegiance and faith in God ",_ said Lahmeyer. "_I know that veteran Washington insider James Lankford has neither said or done anything to address the rise of this alarming policy being pushed by radical educators_ ," explained Lahmeyer, a veteran pastor and businessman making his first run for public office. Lahmeyer's grassroots campaign has been endorsed by the Oklahoma State Party Chairman John Bennet, former National Security Advisor Michael Flynn, and veteran GOP strategist and political icon Roger Stone. Lahmeyer has raised over $500k from over four thousand patriots, "_In order to save time, and in anticipation of GOP majorities in both houses in 2022, I will immediately identify a currently serving member of the US House to co-sponsor this legislation._ " Lahmeyer recently reiterated his call for at least one debate with Senator Lankford before the 2022 Republican primary, which he issued at a press conference with Roger Stone. "_Senator Lankford owes it to the people of Oklahoma to stand toe to toe with me to explain his record. A refusal to do so is a direct and purposeful insult to the Republican voters of Oklahoma,_ " Lahmeyer concluded. # # # [www.JacksonLahmeyer.com](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=vv3zx0h6q5myfkr63&linkid=2&link=df6024d80d584ade9b29cb620f7f97cf) Contributions to the Jackson Lahmeyer Senate campaign can be made [HERE](https://100726.trk.directiq13.com/hit?sid=vv3zx0h6q5myfkr63&linkid=3&link=889b37e493c14e698dfb5ce8be084e07), but If you are more comfortable mailing a check than utilizing a credit card, please make your check payable to "Lahmeyer for Senate" and mail it to 3939 S. Harvard Ave, Ste 140, Tulsa, Oklahoma 74135. God Bless You. Paid for and Authorized by Lahmeyer for Senate
---

clean_body: We can't believe this!! - = Team, Marjorie Taylor Greene joined Steve Bannon’s conspiracy-obsessed podcast yesterday to attack mainstream Republican Senators over their alleged “support” for Joe Biden because they voted for the funding of roads and bridges with the infrastructure bill. She went on to attack the GOP as the “uniparty” and claimed they were trying to start a nuclear war with Russia. Here’s the bottom line: Marjorie Taylor Greene is a radical right-wing reactionary whose only goal is to start fights with everyone so she can draw attention from the media. She is an opportunist, a bigot, and a liar. And she doesn’t represent Georgians. In 2020, Marjorie Taylor Greene ran unopposed for her seat in Congress. That won’t be the case in 2022. Marcus Flowers is presenting an alternative -- a true public servant who wants to represent the interests of the people of northwest Georgia. = | = Any member of Congress who spends their time spouting conspiracy theories on Steve Bannon’s podcast isn’t worthy of the office they hold. It’s time she’s held accountable for her actions. Thanks for your support, Stop QAnon via Team Flowers for Congress Marcus Flowers is a Democrat running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. As an Army Veteran, Marcus understands the true meaning of service and patriotism and will work tirelessly to defeat the hatred of the alt-right. This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible. | = **** **** ****** ** ** **** Paid for by Marcus for Georgia Marcus for Georgia PO Box 725 Bremen, GA 30110 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . ********=**

body:

Peter –– these days, Marjorie Taylor Greene is being called the “Absent Representative." She's everywhere to be seen except in her own district, listening to voters.
Marge is spending her time getting kicked off committees, hanging around with Matt Gaetz, and defending the insurrectionists that threatened the lives of her colleagues. All while avoiding the kitchen table issues at hand.
Northwest Georgians need leadership that is willing to work hard on the issues and spend time listening to the interests of the people. Marjorie Taylor Greene has shown time and time again that she is not able to do that.
From day one, my campaign has been fueled by listening to the people and being inside the community. There will never be a question of who I represent — that answer will always be the people of GA-14.
If you believe we deserve better in 2022, chip in $20.22 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em1209] Your support directly funds our in-district efforts.
Together - we will win,
Holly McCormack.

| | Peter -

**The Michigan Democratic Party has once again leveled an attack on our campaign for Governor.**

Take a look at what they're running with now👇-[ click here to read their full statement.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=88a868940e&e=fe4b890356)

---
| **I just happen to be "glossing over my extremism" when talking about my business experience and our positive vision for Michigan's future.**

__Democrats can't defend Whitmer's devastating blows to Michigan's economy, so they resort to their typical playbook_ _-**attack any American who stands against their fake narrative.**__

If you want secure elections and voter ID, **they call you an extremist.**

If you recognize natural immunity and encourage healthy living, **they call you an extremist.**

If you believe parents should have a say in their child's education, **they call you an extremist.**

Just last week, a Michigan community was traumatized by a school shooting that took multiple lives, and hurt the hearts of many.

| Friends,

Just last week, a Michigan community was traumatized by a school shooting that took multiple lives, and hurt the hearts of many.

But while the full scope of this tragedy was unfolding, NRA-endorsed Nancy Mace wasn’t using her platform in Congress to propose legislation to stop further school shootings — instead, she was picking immature fights on Twitter with her colleagues.

[I believe we need real action to prevent gun violence. Join me in calling on Congress to take action to keep our children, friends, and families safe →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39509175/320162857/-1844896122?refcode=AA_EM_PT_1MO_211209_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=KvQl9fa35UgIWMjgBrszsAytDnNTGGTFLrakxBodlySipSVZ04ApL%2B69eM8coE1G&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTVmM2RjYy0yZTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCnlSWIgeOTrAuWzDuhDF2k7saakzyKh6cR6jvMXqYE=&emci=c2bccfbe-2459-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=295f3dcc-2e59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6125529)

**Gun violence is now the #1 cause of death among children in America.**

The tragedy at Oxford High School shows how many steps we could be taking to prevent more violence. From secure storage laws to expanded background checks, we can and must do more.

As a pediatrician, I’ve treated multiple pediatric gunshot victims and seen firsthand how traumatizing and horrifying gun violence is to our current and future generations. As a mom, I have heard the fear in my own children’s voices when they describe lockdown drills. We need our elected officials to take action _now_.

[Sign on today if you agree we need to protect our schools, churches, and communities from gun violence →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39509178/320162860/-1844896122?refcode=AA_EM_PT_1MO_211209_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=KvQl9fa35UgIWMjgBrszsAytDnNTGGTFLrakxBodlySipSVZ04ApL%2B69eM8coE1G&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTVmM2RjYy0yZTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCnlSWIgeOTrAuWzDuhDF2k7saakzyKh6cR6jvMXqYE=&emci=c2bccfbe-2459-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=295f3dcc-2e59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6125529)

Thank you,

Annie

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Need your input
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hey,

We’re building a grassroots coalition — powered by people like you — to
send Erica to Congress.

As we ramp up our outreach efforts, we wanted to take a moment to send a
survey to our supporters to hear more about your priorities. Your input
will help us focus on the issues you care about and what our communities
are facing right now.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-20211209-survey/?source=em20211209-670&t=1001&akid=670%2E3698%2E0fl2kC ]Will you take our short survey to share your priorities for this
campaign directly with Erica? It will only take a few minutes.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-20211209-survey/?source=em20211209-670&t=1002&akid=670%2E3698%2E0fl2kC ]TAKE THE SURVEY

Erica is running to represent everyday, working-class people in Congress —
not the corporate monopolies that have hollowed out NC-02 and rural
communities across the country.

We don’t take a dime from corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry
because we’re working on delivering this seat to the people. That starts
with hearing from you to
help us drive our message forward.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/em-20211209-survey/?source=em20211209-670&t=1003&akid=670%2E3698%2E0fl2kC ]So, can you take just a few minutes to complete our survey and help us
understand which issues are most important to our supporters right now?

Thank you for being part of our team and helping us build the most
powerful campaign possible.

— Team Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211209-670-footer&t=1004&refcode2=670_3698_0fl2kC&akid=670%2E3698%2E0fl2kC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=670%2E3698%2E0fl2kC

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

body:
| | |
---
| **BREAKING: One Nation, a McConnell-linked super PAC, just placed a massive ad buy in New Hampshire in an attempt to smear Maggie's record and flip the Senate red.**

| [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39510008/320165178/-913685435?refcode=e20211209_onenation&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzgwMTJkNS0zMDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fNlUd7zgFHHi5MoSb4nVtXuN7YlcYzov0HKTScr5nvE=)
