[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39510053/320165419/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2QzODZlMy0zMDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uohNnBF0yF4UriXDSuwV32b2YY-Y2dGDvlsNyDUSXKM=&emci=93669a55-4358-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=13d386e3-3059-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

While many families are still recovering from the impacts of COVID, our communities need support now more than ever. That's why passing the Build Back Better Act is critical.

Here are some of the most important parts of _the Build Back Better Act:_
1. $555 billion to fight climate change;
2. Universal Paid Family and Medical Leave;
3. Health care reform including a cap on drugs like insulin;
4. Universal pre-k, child care tax credits, and so much more.

This bill is just commonsense -- but that didn't stop Mike Garcia from voting against it just last week. But we won't let him stand in the way of progress.

**We need to urge the Senate to pass this piece of critical legislation -- the people of CA-25 can't wait for help any longer.**

**[Will you join us and sign your name in support of the Build Back Better Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39510054/320165420/-2095656807?ms=em21_211209_bbb&refcode=em21_211209_bbb&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2QzODZlMy0zMDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uohNnBF0yF4UriXDSuwV32b2YY-Y2dGDvlsNyDUSXKM=&emci=93669a55-4358-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=13d386e3-3059-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=11385749)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39510055/320165421/-2095656807?ms=em21_211209_bbb&refcode=em21_211209_bbb&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2QzODZlMy0zMDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uohNnBF0yF4UriXDSuwV32b2YY-Y2dGDvlsNyDUSXKM=&emci=93669a55-4358-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=13d386e3-3059-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=11385749) The Build Back Better Act is with the Senate and it looks like it will be voted on before we start the holidays.

**There should be nothing partisan about ensuring that every American citizen has the appropriate resources.** And even though Mike Garcia knows this bill would benefit thousands of his own constituents, he still voted against it.

**For far too long, basic and necessary reforms have been overlooked. In the meantime, Republicans, like Mike, have manipulated and halted changing the lives of working families right here in CA-25.**

**[It's time for the Senate to get to work and vote on this piece of critical legislation. # **Be Merry with Marc while Making a Difference!**
---
---
**Join us as we celebrate the spirit of Christmas with our Holiday Fundraiser and Gift Drive!**

We will meet and mingle together in merriment with Superintendent and Candidate for Governor Marc Thielman and his wife Brenda as Marc shares key updates on Oregon issues and how ‘we the people’ push back, alongside some inspiring messages you won’t want to miss at Along Came Trudy’s, a fantastic and festive freedom-loving venue that, like Marc and the Alsea School District, fought to stay open against closure mandates last year and continues to stand strong in the face of tyranny to serve the community.

This event is taking place on **Tuesday, December 21st, from 6:00-8:30 PM** and includes delicious and filling appetizer and dessert buffets, with gluten-free options throughout.
---

**Tickets are limited and cost $45 for a single ticket, or $75 per couple/pair of tickets.** Registration is required in advance. Tickets include both appetizer and dessert buffets.

A no-host bar will also be available. We will also gather a collection of unwrapped toys and basic goods together to bring to a local charity during this great time of need as we prepare to celebrate Christmas with loved ones near and far.

The event will also feature a variety of hand-picked items in a silent auction as well, in time for some special holiday gifts as an additional way to support the campaign!

Marc will share in a discussion about his personal and professional background, political leanings, policy concepts and how he has again been successful recently at fighting directly against Governor Brown and radical leftist ideologies.

His presentation will be followed by a live question and answer session where you can ask your direct questions and get direct and honest responses!

clean_body: | | | | Join us as we celebrate the spirit of Christmas with our Holiday Fundraiser and Gift Drive! Be Merry with Marc while Making a Difference! Join us as we celebrate the spirit of Christmas with our Holiday Fundraiser and Gift Drive! We will meet and mingle together in merriment with Superintendent and Candidate for Governor Marc Thielman and his wife Brenda as Marc shares key updates on Oregon issues and how ‘we the people’ push back, alongside some inspiring messages you won’t want to miss at Along Came Trudy’s, a fantastic and festive freedom-loving venue that, like Marc and the Alsea School District, fought to stay open against closure mandates last year and continues to stand strong in the face of tyranny to serve the community. This event is taking place on Tuesday, December 21st, from 6:00-8:30 PM and includes delicious and filling appetizer and dessert buffets, with gluten-free options throughout. | Tickets are limited and cost $45 for a single ticket, or $75 per couple/pair of tickets. Registration is required in advance. Tickets include both appetizer and dessert buffets. A no-host bar will also be available. We will also gather a collection of unwrapped toys and basic goods together to bring to a local charity during this great time of need as we prepare to celebrate Christmas with loved ones near and far. The event will also feature a variety of hand-picked items in a silent auction as well, in time for some special holiday gifts as an additional way to support the campaign! Marc will share in a discussion about his personal and professional background, political leanings, policy concepts and how he has again been successful recently at fighting directly against Governor Brown and radical leftist ideologies. His presentation will be followed by a live question and answer session where you can ask your direct questions and get direct and honest responses! | Beautiful Appetizer & Dessert Buffets Merry & Mingle with Superintendent Marc Thielman Hear Important Oregon Updates Followed by Live Q & A Great Gifts available in Silent Auction Learn How You Can Help Fight for Oregon! Hosted at Along Came Trudy’s All Ages GIFT Drive for Oregon Families in Need Tuesday, 12/21/20216:00-8:30 PM Along Came Trudy 1488 18th St Springfield, OR 97477** | | Not able to attend our event and still want to support Marc's campaign? Please consider making a contribution. | Thank You! | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM_ PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 949, Bandon, 97411

body:
North Carolinians won’t stand for this blatant partisanship. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39510090/320165622/823540626?refcode=ea.8705872e-3159-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.8705872e-3159-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzA1ODcyZS0zMTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3nl7FBzUiwMF2YcBX5jKqEMjqRoME9Ok6YyjPxQDU7I=&emci=72e945a4-2f59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=8705872e-3159-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)
| **_BREAKING REDISTRICTING UPDATE:_** **North Carolina’s Supreme Court HALTS Candidate Filing and POSTPONES 2022 Primaries**
---
We already knew the GOP’s legislative maps weren’t fair, Peter.
That’s why the Princeton Gerrymandering Project gave them an **F RATING** for partisanship.
Now, the NC Supreme Court has halted candidate filing under the GOP’s district lines and pushed back our primaries by more than a month while the lower courts review the maps.
**This is a Big. Deal.** The North Carolina Supreme Court has restored faith in the rule of law and must rule on the constitutionality of these unfair districts before the next election.

name: Tammy Duckworth
subject: Will you chip in to help re-elect my friend Mark Kelly?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
This is how we protect and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate.
#

Friends,
In just a moment, I’m going to explain why it’s so important that you split a contribution between my campaign and Mark Kelly’s. [**But if you’re already prepared to chip in, you can do that here.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-duckworth-dec21?refcode=em211209-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1771_6688874_wFfa_5&akid=1771%2E6688874%2EwFfa_5)
Mark’s seat is already a top target for Mitch McConnell and National Republicans in 2022. And if he doesn’t win re-election, it will be very difficult for Democrats to hold the Senate.
We can protect Mark’s seat, and mine, if supporters like you chip in early to help us build winning campaigns. So, I am reaching out today to ask for your support:
**Can you split a donation between my campaign and Mark Kelly today to help us defend our seats in the Senate? Any amount you can give will go a long way.**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will automatically be evenly split between Tammy Duckworth and Mark Kelly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-duckworth-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211209-1-15&t=20&refcode2=1771_6688874_wFfa_5&akid=1771%2E6688874%2EwFfa_5)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-duckworth-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em211209-1-15&t=21&refcode2=1771_6688874_wFfa_5&akid=1771%2E6688874%2EwFfa_5)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-duckworth-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211209-1-15&t=22&refcode2=1771_6688874_wFfa_5&akid=1771%2E6688874%2EwFfa_5)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-duckworth-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211209-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1771_6688874_wFfa_5&akid=1771%2E6688874%2EwFfa_5)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-duckworth-dec21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211209-1-15&t=24&refcode2=1771_6688874_wFfa_5&akid=1771%2E6688874%2EwFfa_5)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-duckworth-dec21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211209-1-15&t=25&refcode2=1771_6688874_wFfa_5&akid=1771%2E6688874%2EwFfa_5)**
---
****
Mark also served our country in uniform, so he is an important partner in my work to support our servicemembers and Veterans.
But it will be very difficult for us to make headway on this issue if Mark and I don’t win re-election and the Senate falls back into Mitch McConnell’s hands. [**So, please, make a contribution of $5, or whatever you can afford, before you go.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-duckworth-dec21?refcode=em211209-1-15&t=26&refcode2=1771_6688874_wFfa_5&akid=1771%2E6688874%2EwFfa_5)
Thank you for reading, and thank you for your support. It truly means a lot to both Mark and me.
All my best,
Tammy Duckworth
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-duckworth-dec21?refcode=em211209-1-15&t=27&refcode2=1771_6688874_wFfa_5&akid=1771%2E6688874%2EwFfa_5)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=1771%2E6688874%2EwFfa_5).

subject: Congress of Counties Registration Now Open!
body:
Congress of Counties returns in 2022! Registration is now open for this two-day Republican training event! Congress... |
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d276f85228&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican -

Registration for Congress of Counties 2022 is [now open](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a593d3c994&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

**This two-day training event for Republican Party leaders, candidates and grassroots activists is scheduled for February 25-26 at the historic[French Lick Resort](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=665bd68822&e=1acd9bb3d6).**
[\--> Register Now!<\-- ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b87fd526e5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
You'll want to experience Congress of Counties next year to kick-off 2022’s election season, meet Indiana’s top Republican elected officials, and learn more about critical election topics like:
* Candidate recruitment
* Fundraising
* Communications and social media
* Technology
* And so much more to be announced soon!

The training provided at Congress of Counties is the training you’ll need to WIN elections throughout Indiana in 2022 and beyond, keeping Indiana on the right track.
**_THE FULL SCHEDULE FOR CONGRESS OF COUNTIES WILL BE RELEASED IN THE COMING WEEKS! _**
**Bidenflation has NOT impacted registration for****Congress**** of Counties! [General admission registration remains $100/person.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=20e4ad1516&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

We hope to see you next year at Congress of Counties!

Thanks!
-Your Indiana Republican Party Team

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: What you find when you audit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Wait till you see THIS |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5642e7fa09&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I am Mark Finchem. I am the proud America first election integrity patriot pushing for and developing nationwide watermarking and authentication measures for balloting.

**And this month is absolutely critical for the movement.[We are coming up on and end of month fundraising goal of fifty thousand dollars, which we absolutely need to hit if we are to be able to fight against the Anti-American Democrats in 2022.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f54ee4ec12&e=44b8c466b0)**

I am proud to announce that we are hosting a hearing on Election Integrity on December 13th. It is absolutely important to put pressure on the necessary officials to audit Pima County.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2d77273e6a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _We need to once again ring first-hand witnesses to who can speak to what they saw in 2020. This is a critical next step in investigations of fraud in Arizona._

But do not forget - we are a statewide epicenter of a national problem.

**Just this week, we received shocking news out of Wisconsin.**

_It was just reported that there are over 119,000 on the voter rolls in. Wisconsin that have been on the voter rolls for over a CENTURY._

And these are just those registered as “active” voters.

If you add in inactive voters?

That number balloons to over half a million. **These are the types of numbers that you would expect when Dictators when fraudulent elections in the Middle East.**

We cannot let this happen in America again. We are better than that.

A few more findings:

**Wisconsin had only four and a half million citizens who reached the age of majority. How many on the voter rolls?**

**SEVEN MILLION.**

**64,000 voters were switched to inactive AFTER the election was over even though they were recorded as voting.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7a98463a06&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| The point here is grim but simple folks: there was clear and abundant fraud in the 2020 election, and the election hearing in less than a week will go a long way to establishing the crucial next steps.

[And this is why I urgently need your support.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3ac637c7e7&e=44b8c466b0)

The media is doing everything it can to contain and suppress the election integrity narrative. This means it is up to our campaign to make sure that we dig and investigate and get the word out.

[_And unfortunately, this takes lots of money. This is why we have a fundraising goal of 50,000 by the end of the month. Can you help with a rush donation of 25, 50, or 100 tonight?_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6d1c069b2a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d7c9f3de04&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=16dc29a212&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=b34fca8e54) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=b34fca8e54).

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Taxation
body:
Democrats want an economic tailspin?
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dLyT-W9-ZP-3HJ633oHwIaL8OFNlkBa207U5WTpavbi9Y3YNvvSiy7aMSkBt6TZCuxEntjl8aQL4XKQLfKNEtoxq3D02CEZCTwUeEVjIWs84ZfyPjJsX1DM5G5kOT6eaax_-Yff2_2VcssIwzsu03sn0z1-gEM2u&c=2N4oWZO7COcZoqyFcoj_O5-2I84yAr_4jQIeulg-3XVwXJORjWsnag==&ch=_fRrRq3Y2KsEFyi5YXTHYbGw19tKER9OdpzFQLDizaBD7IQ1-W4Fng==)
---
|
---
|
# Taxing more is all Democrats know
---
The lunacy is stunning--Democrats think they can tax and spend their way out of a global crisis.
Under the Biden Administration's Build Back Better plan--you know, the one that Biden said wouldn't cost anything--numerous new taxes are proposed. While the Left claims that the burden of these new taxes will be paid by the wealthiest Americans, we will all feel this impact through higher costs. Besides, do we really trust these corrupt politicians to keep their grubby little hands off our hard-earned money?
For example, Michael Bennet is joining progressive Elizabeth Warren in supporting the Corporate Profits Minimum Tax plan as a part of Build Back Better. It will require larger companies who make more than $1 billion annually to pay at least 15% of their profits in taxes. What do you think happens to the over 200 impacted companies, their employees, and the costs of their goods and services when this happens?
It's almost as if Democrats want to send this country into an economic tailspin.
We're all feeling it at the grocery store and at the gas pump--I feel it sharply too. Inflation will only grow as spending and taxation continues. The Build Back Better plan will only add to our economic misery, now and in our children's future, while failing to address the myriad crises already contrived by bad government policy.
Meanwhile, the Congressional Budget Office estimates this progressive legislation will add $367 billion to the deficit. Under the Dem's watch, our debt keeps growing exponentially.
I believe we should each determine how we want to spend our money, not have additional costs tacked on to our purchases that go to taxes funding social programs and environmental policies that are bad for Colorado and this nation.
I will fight for less spending and lower taxes as your next U.S. Senator. Stand with me by donating today and joining our cause.

name: Team Gansler
subject: RE: Prioritizing Maryland's mental health 🧠
body:
| Friend - Did you see this message about Doug's mental health plan, _**[Mental Health Matters](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0kfurjTxCm_nDReJMyGB3KNaC8FVRD50iaEUlbtnBX6JUY9ZTDf5RRxu1nTUR55yhtUwbEYjtlxud3IAX9_LFk4zMMaK8PzHnfCw-W9aWAAvWes2wpMgTof28L6fWaHOqxJJOmflVoYKGHyAl-9tO0sSY54Iz_WbMmQE1Q7BXEyG7-F2NknbBGy7u1w8Y66iM0zBveqFBHTevOQpwbvrHHnsuqBx-D-G3bgio8dq4NeNC-GKNQOzm_LcTFxfeDPHaQ/3hp/Kp9tAigqQgK3H7lUUiGP4A/h0/6eUImFSHGDcJXGvTq8x1aK3jqqlbacebeEK4qv5_kTQ)**_ , earlier this week? Maryland is nowhere close to satisfying the demand for psychiatrists, therapists, and clinical social workers, which means people who call for help are often forced to wait weeks, even months, to get through the door. That's simply unacceptable. **[Please take a few minutes to read Doug's entire plan on our website, because Marylanders need mental health care now more than ever.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0kfurjTxCm_nDReJMyGB3KNaC8FVRD50iaEUlbtnBX6JUY9ZTDf5RRxu1nTUR55yhpxTeJ40tOVrcmpqzMhB3AtTHJgl2lg8ECy6jSMBvG7rUSZpggmex3TG8wRDhOgIw19F9NZ8ReZ0swqXfu1WXKiiYcC5rs-EiFeHZoIXtiMJRhAIcOxJbwdKgRCl3NjpMGilmJapug6vG7sKflY0TaOSFTWyfMh26N63FHLsRAWY5trsqydv-0HdciJRrLNg7Q/3hp/Kp9tAigqQgK3H7lUUiGP4A/h1/fmQrzMz7VovSJhNY0MIadr70l1TCIq21xvajfjNGKQ4)** Thank you, Team Gansler _\----Begin Forwarded Message----_
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0kfurjTxCm_nDReJMyGB3KNaC8FVRD50iaEUlbtnBX6JUY9ZTDf5RRxu1nTUR55yhuYVuBnI6i-a28yC77nh90kVRYy2NLl7xAvsH_zFQoutDw01x5GT1LdPgILZme2EqOQTb-EZBdC1vXKtrvTNFJ23kCAaily0IipMaNxXv_NMiU7anO9SxWG2IxjEuH8630MIKmCco5a_EyfgjxHLDybWB84yf7LcrrBZz7HSZNJNWX6RMk8mSCMfg2p5EuvwXg/3hp/Kp9tAigqQgK3H7lUUiGP4A/h2/snYzmc7pQnkFase8Y0hBfGx09BbKnPkxj7gdLy5USg8)
---
Hi friends, As anyone who has attempted to navigate the mental health care system can tell you, Maryland is failing to provide the level of care patients desperately need. Lives are at stake and we need relief and resources to tackle this crisis as soon as possible. That's why as Governor, **I will make mental health a defining priority of my Administration,** starting with a generational investment in mental health treatment services as part of my plan: _**[Mental Health Matters](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0kfurjTxCm_nDReJMyGB3KNaC8FVRD50iaEUlbtnBX6JUY9ZTDf5RRxu1nTUR55yht36xb9PDyNrs4taWZB_lCy6mpugjyFFWyifD-AShrm5FlS670AclR2Kb8vmuAwUfVRJdXdnY-9cwltaDbaRjEb7idvzUMuRzOMoicZfHajYZhc4q2Kn91u63YHLFmuLgcpodEEtNat7DVb3J5M68fbq6kxUzYXK2kfN6MldCJFUj9p1iW5enO98ye9AyWTg5g/3hp/Kp9tAigqQgK3H7lUUiGP4A/h3/NiWvzIy0wKRYHDwBrCzwGsKPIfA1s2jQVPmDq9Dsg18)**_.
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0kfurjTxCm_nDReJMyGB3KNaC8FVRD50iaEUlbtnBX6JUY9ZTDf5RRxu1nTUR55yhtP4neGkJ1ifjyUQTAgMGMKnXOi69rLgSQpeEA-ppCLsW-QtI4PAlW2zh-ZW0N8FyTGb6nPWIzNFWbydk1hVi-aN7AGX_k9LohUA4IXCs8DwzDDhT078cS98yiMYHLb9K0oJZQYRcgVbm4sFVZvz1kYX3qFb3Hh5AnnHH-IZZwT1-UdlTBazri7YeK4UQkGVEw/3hp/Kp9tAigqQgK3H7lUUiGP4A/h4/3sI9h-5oDmIPO0C9nGWS0CJkpwb-a3VHqK0w6Q8UYRI)
---
My comprehensive plan includes measures to:
---
* **Build and operate 10 new regional behavioral centers across the state of Maryland

**
* **Ensure all public schools have one certified mental health care professional**on staff** per 250 students

**
* **Ensure all police departments have access to mental health professionals to assist with conflict resolution, substance addiction, and PTSD

**
* **Provide cost-free higher education to psychiatrists, therapists, or social workers who pledge to practice in Maryland for 10 years

**
* **Establish a Cabinet-level, Interagency Department of Suicide Prevention

**
* **And SO MUCH MORE**

---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0kfurjTxCm_nDReJMyGB3KNaC8FVRD50iaEUlbtnBX6JUY9ZTDf5RRxu1nTUR55yhrqnILkzcGyM-gqp27jEvKu1fZIMNrWMkUChpxfEkzy_R4ChlHUzPG6QO8nPEfuZfmxAk7UXIwz5-niK05xbYEnOaaiLsqtqbktGdwF0Q5O_amLH0utLpK3FmHP14kS-qn0ij3LJ2aEZeFShgm-K-iI0JlGzgYwq8-sdPXGk27FPGqk6RP_M1YHaGfWMfouRKw/3hp/Kp9tAigqQgK3H7lUUiGP4A/h5/9dl0facbc36mxwyaqDvIQRSwcvglbMelbYEyrET7zbY)We have the opportunity to make real change for millions of Marylanders with an unprecedented investment in mental health care, but to make that possible, I need your support. **[To help me expand access, quality, and continuity of mental health services in our state, read the entire plan on my website today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0kfurjTxCm_nDReJMyGB3KNaC8FVRD50iaEUlbtnBX6JUY9ZTDf5RRxu1nTUR55yhj0KYjBgIvPVcDC0cL5dzUkD1YGGbpZ9w6jL-dph7fOlEaWck8YIQoxTx0tLBvxkWwawXIOwRqK1-Eq2x5IG_pWxvJLn5gQPUAyNzuUu3ZAgQGQo6_LRuKGHZsPyI50cycIZxEmC9eBEytbAoNBkQ-x9OevR6y9UYwqQR0lnOFQ8VkXwmdBLqSur4fWmAnLPnA/3hp/Kp9tAigqQgK3H7lUUiGP4A/h6/LCWE5x47N-9mvvFtnyx0NibMMghPi8ey5icGbK1dm1E)** Thank you, Doug
---
[ **DONATE**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzuutJY9INZd_dUzqeoW-k4xCVbT8Q2IYJlN_Kguxh6ABUJY_-Jpch2nbl6Et5vZ81J_Bkja0ZA0yWmMIdmiwjVDgfDRM0EzaNP4wAoVTKSDs1CgAa_xIrYuClWxGb8JcY5zQGsTBD4Xv87wDmyWBQdBhLVe4DbpdV5TOgMZcz2FAS7kg4w1G0DXCSatktn_G0APRnFrg2c3_I9hlmO0sBly9L8tmLYBVEjcznhrOVzbJqKB987PxHnwJ0BnL-Dx9mW4fa2qQaTVXqHzkyQKMyMQAISjPfA4UHcCRW_aTMSAryiZwp3vdmeIzx72Q2-ks7Dw/3hp/Kp9tAigqQgK3H7lUUiGP4A/h7/XEviZifFA9KQawlCjIcKei_L-qa9-MezjElStc6ewCE)

body:
Stacey Abrams just announced that she’s running for governor next year. Stacey Abrams just announced that she's running for governor next year. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=63468fdcf40441b79a5501c67c3647e2&_e=TUH2B1_fPs2_j-d2pVwBJmHMWWK-HoFm249iBRTBUvnm4hivRWY5mA6O0_kUBI__Tk8IYKFOrQNq8IiFhYbhntHiUwLIzDo5ZCIOfIVkw5XMx2sRon4CIxDJShiYr7vb0ndMRClBYyAuDV38O9Lbiix7aGXh5Rl_vO-jt084Gxnl9Jp-gHbgyuHs90lJv6zKQuHildhgxlIMvGVatNL_tQjgNH4E1eZaTT9yNiWMdaWLrMogj2V5mBBEsKds2-C42pbNk-ZU7B5nUfO9daPZm1aDvCWDLWuRoVnY3VZQeMcWktFtaagyEOnZSzf7tyhZtVR9vAO0pJkiQFS0D4Ma5Z8EFtugD6d0JWyhcicZEOD3MiGyCuz47oK_52GTwuJsCFxrP4N-YxQ8mVYbSVfigPU2lTvN3F9KRb7W5jJaYPzsKDZvYBQMMgFJxsRAzTj8isV8pAJqbu7kzSsderRlXOrNGuIn9lbIj2YXBIthrqg%3D)

---
Fellow American ,

I want to make one thing clear from the beginning of this email: _**Our Senate race is about the future of Georgia and the future of the United States.**_

**Democrats say the most sensationalist things to fire up their base and raise money.**

Marie ran transformational campaigns for Congress in 2018 and 2020, winning on her second try against the entrenched, corporate "machine" and defeating one of the last anti-abortion Democrats serving in Congress. She is an outspoken voice for the Green New Deal, universal healthcare, paid family leave, free college, student debt relief, and much more. **Marie 's district was just redrawn, forcing her to face off against a fellow incumbent to keep her seat in Congress. We need Marie's leadership on Capitol Hill, and we're determined to help her win again. Will you split a contribution with her campaign and Future Generations today?**

Marie is fighting tirelessly in Congress to advance protections for working people, sponsoring legislation to raise the wage, create millions of jobs, strengthen unions and protect workers' rights. She is fighting to preserve the robust programs in President Biden's original Build Back Better (BBB) bill as conservative Democrats fought to strip it down. The climate investments in BBB are particularly important for Illinois, where green jobs already account for 7% of the state's economy. In her own words: _"I 'm so thankful to receive the endorsement of Future Generations PAC. We are living in a climate crisis and we need strong leaders in office that will protect our environment and revitalize our country's infrastructure using green technologies. I look forward to working in partnership with my colleagues to keep delivering results for the next generation of leaders."_ **Rep. Marie Newman (Candidate for IL-06)** The corporate donors who call the shots are not happy with Marie's work to rebuild our economy and center the needs of working people. That's why they targeted her through redistricting and forced her to run against a fellow Democrat. Her opponent is new to Congress as well -- but he's already taken hundreds of thousands of dollars in corporate PAC money. Marie defeated a corporate incumbent before, and she will do it again. We are proud to stand by her in her race to represent the newly drawn IL-06 district so we can build on the progress we've already made. **[In a time when politicians sell out to corporate interests, we need to keep allies in office who will fight for our future. You can help by splitting a contribution between Marie Newman and Future Generations today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEV8OZob44qg5NE3KCIlTRuVN4liUr8tVwoT2DfokaHdfy3tHIVfkzuB6H2jRdY8-dhrRZ-75keUgVMa9ffXuGvI1T2v7JIlEJtdJeae16TksFjYDWwYxCTdYlj1Prs5s2QDFByFlOLQkVaj4Q-eg3a3LUhSMlxWYcrsiRVPzNiB8aEx2ynU5B-RhXiC7E0380EzGBHytzRb3yc20LGOJnyzl8bbZ4aspW5NKC3OqQR2TwFszBWE5EX0XCWcFX_vGrhhH2RYTuzYd_lTNeIIVpWR6wbLn25kkbyGA8swd__infnPDHenLSIkldwbwTdnouDst4RVcPGEhO66xGypffQkAxjnj6AySFobq_odPs7SY0uXfr1yU4xvkxFUSOlAXbTJl0D8leZ5yRonaOfLLl/3hp/EPJ7Fz9LTgGI3M1X_tzbxQ/h3/EMIRSKBHc1yRREgLazTB4FtTdFopQEBeQwgRi4AC7gU)** In solidarity, Roza

We partner with progressives up and down the ballot to stop the climate crisis, fighting for universal healthcare, racial and economic justice. We don't take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats.

We're building a powerful slate for 2022, and we need your help. clean_body: Marie Newman beat the machine to win her seat last year. Now they’re trying to draw her out of Congress. | | Peter -- Future Generations welcomes Rep. Marie Newman (currently representing IL-03) to the slate for her 2022 reelection! | Marie ran transformational campaigns for Congress in 2018 and 2020, winning on her second try against the entrenched, corporate "machine" and defeating one of the last anti-abortion Democrats serving in Congress. She is an outspoken voice for the Green New Deal, universal healthcare, paid family leave, free college, student debt relief, and much more. Marie 's district was just redrawn, forcing her to face off against a fellow incumbent to keep her seat in Congress. We need Marie's leadership on Capitol Hill, and we're determined to help her win again. Will you split a contribution with her campaign and Future Generations today? Marie is fighting tirelessly in Congress to advance protections for working people, sponsoring legislation to raise the wage, create millions of jobs, strengthen unions and protect workers' rights. She is fighting to preserve the robust programs in President Biden's original Build Back Better (BBB) bill as conservative Democrats fought to strip it down. The climate investments in BBB are particularly important for Illinois, where green jobs already account for 7% of the state's economy. In her own words: "I 'm so thankful to receive the endorsement of Future Generations PAC. We are living in a climate crisis and we need strong leaders in office that will protect our environment and revitalize our country's infrastructure using green technologies. I look forward to working in partnership with my colleagues to keep delivering results for the next generation of leaders." Rep. Marie Newman (Candidate for IL-06) The corporate donors who call the shots are not happy with Marie's work to rebuild our economy and center the needs of working people. That's why they targeted her through redistricting and forced her to run against a fellow Democrat. Her opponent is new to Congress as well -- but he's already taken hundreds of thousands of dollars in corporate PAC money. Marie defeated a corporate incumbent before, and she will do it again. We are proud to stand by her in her race to represent the newly drawn IL-06 district so we can build on the progress we've already made. In solidarity, Roza | | Future Generations is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generations philosophy, building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We partner with progressives up and down the ballot to stop the climate crisis, fighting for universal healthcare, racial and economic justice. We don't take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats. We're building a powerful slate for 2022, and we need your help. Join our people-powered movement in the fight for the future. | | Connect with us by clicking on the links below: | | | Future Generations PAC P.O. Box 362 Palo Pinto, TX 76484 ©2021 Future Generations PAC, all rights reserved. | | Paid for by Future Generations PAC. ---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe using the link below. | | Sent via . Hi folks, I’m Emily, Michael’s Digital Director. I oversee the program that sends you emails like these (sorry!), but I hope you’ll hear me out about why these emails are so important. Michael doesn’t accept a penny from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. He’s seen the inaction that results from the influence of money in politics: votes not taken on important issues, bills not passed despite constituent approval, and politicians ignoring science-based evidence. That’s why emails like this one are so important to helping Michael continue his fight to build on the progress he’s achieved for Colorado. Grassroots investments truly power this campaign. When supporters like you pitch in through emails like this one, you help us compete against the National GOP’s $75 million-plus war chest and the wealthy, self-funding opponents already running attack ads against Michael. It’s not our style to beg for donations — we send emails like this one to keep busy folks like you informed about Michael’s work and to get your input on Michael’s priorities. But we do also count on the $1, $3, and $10 grassroots investments that allow us to hire and train team members and invest in the infrastructure it takes to defend Michael’s record. **The average donation to emails like this one is****$30.16****— a true sign of this grassroots movement. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: “most competitive race in the country”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
We need all hands on deck to keep Susie Lee in Congress.
#
Team,
I work for all Nevadans in the Senate -- but the Third Congressional District will always be special to me because it is the district I previously had the honor to represent in Congress.
It is very important to me that we keep making progress with a Democratic member in this seat.
My friend Susie Lee is an extraordinary representative in Congress -- and she needs our support in what the _Wall Street Journal_ called the **“most competitive race in the country.”**
**[We can’t let the GOP take back this seat and roll back our progress in NV-03. Will you contribute $5 right now to reelect Susie Lee and keep Nevada blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39510962/320169389/2010888999?refcode=jr_em_nd_211209_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmRlMjAyYi0zNDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJrQDpikGeJze1YRkjolK2SWy8Da2rHoCZwnDGvabew=)**
Susie Lee has been a strong voice for Nevada’s families, helping craft and pass the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law in the House. We can count on her to keep working hard for us, which is why some of the most extreme Republicans want to unseat her from Congress in the next election.
We’re not going to let that happen. We’re going to reelect Susie Lee and keep making progress.
**[Donate $5 or anything you can to support Susie Lee and our Democratic majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39510964/320169391/2010888999?refcode=jr_em_nd_211209_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmRlMjAyYi0zNDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kJrQDpikGeJze1YRkjolK2SWy8Da2rHoCZwnDGvabew=)**
Thank you,
Jacky

# We are in this to fight!

## I have always been a staunch supporter of human infrastructure. The Build Back Better plan, currently in the Senate, addresses just that. It will address childcare, housing, jobs training, and funding for education. But these things just scratch the surface of what this legislation will do! This is a great bill that we must get through Congress to help the American middle class thrive. Once I get to D.C., I will always have my constituents in mind, and bills like this will get my vote.

**_Great news!_**

**_All 212 members of the House Republican conference have joined me in standing up against President Biden and his vaccine mandate._** The Congressional Review Act Resolution I introduced will undo this burdensome vax mandate on America’s workers and employers.

**We have the support of the entire Republican conference in the House, the Senate, AND Senator Manchin.**

We are fighting for the people who built the greatest economy in the world, the people who got us through the pandemic because of their hard work every day.

**[Now, I’m asking you to stand up for them with me and the entire Republican conference!> >](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=4216cfc293cd4354afba098c01ff0fbc&_e=_iWm1DzoJCergpB_1ME-71XMNNayU9QxT-0S8R0ykpzNvmEMMqG3gBUaieDqhoqyVV3iPOf9BMj5UDQ0PRpC-OzDKvByq2LCmcrI0l45qpujdtJwAaWHsbjm50pI_di3ACf4dCerrG-MSzJ3p9CmCT089SA2UIhyeZcktzPvt8kx3PVggGXmm3l19WDn9QlkC7KNCFyyZojI1dUhJvtITnSKVl-EIHImK9J9qvNjMzFemGleF2IbfKUsiVLb_yPQDBu3c2fBAT1DuSIcBA2zun9-1m1qw0h20-_XtJ3I_PLwyY39868yQ64zjCXKn2UU-bEs3dkTS4doPol7x6MKFLU-qgPPfz7MLx7ki6tsjBzby70jfaAsCmqjwMfDQD12EzzDE7NIK3wZVKbPYzrv_sF6ukyGrc3gsdxWcMk6G_wjKHDJPNMF84-Mi8DzVBlK7LGZgf3x6Xv3Z6fKZ2MyI8FcQ3Ya3_DRIsBBJy0BlPE%3D)** [**Undo the Vax Mandate!**](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=4216cfc293cd4354afba098c01ff0fbc&_e=_iWm1DzoJCergpB_1ME-71XMNNayU9QxT-0S8R0ykpzNvmEMMqG3gBUaieDqhoqyVV3iPOf9BMj5UDQ0PRpC-OzDKvByq2LCmcrI0l45qpujdtJwAaWHsbjm50pI_di3ACf4dCerrG-MSzJ3p9CmCT089SA2UIhyeZcktzPvt8kx3PVggGXmm3l19WDn9QlkC7KNCFyyZojI1dUhJvtITnSKVl-EIHImK9J9qvNjMzGclS-A6aPHUsiMcwRLxdRLhPgQ49ZzQuH3i9O74gDXTS-99ILlGkrLfOhvQNeoB_u3t7dEhlq171SxiS0ZHc6uwYQm3bGWjjkCQZMGdFMp4ckqZ4Omx3-mrA0sWxaF_jfyeYAxmtyLP6FnFPejlCHi1C4xGpYIDe-s98oYyB7aSTe4GHsHlnBhHcmQDNe2l1F7zpFdnoyyXI-4s0O2LPBoBEaCBSv7GniqSbG0Ur0aaBOIhzcxKrnvvUC-jc_XfLo%3D)
---
[**Stand Up For American Workers!**](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=4216cfc293cd4354afba098c01ff0fbc&_e=_iWm1DzoJCergpB_1ME-71XMNNayU9QxT-0S8R0ykpzNvmEMMqG3gBUaieDqhoqyVV3iPOf9BMj5UDQ0PRpC-OzDKvByq2LCmcrI0l45qpujdtJwAaWHsbjm50pI_di3ACf4dCerrG-MSzJ3p9CmCT089SA2UIhyeZcktzPvt8kx3PVggGXmm3l19WDn9QlkC7KNCFyyZojI1dUhJvtITnSKVl-EIHImK9J9qvNjMzGclS-A6aPHUsiMcwRLxdRLhPgQ49ZzQuH3i9O74gDXTVKcHqeTw_ZBhhHZd_KuHgkXmYJtR387-ixggGMmuQIjOL6JoRApHO0ePA0Y8I4V84fr_yzZPpJ6pYdCmG62fAZTP8p6BkwhV-rJfV_4hpqnDLsnGTWfM4MhTP62E0zeXF6oMvYNoqvOJ58123N2qjGRbDUASi4F4oLYeXASFZ3Ty11F8iMch2QIH23QSFDXkB04RQE3x0i2y5r2IsWqNAQ%3D)
---

I am hopeful that the rest of the Democrats in the House and Senate will join us in standing up for the people for which we work, our constituents.

**[Join me in taking this burden off the backs of the American people!> >](http://links.fredkellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=a10e51f77ad04717aea703f9689c01ef&_m=4216cfc293cd4354afba098c01ff0fbc&_e=_iWm1DzoJCergpB_1ME-71XMNNayU9QxT-0S8R0ykpzNvmEMMqG3gBUaieDqhoqyVV3iPOf9BMj5UDQ0PRpC-OzDKvByq2LCmcrI0l45qpujdtJwAaWHsbjm50pI_di3ACf4dCerrG-MSzJ3p9CmCT089SA2UIhyeZcktzPvt8kx3PVggGXmm3l19WDn9QlkC7KNCFyyZojI1dUhJvtITnSKVl-EIHImK9J9qvNjMzFemGleF2IbfKUsiVLb_yPQqlICbuGqPaowl-RBQoR0T4pmOgh1et4ijX8qSj0o464zgoRGRNLYPhD_3ETCT7qqLfVwTyRE6txlFfZ0H5rlikCyUdQSEVHye3X1JSud_-XCs1zM55f3SlAhWTyOlfYjTTjWfvGmBxezNjM8Y2-sEPlYaJH6fiaA8kJLl-krMuX-E61qQdEGJtbY5z-Ea0xW6BRGhF2l-H-UHhkSsy0ZdKS7psTSMZ2pxOBXRqGRhm4%3D)**

Congressman Fred Keller

All 212 members of the House Republican conference have joined me in standing up against President Biden and his vaccine mandate. The Congressional Review Act Resolution I introduced will undo this burdensome vax mandate on America’s workers and employers. We have the support of the entire Republican conference in the House, the Senate, AND Senator Manchin. We are fighting for the people who built the greatest economy in the world, the people who got us through the pandemic because of their hard work every day. I am hopeful that the rest of the Democrats in the House and Senate will join us in standing up for the people for which we work, our constituents. God Bless, Congressman Fred Keller Fred Keller (Taking the values of PA's 12th District to Congress) Paid for by Fred Keller for Congress Our mailing address is: PO Box 61893 Harrisburg, PA 17106 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

name: MISSING: Vaccine Survey Response
subject: Get a vaccine or be fined??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9me0jfehnd84tbb1h4hjlfodf4r7tops4qsvad8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gecor4c1h2bs)
---

Fellow American,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 21 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z13di0nfurpb7vk8rpqojn99nr6rnl715vj7r3g0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gecor4c1h2bs)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkif6at49q598cbq05cal5bu1n821tvpg1h0mtj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gecor4c1h2bs)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, December 9th

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z25l6pr46vc19rqkrjkgpdp9cdojk6d1c8ef80t0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gecor4c1h2bs)

---

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!** Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr5r8tvc21u60b2hsbe6k00nral2epa2fjteco7g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gecor4c1h2bs)**

Thanks for letting us know –

Thank you,
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl41rusi0b717kuc933rpb2vjidj98949bh3kskg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gecor4c1h2bs)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztfb55td2nhmrdce0g45rrtobc3f6m4ta43n51h0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1gecor4c1h2bs)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8e0hgfsd06sq03qt5lvnf9sc7citt0a5bv63pcg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9jle8r7ccjkm1on9dtjmppq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuju1df34kqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr69bls2on2s3isujqact4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf8pnm9qrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprf972u9hf8pjlciq6csj0cjh7bdjhm6on8s9hm6qn8opnchge2crm6dim6tpiedh31o3561h238h1e8he4933cpie0o76cdi60oh5u)

name: Matt West
subject: Could you live off of a $7.25 minimum wage?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
#Fightfor15. | **$7.25** Today’s federal minimum wage is $7.25, friend. In some parts of Oregon, it’s only slightly higher at $12.75. But if the minimum wage had kept up with productivity, it would be $24 an hour today. The worst part is Congress hasn’t bothered raising the minimum wage since 2009. Why? Because Republicans love scaring their supporters with misleading data. “Small businesses will be destroyed.” “We’ll see job losses.” “Wages are high enough.” False. False. And false, again. **_[Friend, I don’t know about you, but I am not going to let the GOP fool us into being complacent. Will you sign our petition to demand Congress raise the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39511335/320170989/1294284639?source=direct_link&referrer=group-matt-west-for-congress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQ2NThjYS0zNTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E1yhCm9lesqlhTdJooljiJHS-VmVV-V0IF7gkjClLhs=&emci=4f877847-5158-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=24d658ca-3559-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5643049)_** _**[ADD MY NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39511337/320170991/1294284639?source=direct_link&referrer=group-matt-west-for-congress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQ2NThjYS0zNTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E1yhCm9lesqlhTdJooljiJHS-VmVV-V0IF7gkjClLhs=&emci=4f877847-5158-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=24d658ca-3559-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5643049)**_ It doesn’t take a scientist like myself to understand that raising the federal minimum wage to $15 won’t just raise more than a million Americans out of poverty. It will boost the economy and even reduce employer turnover while helping them save money. Not to mention, raising the minimum wage would benefit 32 million workers, most of them in Black and brown communities who disproportionatelyhold low-wage jobs. Congress needs leaders who understand that $7.25 an hour won’t cut it anymore. Costs of living like rent, healthcare, and food are skyrocketing. And families are hurting. With your support, we can make living wages a reality, but until I step foot into Washington next year, we need to make our voices heard loud and clear NOW. **_[Add your name next to mine on our petition demanding Congress get the job done!>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39511339/320170993/1294284639?source=direct_link&referrer=group-matt-west-for-congress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQ2NThjYS0zNTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E1yhCm9lesqlhTdJooljiJHS-VmVV-V0IF7gkjClLhs=&emci=4f877847-5158-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=24d658ca-3559-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5643049)_** Thanks for your support, Matt West

name: Bo Hines
subject: never flinch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bo Hines for Congress
body:
Peter --
The polls show a massive red wave is about to
sweep Democrats out of power in 2022.

But firing Nancy Pelosi is not enough.

Trading out one set of
establishment swamp politicians for another will not stop Joe
Biden's lawless assault on our liberties.

America First patriots
must elect a conservative majority that learned the lessons from
Donald Trump and FIGHT back against the socialist left and their
allies in the fake news media and big tech.

My name is Bo Hines, and
I'm running for Congress as the 100% pro-Life, 100% pro-Gun, and
100% pro-Trump candidate in North Carolina.

But before I ask for your support, I want to
tell you a bit about myself.

I earned a football
scholarship to North Carolina State University through hard work
and dedication.

I later attended Wake
Forest Law School after experiencing firsthand the cancel culture
and leftwing indoctrination on the campus of Yale University.
And I'm running for Congress because you and
I both know something is wrong in America right now.
STAND WITH BO HINES
CHIP IN $10 RIGHT AWAY
I really hope I can count on your help in
fighting to take our country back.
Joe Biden's trying to
jam needles into the arms of every American - even small children
against the will of their parents.

The FBI is spying on moms and dads at school
board meetings that protest mask mandates that harm their
children and critical race theory that teaches students to hate
this great country.

Joe Biden opened the
border to a record flood of illegal aliens marching into our
country.

If you ask any questions about the November
2020 election, Big Tech bans you, and Joe Biden's FBI may burst
through your door arrest you.

Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi,
and Chuck Schumer are pushing trillion in new spending to turn
American into a socialist nation by imposing the Marxist Green
New Deal and creating a cradle to the grave welfare state.
Enough is enough.
STAND WITH BO HINES

CHIP IN $10 RIGHT AWAY

Conservative champions like Reps. Marjorie
Taylor Greene, Madison Cawthorn, and Paul Gosar endorsed my
campaign for Congress.

I hope I can count on you to join them by
chipping in your most generous contribution to my campaign.

Your donation will allow my campaign to run
TV and online ads, direct mail, and phone banks to let voters in
the North Carolina that I am the America First conservative in
this race-ready to take the fight to Congress.

Like Donald Trump, I'm sick and tired of the
all-talk and no-action career politicians.

If elected to Congress, I promise to:

*** SUPPORT legislation to fire Dr. Fauci.
Dr. Fauci lied to Congress and must face criminal prosecution;
*** DEFEND election integrity. I support
voter ID laws, and I will oppose any effort by the Democrats to
impose the shady vote by mail and ballot harvesting schemes
liberals employed in the 2020 election;
*** OPPOSE all unconstitutional gun control.
No gun bans and no red flag laws;
*** BUILD the wall. The biggest winners from
Joe Biden's open borders policies are drug cartels and human
smugglers; and
*** STOPPING Joe Biden from imposing any more
illegal vaccine mandates or economy crippling shutdowns.

If you agree these should be the priorities
for a new conservative majority in Congress, I hope you will chip
in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 - or whatever you can
afford - to help me fight for your values.

I understand why so many Americans are angry.

Too many establishment Republicans are afraid
to take on these fights.

They fold as soon as CNN calls them names.

I promise you I will never flinch in fighting
for the America First agenda.

That's why Reps. Marjorie Taylor Greene,
Madison Cawthorn, and Paul Gosar endorsed my campaign for
Congress.

I'm asking that you join them by chipping in
a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 - or whatever you can
afford - right away.

These past 18 months of COVID imposed tyranny
by Dr. Fauci and Big Government politicians like Joe Biden proved
one thing.

Petty tyrants and wannabe authoritarians will
never willingly give up the power.

It's up to "we the people" to take our
country back.

You and I have the chance to do just that
next November.

Runaway inflation, the debacle in
Afghanistan, and an invasion at the southern border whipped up a
tsunami of opposition to the Democrat's socialist agenda.

But conservatives cannot afford to elect
anymore Republicans looking to bend the knee for CNN or MSNBC.

That's why I'm running for Congress as a
proud, pro-life, pro-gun, and pro-Trump conservative.

But I need to know if I can count on your
support.

Will you join stalwarts of the America First
movement like Marjorie Taylor Greene, Madison Cawthorn, and Paul
Gosar by chipping in a contribution today?

STAND WITH BO HINES

CHIP IN $10 RIGHT AWAY
Your generous support will send a message to
Nancy Pelosi, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Ilhan Omar that a red
wave is building to sweep them out of power next November.

I am a fighter through and through.

As my wife and I embark on a journey to start
a family, I hope to help make a better life for yours by
preserving our values and our heritage.

If you believe in this country as I do, I
humbly ask for your support in this campaign.
Sincerely,

Bo
Hines

Paid for by Bo Hines for Congress

I promise you I will never flinch in fighting for the America First agenda. That's why Reps. Marjorie Taylor Greene, Madison Cawthorn, and Paul Gosar endorsed my campaign for Congress. I'm asking that you join them by chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100 - or whatever you can afford - right away. These past 18 months of COVID imposed tyranny by Dr. Fauci and Big Government politicians like Joe Biden proved one thing. Petty tyrants and wannabe authoritarians will never willingly give up the power. It's up to "we the people" to take our country back. You and I have the chance to do just that next November. Runaway inflation, the debacle in Afghanistan, and an invasion at the southern border whipped up a tsunami of opposition to the Democrat's socialist agenda. But conservatives cannot afford to elect anymore Republicans looking to bend the knee for CNN or MSNBC. That's why I'm running for Congress as a proud, pro-life, pro-gun, and pro-Trump conservative. But I need to know if I can count on your support. Will you join stalwarts of the America First movement like Marjorie Taylor Greene, Madison Cawthorn, and Paul Gosar by chipping in a contribution today? STAND WITH BO HINES CHIP IN $10 RIGHT AWAY Your generous support will send a message to Nancy Pelosi, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Ilhan Omar that a red wave is building to sweep them out of power next November. I am a fighter through and through. As my wife and I embark on a journey to start a family, I hope to help make a better life for yours by preserving our values and our heritage. If you believe in this country as I do, I humbly ask for your support in this campaign. Sincerely, Bo Hines Paid for by Bo Hines for Congress This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 17, 2021. For more information please follow the URL below: Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out: To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-67302621117-echo3-6F7F6B5CA03E5794C3661A3A637247F3@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

body:
We need just 5 seats to take Congress, and these are the Young Guns leading the charge
&nbs; p;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?31enr--fgxr-4qqlpo4&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

Fellow Conservative,

We need just 5 seats to take Congress next fall, and today I am meeting with some of the Young Guns who will take us to that majority:
* Esther Joy King (IL-17)
* Amanda Adkins (KS-03)
* Bruce Poliquin (ME-02)
* Ryan Zinke (MT-01)
* Tom Kean Jr. (NJ-07)
* Monica De La Cruz (TX-15)
* Wesley Hunt (TX-38)
* Derrick Van Orden (WI-03)

These are some of the strongest Republican candidates in the country, which is why we chose them to be a part of our Young Guns recruitment and support program. It is absolutely CRITICAL that these candidates have the resources and support they need to win — [**can I tell them that they have your support?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31enr-1onno-4qqlpo1/)
[**SUPPORT THE YOUNG GUNS**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31enr-1onnp-4qqlpo2/)
I launched the Young Guns program in 2007 to identify and support winning candidates across the country who embody the principles of the House Republican Conference. I’m proud to welcome these candidates to the Young Guns program and I look forward to working together to not only take the House — but to build a lasting Republican majority.
[**Please chip in now to support our effort to take back Congress and FIRE Nancy Pelosi:**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31enr-1onnq-4qqlpo3/)

Thank you for investing in our future,
[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31enr-1onnw-4qqlpo9/)
Leader Kevin McCarthy

**A Note from Kevin:**

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31enr-1onnx-4qqlpo0/)
As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- [**EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31enr-1onny-4qqlpo1/)

The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started.

Kevin McCarthy

name: Noah K. (with Alex Lasry for Senate)
subject: Response requested from Peter! Join us next week for a Virtual Conversation with John Brennan, former CIA Director, and Alex Lasry on Thursday, December 16th!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
We still haven't heard from you, Peter! We'd love you see you VIRTUALLY for a Conversation with John Brennan, former CIA Director, and Alex Lasry on Thursday, December 16th! | Peter, I hope you are doing well! I just wanted to reach out to see if you are able to join us for our **[Virtual Conversation (via Zoom) with Alex Lasry and former CIA Director John Brennan next Thursday, December 16th at 5pm Central?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39511515/320171753/-729871255?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGI4NjFhNy0zNjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f5xRKJyWgPdQVrwssHLNuJmsbCGqK87Lha6BSTeY3Fo=)** We would love you to join us! **__It is coming up in just one week, on Thursday, December 16th at 5pm CT/6pm ET via Zoom_._ Click here to RSVP online: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lasry_dec16johnbrennan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39511516/320171754/-729871255?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGI4NjFhNy0zNjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f5xRKJyWgPdQVrwssHLNuJmsbCGqK87Lha6BSTeY3Fo=)** (Zoom Registration provided upon RSVP) Let me know if you have any questions, or if I can be of help in any way. name: Team Gallagher
subject: We’re not tolerating this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
China’s human rights abuses can’t be tolerated. That’s why Mike’s calling for a FULL boycott of the Beijing Winter Olympics [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=2b37af845f76465bac10d75db84ce782&_e=WixcV3xRjjGrIVNMsMSnTfZpB607JqddZkiKtBtZ0F6aF5fvH_v7kF-df9Pl_qh0GsSSIWITeGGj7FGz3dE0PD2610gY7FDKXErOdOaI_XKsE2NWgtKNJpKvu7pzm7b_vS72ys0tRgEKmMSLmgDHYnFKHi1U4gbAniNJuczdzRze59DY5ju7jj1IQ_WTQb6MdX_A7161nFgUqpoYvbfUQc72thQuuJd8RdEI9jb6KfR4hJHkenbbyjfxUx4UmW99cX85o4MVPd2iHvL2Xa9j4AqSRYZlAjTS--Y0dPWYZMMPsG3cX3jd_2qfxxn4bZq4dFjGLJoQEhDOy3iemT-e3s-Qv3sngpMTSXQ0tU2XvlGmytq5oecmwXSTcBV1836m1DHr0iRHHnOipXxz-oZxRym9TOkE0-vWjWBGM2STpHHDL7o2LaU730C9_WvWAeAD) Peter, The Biden Administration’s diplomatic boycott of the Beijing Winter Olympics does not go far enough to hold the Chinese communist regime accountable. **As Americans, we cannot tolerate China’s egregious human rights abuses.** **As many as a million Uighur Muslims are currently in concentration camps for the crime of not conforming to Xi Jinping’s vision of a unified China.** Chinese citizens who criticize the communist regime –– such as tennis star Peng Shuai –– face swift and violent repercussions for their actions. Just like they did in Hong Kong, the communist regime is plotting to eliminate freedom and democracy in Taiwan. **That’s why Mike is calling for a FULL boycott of the Beijing Olympics. ** [_**Will you stand with him?**_](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=2b37af845f76465bac10d75db84ce782&_e=WixcV3xRjjGrIVNMsMSnTfZpB607JqddZkiKtBtZ0F6aF5fvH_v7kF-df9Pl_qh0GsSSIWITeGGj7FGz3dE0PD2610gY7FDKXErOdOaI_XKsE2NWgtKNJpKvu7pzm7b_vS72ys0tRgEKmMSLmgDHYnFKHi1U4gbAniNJuczdzRze59DY5ju7jj1IQ_WTQb6MdX_A7161nFgUqpoYvbfUQc72thQuuJd8RdEI9jb6KfQ4PZtdLt7obQ6xCNiqV1blTQ7uENHkgx1ey8OvDORMX6z8ee_OktXUe9WsU00ZtW_3xjfAH_GUDSKyzYI_k8jV8tPjzD7nlRV-JPPYZtfYyYwfLdNHYXZvctiZHshXo79USaywDJOWb__bu3BfOGYhuQeJ0hikPD06x3cLSK6aEYNlthDdv5ooQ4TEW3GmK-S0-MWWIgDSzGMNIaw74qcO) [**I AGREE: AMERICA SHOULD BOYCOTT THE BEIJING OLYMPICS**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=2b37af845f76465bac10d75db84ce782&_e=WixcV3xRjjGrIVNMsMSnTfZpB607JqddZkiKtBtZ0F6aF5fvH_v7kF-df9Pl_qh0GsSSIWITeGGj7FGz3dE0PD2610gY7FDKXErOdOaI_XKsE2NWgtKNJpKvu7pzm7b_vS72ys0tRgEKmMSLmgDHYnFKHi1U4gbAniNJuczdzRze59DY5ju7jj1IQ_WTQb6MdX_A7161nFgUqpoYvbfUQc72thQuuJd8RdEI9jb6KfT79Af3FYozqs6uU2KhraNPgekFSzXNqbsFWjh0a-dVRiUg-KVtUUicdRAHw_-bf6Okz3PM7w9Dtq_NWFfTJdrWvPIyrdvX8S2D1z1Xiyquwhccd8wV8_3Y6P10e53-Qqu6dRavlbxpjcvhmOCz-3i7s-u4xEAtPbmYN6wit8iTXSnAtZzFOzhXEHLC8zQn4Z-kMDLlSzfekZ-Q-91bxHT7) NBA stars like LeBron James, Hollywood millionaires, and CEOs rarely hesitate to criticize America –– but they stay silent on China’s abuses to protect their profits. Today is International Human Rights Day and America has an opportunity to show the rest of the world that human rights matter and the CCP’s abuses will not be tolerated. **We cannot afford to waste this opportunity. ** [_**If you agree, please sign this petition to demand a FULL boycott of the Beijing Olympics >>>**_](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=2b37af845f76465bac10d75db84ce782&_e=WixcV3xRjjGrIVNMsMSnTfZpB607JqddZkiKtBtZ0F6aF5fvH_v7kF-df9Pl_qh0GsSSIWITeGGj7FGz3dE0PD2610gY7FDKXErOdOaI_XKsE2NWgtKNJpKvu7pzm7b_vS72ys0tRgEKmMSLmgDHYnFKHi1U4gbAniNJuczdzRze59DY5ju7jj1IQ_WTQb6MdX_A7161nFgUqpoYvbfUQc72thQuuJd8RdEI9jb6KfTJBdb9WO6fKzrOSEGt8-u8CbtzyIWOgZg2OsEL8qKFXQMBNY4bkGv4IkxOTztyOACL1DWHPmnJyDbYJCfPwysLPNxgmzvrMWkOlkq4fdZKNfCjTG93GIOedc4-_LB6JTJkQCrYzg_-7IvBgs_pYwP_5GoZvaTt6xwhDD2CRizOosWgncF-ymou5Mj3ryOvDYdQO6PILnG8ex2kyIpRWxQK) Thank you, Team Gallagher | |

name: MISSING: Vaccine Survey Response
subject: Freedom means no VACCINE MANDATES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I'm not seeing your name on the list of conservatives who have taken our four question vaccine mandate survey [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8265%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=7%2fXAGMwc69JAyiVOz%2ba8GQ&sysid=1)

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19224%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OalYXJikQTbK%2fWyZVHkPDQ&sysid=1)
---

Fellow American,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 21 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19235%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6O%2bR%2fHb1bQvlDEO99PNllQ&sysid=1)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19236%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fpGinzfNcjvh9gmsHT78WA&sysid=1)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, December 9th

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW→**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19237%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xltSeG8RuSo%2bbJmm2js6iQ&sysid=1)

---

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!** Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19238%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f7wu0Nd2HpJFPXd%2fujMSmQ&sysid=1)**

Thanks for letting us know -

Thank you,
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19239%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kh0dYqe%2fyQjSGUSgMnz1UQ&sysid=1)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW→**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19237%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xltSeG8RuSo%2bbJmm2js6iQ&sysid=1)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

name: GOP Presidential
subject: GOP Senators Optimistic on Rollback of Biden's Vaccine Mandate

name: Ally For Utah
subject: Ally is wearing out her red running shoes!
body:
#AllyForUtah Update | The latest news from the Ally Isom For U.S. Senate Campaign
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nqV_Fwr8YCiuCbNNzGZgiRJx-4xLDaOUnRK2gLsapJJWcnB81o4j0MhSozUGxW0lHOvacpXZyW8nS1p415aDmgXYwHcxFwhwF8cz0--KYeKA0NQmHedjJ64GXVbSKnjprBrWT-dBnqUxWmhUDIQ76A==&c=P_V900kFdTa3WNEKAknEzX3XECd6fnrOmzdr4ctptco27gTX3zwi4A==&ch=SdwA3Ac4MqCTHZI18oq2rtgAcwbpHqnfdBGtm1Hhi7oq213nHTtVNA==)
---
| | Friend,
Ally is continuing her Walk-A-Mile tour, all the while calling for volunteers to join her in the effort for a NEW DAWN for the Republican Party. Here is the latest from the #AllyForUtah campaign.
---
|
---
|
---
| Walk-A-Mile Tour update
Making good on her promise to walk a mile in every Utah community, Ally recently visited the scenic, close-knit town of Paragonah, UT. "It was wonderful to meet with Mayor Robinson, who helped me understand the unique challenges Paragonah faces when it comes to planning, growth and development, and the need for local control with minimal federal intrusion," Ally [wrote on social media](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nqV_Fwr8YCiuCbNNzGZgiRJx-4xLDaOUnRK2gLsapJJWcnB81o4j0MuElqWXGcIeEAbbmEBQQmoJKob84N68JdwFidIlXLbeoOMt6p6wMYwOqKHA0W-Xb71uPGA54TwynuedbXyLGfXoVMH2YYssNpxFTRyRXQGA2aTYQ0jeXXQ=&c=P_V900kFdTa3WNEKAknEzX3XECd6fnrOmzdr4ctptco27gTX3zwi4A==&ch=SdwA3Ac4MqCTHZI18oq2rtgAcwbpHqnfdBGtm1Hhi7oq213nHTtVNA==). "One size clearly doesn't fit all when it comes to state and federal regulations."
For more information about Ally's walk-a-mile tour, or to see all the Utah communities Ally has visited so far, please visit [allyforutah.com/walkamile/](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nqV_Fwr8YCiuCbNNzGZgiRJx-4xLDaOUnRK2gLsapJJWcnB81o4j0CMbNX_cX4vHzFI_qoPSgCXRTdifcxZKL1oHN3HOUq2y7ZRmG9p2ciZh92xRFVJTutc5gaVHBJnDvGEfxDrYRKeNDIe7Yc7G0Pm1Rg5d1jQj&c=P_V900kFdTa3WNEKAknEzX3XECd6fnrOmzdr4ctptco27gTX3zwi4A==&ch=SdwA3Ac4MqCTHZI18oq2rtgAcwbpHqnfdBGtm1Hhi7oq213nHTtVNA==). With all this walking, she's wearing out her red running shoes!
---
|
---
| Calling all volunteers! Team Ally needs YOU right now! In less than four weeks, our signature gathering effort begins. We need to gather at least 28,000 signatures from registered Utah Republicans to get Ally on the June ballot. In other words, WE NEED YOUR HELP!! Our next volunteer training meeting is on January 4. Click [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nqV_Fwr8YCiuCbNNzGZgiRJx-4xLDaOUnRK2gLsapJJWcnB81o4j0AUMpbRgGoUrnPIbhBJkgnuxT3iR4obRblMK2vFSQ2t0UhICqSMQ_KcXvUSibjUYa54cUEGnZKL2A9rAyrU-0HYB7I8OxJryp1F_YhDRG6DT8YphYMlXXJTAOhN8YGyBtjLspj-U0vlnHmYqGoBP8Xi0Equ27qAfFJilDAK6q-1vnqBb1U6lov1ZEmsVxNd-iHz04cAWjZBQ&c=P_V900kFdTa3WNEKAknEzX3XECd6fnrOmzdr4ctptco27gTX3zwi4A==&ch=SdwA3Ac4MqCTHZI18oq2rtgAcwbpHqnfdBGtm1Hhi7oq213nHTtVNA==) to sign up!
---
| Thank you for being a part of #TeamAlly. Your support makes all the difference. We need your help to broaden our reach across Utah. If you are interested in [volunteering](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nqV_Fwr8YCiuCbNNzGZgiRJx-4xLDaOUnRK2gLsapJJWcnB81o4j0NVswUWMGNKiMN-V2yPbf7It9mWuWGvA7VYk3YgD7AQS-xOSKc483zS2C1gvEK4H7rxE7aEEXNWA-fIejWNQymO8MC60ZRIhj6UE2NGeEqjw&c=P_V900kFdTa3WNEKAknEzX3XECd6fnrOmzdr4ctptco27gTX3zwi4A==&ch=SdwA3Ac4MqCTHZI18oq2rtgAcwbpHqnfdBGtm1Hhi7oq213nHTtVNA==) or [donating](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nqV_Fwr8YCiuCbNNzGZgiRJx-4xLDaOUnRK2gLsapJJWcnB81o4j0NVswUWMGNKiF_fMZ3tJKaefmCNyiVegtFoGP1NAYVZQxp5z1xRxXl9lee85jNQEtWkbgoKJ8FoqS4I_8tecHgz_p54Aioj3m2hInqL3eUYDM3bjlK22tn8OwC91JUHEiw==&c=P_V900kFdTa3WNEKAknEzX3XECd6fnrOmzdr4ctptco27gTX3zwi4A==&ch=SdwA3Ac4MqCTHZI18oq2rtgAcwbpHqnfdBGtm1Hhi7oq213nHTtVNA==), please do so! There's no time to waste.
---
| | | [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nqV_Fwr8YCiuCbNNzGZgiRJx-4xLDaOUnRK2gLsapJJWcnB81o4j0NVswUWMGNKiF_fMZ3tJKaefmCNyiVegtFoGP1NAYVZQxp5z1xRxXl9lee85jNQEtWkbgoKJ8FoqS4I_8tecHgz_p54Aioj3m2hInqL3eUYDM3bjlK22tn8OwC91JUHEiw==&c=P_V900kFdTa3WNEKAknEzX3XECd6fnrOmzdr4ctptco27gTX3zwi4A==&ch=SdwA3Ac4MqCTHZI18oq2rtgAcwbpHqnfdBGtm1Hhi7oq213nHTtVNA==)

| | | [VOLUNTEER](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nqV_Fwr8YCiuCbNNzGZgiRJx-4xLDaOUnRK2gLsapJJWcnB81o4j0NVswUWMGNKiMN-V2yPbf7It9mWuWGvA7VYk3YgD7AQS-xOSKc483zS2C1gvEK4H7rxE7aEEXNWA-fIejWNQymO8MC60ZRIhj6UE2NGeEqjw&c=P_V900kFdTa3WNEKAknEzX3XECd6fnrOmzdr4ctptco27gTX3zwi4A==&ch=SdwA3Ac4MqCTHZI18oq2rtgAcwbpHqnfdBGtm1Hhi7oq213nHTtVNA==)

Hey friends,
With radical right-wing candidates and outside Dark Money already influencing our race, our campaign is gearing up for a tough fight. I need to show that I have the support from our incredible grassroots team behind me. [**So today, I’m asking you to take a step towards being a fundamental member of our campaign by personally endorsing my campaign for Congress. Will you take 30 seconds to add your name?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39512047/320173833/889009077?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGQwOGJiMC0zOTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TK6GNxOUoa18EtQ-cD-Q867gfsXsRd4hJFVXa_2Vvag=&emci=e99dab1a-8f53-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=3dd08bb0-3959-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=18634996)

body:
Crime is rising and the Democrats are doing nothing...

Crime is spiking in Atlanta and other big cities across our country.
Stores are being looted and some are closing their doors for good as a result of the rising crime.
People are LEAVING Atlanta because they don't feel safe anymore!
What are Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden doing to crack down on the rising violence in our streets? NOTHING.
If we don't take the House back with strong conservative trailblazers in 2022, the crime wave will NEVER stop and American cities will continue to suffer.
In Congress, I will stand with our police and for law and order in our communities!

body:
Our movement to hold Sen. Sinema accountable is building momentum, and our message is getting out there. Just take a look at this: | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPNQ_f7nI8B3U0FoJ4nMXMGw90c-ckk5JvGKCF_8N3rQuwucQV-DeuYW86D_olQd-kWGmvZE-HTwadkvfUnjRn3XaSILp81Zcw-KQynu1c073XwthhvJmmtppqWzbPVbxfQym4ylR3k2AtppYEqPzoU30EUHemU9URcwVfWhkfOjcpgfOVjqD-ukFkqflzqjRAoZ8VuY087NbNjM2pP4YvYl_f8WlpVtO3IcqV0XC4M7C0HAUdl7AvyBIRicrUtAZqg/3hp/VcN-fWtcSIGtv_ZhK9tb_w/h0/aOG_gdxyEHSGaoHsf-8qyygzCPPX483p6jAIrODZBao)
Peter, Right now may be the most critical point of President Biden's term, particularly with Build Back Better hanging in the balance. Yet Senator Sinema continues to obstruct and weaken the president's agenda. | Peter,

We're a few days away from our mid-December fundraising deadline, and I'm writing to humbly ask for your support in helping us hold the House in 2022.

Retaining a Democratic majority in Congress enables us to continue enacting policy that improves the lives of Virginians. Without it, we may have never seen the historic infrastructure bill signed into law and with it the thousands of good-paying jobs it's set to create across our state.

We set ambitious fundraising goals each month, and meeting them is essential to building our campaign's momentum. Your contributions play a huge role in enabling Abigail to continue this important work, and we are so grateful for your support.

clean_body: The tolerant Left just called me a ‘Btch’ and ‘Fat Pig’ Despite hatred and vitriol from the far Left, I will never stop fighting for the things I believe in and standing up for our conservative values. We should never allow a small, radical minority to silence discussion. | Peter, I knew that when I decided to run for public office, I would have my life scrutinized and that personal attacks come with the territory. However, I have to admit, I was shocked to receive this vicious voicemail from a member of the Democrat Party who preach “tolerance” and “feminism for all.” HEAR THE AUDIO: Warning - Graphic Language 2 I have spent my life fighting tough battles. I’m a working mom with three children. I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school. I’m a practicing attorney who donates her time fighting for the underdog and taking on tough cases. As a conservative woman, I dare to have my own views, I defy what is expected of me from the Democrat Party and step out of line to express my conservative values. That terrifies the Left, which is why they turn to insults and verbal assault. I am a strong conservative woman and these comments cannot harm me. What concerns me is that there are people out there that think these attacks are okay because I dare to be a conservative... I am proud to think for myself and I am proud to be a Republican. Every American was born with the God-given right of freedom of thought. I will not tolerate the hateful attacks from the left, simply because I dare to stand up for our conservative values and the freedoms we are guaranteed as Americans. Now, I need your help to bring this fight straight to Washington, as Nevada’s next female Republican congresswoman.** Thank you, April Becker Republican for Congress (NV-03) | April Becker is a true Nevada success story. As a working mom with young children, April put herself through college and law school at UNLV. April is the owner of April Becker & Associates law firm and is a top-rated litigator and real estate attorney in Las Vegas.
