body:
Now that December is here, the "Season of Giving" has arrived. I get why we all seem to think of others who aren't as blessed as w
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/ccNsVxsjU/c?w=7zzRGo9jl0OBvIkgJWAgmvKeXKcExc6X6ZoStsKh5Z0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vc28vY2NOc1Z4c2pVP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)_**
---
| | |
---
| | LET'S HEAL WASHINGTON!
---
| | [](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/ccNsVxsjU/c?w=adltrnWrjN8nicfsHljKaNM9rfi746obsNJeTWq3lRI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPWdpdmluZ2VtYWlsJmFtb3VudD0yNTAiLCJyIjoiMDRkNmY0MTItYjk5Mi00MDUyLWYxYTctOTg3NGI3ZGM3YTExIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)
---
| | Now that December is here, the "Season of Giving" has arrived. I get why we all seem to think of others who aren't as blessed as we might be during the holidays but I'd prefer to keep it going year round. No matter if you celebrate the holidays from a religious viewpoint or a cultural one, giving enriches two lives. With that in mind, I'd like to mention a few ideas you might appreciate for charitable giving right now.
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/ccNsVxsjU/c?w=YnG13L3d0rEPUdnvIe6pFE1oKCCCy3izrKtb-lmZEOI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPWdpdmluZ2VtYWlsJmFtb3VudD0yNTAiLCJyIjoiMGRiZTkxZjgtNDRhYi00Y2Y5LWMzMDgtODdiNjZkYzA5MjQwIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)
---
| | The most obvious is the Toys for Tots campaign. They are an incredibly dedicated organization run by the United States Marine Corp. Marines across the country volunteer to aid in the collecting and distribution of toys to children who might not know the simple joy of gift on Christmas morning. Ninety-seven percent of donated dollars go directly to purchasing gifts ranging from toys to books to bicycles. You can search here for local gift centers and administrators in Washington. [https://www.toysfortots.org/](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/ccNsVxsjU/c?w=Vjt_480x4JhSueCYcLc9xw4_sj27MyjIXyT-RKutKE8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudG95c2ZvcnRvdHMub3JnLyIsInIiOiIxNzQyMDM3ZS03Mzc3LTQ3MWEtNDUyOC0wZjg5NDM2ZTkwOTMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)
Food banks are an excellent way to give back some of the benefits you may have that others do not. Especially in the wake of Covid, food banks have been overrun in the last two years and many struggle to keep up and return to their pre-Covid capabilities to help feed those who need a helping hand. While a toy or gift of a different nature brings joy, a complete meal seven nights a week brings stability to a household that is struggling.
For donations or links to partner food banks go to
[https://www.northwestharvest.org/our-work/hunger-response-network/](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/ccNsVxsjU/c?w=ni2RhZkWYw6f8igpik2-Upt6tn1wBX2-eCknBWf-C58.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubm9ydGh3ZXN0aGFydmVzdC5vcmcvb3VyLXdvcmsvaHVuZ2VyLXJlc3BvbnNlLW5ldHdvcmsvIiwiciI6IjE3NDIwMzdlLTczNzctNDcxYS00NTI4LTBmODk0MzZlOTA5MyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
Again, a toy is wonderful but the safety and warmth of real winter coat, new or used, can make all the difference in the health, safety and confidence of a child. "Coats for Kids" campaigns are one more way to offer those who face financial challenges, a sense of comfort and one less thing to worry about in the care of their children. [Lewis County Women United Coats for Kids Campaign 2021](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/ccNsVxsjU/c?w=iYS4qUSV-9a5SmwAt299sX34AEhlvcKxfbv9oXTHKQU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2hyb25saW5lLmNvbS9zdG9yaWVzL2xld2lzLWNvdW50eS13b21lbi11bml0ZWQtbGF1bmNoaW5nLWNvYXRzLWZvci1raWRzLWRyaXZlLDI3OTM2MiIsInIiOiIxNzQyMDM3ZS03Mzc3LTQ3MWEtNDUyOC0wZjg5NDM2ZTkwOTMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)
There are many other charities located within the 3rd District, Washington state and across the Nation that seek to bring a better day to those in need. Check with your local churches, synagogues, mosques, and community centers. Seek out and donate your time or money to the "kitchens" that feed those who are struggling. Gifts of blankets and basic cold weather clothing to the homeless are always a good way to serve our fellow citizens.
And remember, while much of what is given to charities at this time of year will serve past the holiday season, often they need to use your donation right now because they didn't receive enough through the previous year. Either way, at some point, your "gift" will touch the life or lives of those who are in need.
While I do sincerely hope you take this message for it's intentions; that giving during holiday season and all year round is a noble and generous thing to do, I am unfortunately going to ask you for a moment for me.
Grassroots funding a campaign is a lot of very rewarding and very difficult work. I am so grateful for each person, inside and outside of the 3rd District that have shown their faith in me by donating to our campaign. Yet, we are still in an uphill climb here. Voter outreach being the number one priority to grow name recognition, interest and support. So if you can find a way to continue supporting me, thank you. If the giving season leaves you a little "tight on budget", I get it. Really, I do. We all want the season to be all that it can with decorations, food and gifts of charity and a personal nature.
Thank you and TOGETHER LET'S [#FlipWA03](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/ccNsVxsjU/c?w=ybSQ_zFDnG5HtUyJBQS_3FLzheMxDcl3blvpa7DrNzA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9oYXNodGFnL0ZsaXBXQTAzP3NyYz1oYXNodGFnX2NsaWNrIiwiciI6IjE3NDIwMzdlLTczNzctNDcxYS00NTI4LTBmODk0MzZlOTA5MyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9) !
---
| |

clean_body: Now that December is here, the "Season of Giving" has arrived. I get why we all seem to think of others who aren't as blessed as w | | Can't see this message? | | | | | LET'S HEAL WASHINGTON! | | | | Now that December is here, the "Season of Giving" has arrived. I get why we all seem to think of others who aren't as blessed as we might be during the holidays but I'd prefer to keep it going year round. No matter if you celebrate the holidays from a religious viewpoint or a cultural one, giving enriches two lives. With that in mind, I'd like to mention a few ideas you might appreciate for charitable giving right now. | | | | | The most obvious is the Toys for Tots campaign. They are an incredibly dedicated organization run by the United States Marine Corp. Marines across the country volunteer to aid in the collecting and distribution of toys to children who might not know the simple joy of gift on Christmas morning. Ninety-seven percent of donated dollars go directly to purchasing gifts ranging from toys to books to bicycles. You can search here for local gift centers and administrators in Washington. Food banks are an excellent way to give back some of the benefits you may have that others do not. Especially in the wake of Covid, food banks have been overrun in the last two years and many struggle to keep up and return to their pre-Covid capabilities to help feed those who need a helping hand. While a toy or gift of a different nature brings joy, a complete meal seven nights a week brings stability to a household that is struggling. For donations or links to partner food banks go to Again, a toy is wonderful but the safety and warmth of real winter coat, new or used, can make all the difference in the health, safety and confidence of a child. "Coats for Kids" campaigns are one more way to offer those who face financial challenges, a sense of comfort and one less thing to worry about in the care of their children. There are many other charities located within the 3rd District, Washington state and across the Nation that seek to bring a better day to those in need. Check with your local churches, synagogues, mosques, and community centers. Seek out and donate your time or money to the "kitchens" that feed those who are struggling. Gifts of blankets and basic cold weather clothing to the homeless are always a good way to serve our fellow citizens. And remember, while much of what is given to charities at this time of year will serve past the holiday season, often they need to use your donation right now because they didn't receive enough through the previous year. Either way, at some point, your "gift" will touch the life or lives of those who are in need. While I do sincerely hope you take this message for it's intentions; that giving during holiday season and all year round is a noble and generous thing to do, I am unfortunately going to ask you for a moment for me. Grassroots funding a campaign is a lot of very rewarding and very difficult work. I am so grateful for each person, inside and outside of the 3rd District that have shown their faith in me by donating to our campaign. Yet, we are still in an uphill climb here. Voter outreach being the number one priority to grow name recognition, interest and support. So if you can find a way to continue supporting me, thank you. If the giving season leaves you a little "tight on budget", I get it. Really, I do. We all want the season to be all that it can with decorations, food and gifts of charity and a personal nature. Thank you and TOGETHER LET'S ! | | | I want to represent WA-03 to: Defend your rights as and families. Aim for the , written into law. Protect a with protected reproductive care, written into law. Securing our of facts, good or bad. | | If a friend forwarded you this email, don't miss the next! | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . When I ran for governor, I came into this fight with one goal: ******bring Nevadans together and get work done.**
And that’s exactly what we’ve been able to do -- we’ve _expanded voting rights, worked to give teachers a raise, stood with unions, and increased the minimum wage._
All eyes are on Battleground Nevada right now to see if we’ll be able to defend our progress against our radical right-wing opponents who want to flip this state red. But, I believe in the power of this grassroots team, and I know that with your help, we’ll be able to Keep Nevada Blue in 2022.

clean_body: | | | | | Hi folks, I’ll come right out and say it: I’m facing an uphill battle for reelection, and my six Republican opponents are ready to do whatever it takes to unseat me and roll back the progressive legislation I’ve passed. That’s why I’m personally asking for your help. | | | | | When I ran for governor, I came into this fight with one goal: ****bring Nevadans together and get work done. And that’s exactly what we’ve been able to do -- we’ve expanded voting rights, worked to give teachers a raise, stood with unions, and increased the minimum wage. All eyes are on Battleground Nevada right now to see if we’ll be able to defend our progress against our radical right-wing opponents who want to flip this state red. But, I believe in the power of this grassroots team, and I know that with your help, we’ll be able to Keep Nevada Blue in 2022. ** | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much, Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor** P.O. Box 850 Las Vegas, NV 89125 mailto:info@stevesisolak.com | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Sisolak for Nevada, please .

| Do you ever wonder why it's only true America First fighters who take a stand for your interests and not the Swamp RINOs like Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, and too many others?
Just look at who funds them...
The RINOs grift off special interest groups and PACs, serving their corporate, Big Tech masters until they land that six-figure lobbyist gig.

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv5mufartu5k5763gm4ihc922c57l0p5iuoi6qng_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u8o72db46jhbepphc8ob0tdn6ji34c77c3hm1d5i6aqr2djledjbcp5leaor6dpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphgeiqj0ptnctj32t5l6jjr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or6cjg61pr7cjie49fg)
| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn62pdkmohufsgqj9hkmosnnltq7dopn1cbhsf1g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1geepr4sjh2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdfg2vv1dbl8skeugngh3t3c48koje86n56jj2fg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1geepr4sjh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrnvdodi19l4fpcaklbk0o89b3cmaq79shm3mloo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1geepr4sjh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z9cccn3mrgpfb99aae142f4cj5o5ln621okfkj80).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z57pqlt59c60onnlphvasoe3lk6ldue2m0qd1uo0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cjg61pr7cjie49fg)

name: American Defense News
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcni1fv05tab8i5uvp04j5das02jptospc2pqg10_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpj8o36mio64otmm5h62c5l6erj3cbmmgp72thmc6p34pbkm3jmfc70c3i69d5nmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3im5j78ppl6krr5cb6ehgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cpie0o77c9ie0oh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd3o64qbfbscgg2b2h3su674v2dfmukq1l6kdnf8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1geeoj4s1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3fklatus4cnitemj2rp9ecnadon36ab9bihllho_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1geeoj4s1h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu63fljl7bct3oifhm5mdliq59as06cjb3qpvp5g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1geeoj4s1h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: Will you support Stacey Abrams and Charlie as they take on Republican governors?

body:

---

---

Friend,

Stacey Abrams announced she’s running for **_governor of Georgia_** in 2022, and here in Florida, we couldn’t be happier. Cook Political Report is even calling her race a toss-up!

Stacey is a tremendous public servant who’s worked tirelessly to build a Georgia where everyone succeeds, no matter their educational background, income, or zip code.

**But like Charlie, Stacey is taking on a far-right governor who’s desperately trying to _suppress the vote_. In short, we won’t be able to win our elections without an outpouring of support.**
[Add your name:
I’m committed to winning in Florida and Georgia](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39513012/320178599/470946753?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGNhMzZiYi0zZTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=93Kj8PFqjHwjZ5gI0lhy9UzDLBXtxSOXhZpcI0WJ_3w=&emci=8e4b0d1d-7c58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a8ca36bb-3e59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=8807089)

We need 1,000 committed supporters by tonight! **
In Georgia, Gov. Brian Kemp signed the first post-2020 voter suppression bill into law -- and Gov. DeSantis followed his example only a few months later.

Both governors will pull out all the stops to protect their power, so if Stacey and Charlie want to win next year, we need to build out our campaigns and start reaching out to voters ASAP.

**[If you’re ready to elect Democratic governors in Florida and Georgia, please add your name to show us we have supporters we can depend on!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39513014/320178601/470946753?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGNhMzZiYi0zZTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=93Kj8PFqjHwjZ5gI0lhy9UzDLBXtxSOXhZpcI0WJ_3w=&emci=8e4b0d1d-7c58-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a8ca36bb-3e59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=8807089)**

name: Team Chelsea
subject: We are lining up for battle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202
body:
The fight in our state Supreme Court over the redistricting process is right in front of us.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39513082/320178839/738274465?refcode=EM_FR_211209supreme_N_CC_TC_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjVjODk0NS0zZjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d6VZgzJWPG8ZqI_i8SQC_t4n319TBXrDZDNMgEKMdN4=)
---
Hi Team, When we think about fighting for the right to vote, we look to the past. We think about the suffragettes and the Civil Rights Movement. Who would have thought that we’d still be in those same fights today? The fight in our state Supreme Court over the redistricting process is here and now. Right now, plans are being made by GOP opponents all across Ohio to decide whether or not your voice matters. They’re amassing their forces on the side against your rights. Their side believes your right to vote should be decided based on where you live, not what the Constitution says. [**Let’s show them that we mean business too. Can you chip in to show we want a Secretary of State who doesn’t play these sorts of games?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39513083/320178840/-1782880963?refcode=EM_FR_211209supreme_N_CC_TC_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjVjODk0NS0zZjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d6VZgzJWPG8ZqI_i8SQC_t4n319TBXrDZDNMgEKMdN4=) Redistricting shouldn’t be this complicated. It should be about a hardworking person like Chelsea bridging the gap between what the people need and how our government can best serve them. [**As this case moves forward, remember there’s a candidate in this race who won’t stand for you being treated like a pawn instead of a person. The more we raise, the stronger the message we send. Can you help us with a donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39513084/320178841/-1782880963?refcode=EM_FR_211209supreme_N_CC_TC_5_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjVjODk0NS0zZjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d6VZgzJWPG8ZqI_i8SQC_t4n319TBXrDZDNMgEKMdN4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39513085/320178842/1372638257?refcode=EM_FR_211209supreme_N_CC_TC_5_NG_N_el10&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjVjODk0NS0zZjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d6VZgzJWPG8ZqI_i8SQC_t4n319TBXrDZDNMgEKMdN4=)

We think about the suffragettes and the Civil Rights Movement. Who would have thought that we’d still be in those same fights today? The fight in our state Supreme Court over the redistricting process is here and now. Right now, plans are being made by GOP opponents all across Ohio to decide whether or not your voice matters. They’re amassing their forces on the side against your rights. Their side believes your right to vote should be decided based on where you live, not what the Constitution says. = Redistricting shouldn’t be this complicated. name: MISSING: Vaccine Survey Response
subject: Missing your Vaccine Mandate Response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I'm not seeing your name on the list of conservatives who have taken our four question vaccine mandate survey [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6653%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Nq2XUTkWy6tkveqh6SYiKA&sysid=1)

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68757%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oGcHMY10o1NvL1EPgFkoyw&sysid=1)
---

Fellow American,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 21 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68758%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E0QDKFCyghaIexsIsSQ7HQ&sysid=1)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68759%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hy0Q6LJiGJCki1MTzA0oDg&sysid=1)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, December 8th

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW→**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68750%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vUdfmHey0Y1TB0Oz4iKqqQ&sysid=1)

---

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!** Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68751%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VoPVSzbiDAtv1E6NKomp3g&sysid=1)**

Thanks for letting us know -

Thank you,
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68752%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EEA7tnzTlnyrvl2v594X%2bw&sysid=1)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW→**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68750%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vUdfmHey0Y1TB0Oz4iKqqQ&sysid=1)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

clean_body: Robert Francis O’Rourke is not just wrong for Texas, he is dangerous. | Peter, I do not think my radical leftist opponent for Texas Governor could have been clearer. If Robert Francis O’Rourke is sworn into office, every gun owner in Texas will be an immediate target of the state. Murder, assault, rape, and robbery are skyrocketing across Texas and the first thing my Socialist opponent wants to do is take away law-abiding Texans’ most effective tool of self-defense. Robert Francis O’Rourke is not just wrong for Texas, he is dangerous. If you want a leader with a proven track record for defending our Second Amendment, I am hated on the left for my unwavering support of the Second Amendment. Democrats and ultra-Leftist megadonors from across the country will spend millions to keep me out of office. As your next Governor, I have this response that will infuriate the Robert Francis O’Rourke and his army of leftist trolls: “Hell no, you will never take our AR-15s or any of our guns.” This election is about our most fundamental freedom as Americans. Steadfast and Loyal, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Will You Help Us Fight for You?
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch continues continue to blaze new trails as America's preeminent government watchdog group, and we continue to perform the all-important work of battling _against_ public corruption and _for_ the rule of law.
Without a doubt, America needs Judicial Watch as much as we need you:

* **To battle successfully for honest elections**. We do the job the Department of Justice fails to do by suing states (including **California** , **Indiana** , **Kentucky** and **Ohio)** in federal court to clean their voter rolls as required by federal law. As I write you today, we are pursuing lawsuits against **Colorado, Illinois, North Carolina** and **Pennsylvania** over voter list-related issues. And last month, we filed "warning letters" against 14 counties and five states regarding evident violations of the National Voter Registration Action. _We will sue them if they do_ _not correct these violations in a timely fashion_.

* **To use state open records laws and the courts to expose the abuse of taxpayer dollars to promote "Critical Race Theory**" **propaganda**. We forced the release of "smoking gun" documents in **Maryland, Massachusetts** and**Virginia** showing American students being indoctrinated at taxpayer expense in this racist, hateful, Marxist and profoundly un-American theory. We are now expanding these investigations into other jurisdictions.

| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57341&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

I love telling you about our successes...and these are just two examples...but we are not resting on our laurels or taking victory laps...the challenges facing us today are far too great for that!

Between attacks on honest elections, the spread of Critical Race Theory, the Biden border crisis, and the Biden administration's contempt for the rule of law - Judicial Watch has its hands full!

Our investigators are **_right now_** filing Freedom of Information Act requests, and our lawyers are **_right now_** filing lawsuits against government agencies and corrupt politicians and bureaucrats.

That's why I ask you to _[make a special tax-deductible gift to Judicial Watch now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57341&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)_.

We are carrying our largest caseload in our history and must be ready to take on new challenges to the rule of law as they arise...

**_... And these days, challenges arise nearly daily_**!

[By joining Judicial Watch now, and supporting us with a tax-deductible contribution](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57341&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=), I assure you that Judicial Watch will keep fighting effectively as America's largest and most effective independent conservative watchdog.

Thank you for helping us.

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57341&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Add your name: Lauren Boebert must be removed from her committee assignments.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Lauren Boebert weaponized racism and anti-Muslim hate for likes. Hatred like this has no place in the halls of Congress.
#
Peter,
A few weeks ago, a video went viral of Colorado Rep. Lauren Boebert spewing bigoted and Islamophobic remarks.
Peter, Charles understands that comments like this have no place in Congress. Dangerous, hateful behavior like Boebert’s has no place in our society. Left unchecked, comments like this will only embolden further violence and bigotry.
**[That’s why we’re thankful for a recent House Resolution introduced by Rep. Ayanna Pressley, which would remove Boebert from her committee assignments. Will you join Team Booker and add your name in support of this resolution today?](https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/remove-lauren-boebert-from-committee-assignments?source=em20211209&t=1&akid=1318%2E346206%2Etf49EZ)**
**[Add your name»](https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/remove-lauren-boebert-from-committee-assignments?source=em20211209&t=2&akid=1318%2E346206%2Etf49EZ)**
The unfortunate thing is, Peter, this isn’t the first time we’ve heard of Islamophobia and bigotry in the halls of Congress.
Representatives like Cori Bush have described Capitol Hill as a toxic work environment for Muslim members and staff — a place where Islamophobia goes unchecked with no consequences. It’s an urgent reminder of why we’re fighting so hard to send Charles to D.C. and of our agenda to bring love, compassion, and justice back to politics.
Lauren Boebert weaponized racism and anti-Muslim hate for likes. We can’t stand by while our Muslim loved ones are attacked. This can’t continue; her actions must be met with consequences.
**[We need to make sure that those in Congress know that we have their backs. Please add your name in support of removing Lauren Boebert from her committee assignments in Congress today:](https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/remove-lauren-boebert-from-committee-assignments?source=em20211209&t=3&akid=1318%2E346206%2Etf49EZ)**
**[Add your name»](https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/remove-lauren-boebert-from-committee-assignments?source=em20211209&t=4&akid=1318%2E346206%2Etf49EZ)**
Thank you for speaking up,
Team Booker

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211209-1318-footer&t=5&refcode2=1318_346206_tf49EZ&akid=1318%2E346206%2Etf49EZ)**
---

We know that smaller class sizes help students succeed.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39513435/320180336/47178721?refcode=EM_FR_211209MSNBC_N_SB_90DO_5_G_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWViZDU3Ni00MTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nbDp3W7HPr-YRDO2Ai2bMMZwUsZYEDhtI2tBkTlrSz8=) Peter, earlier today, I sat down with MSNBC’s Morning Joe to discuss a pivotal issue for our children’s futures. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39513436/320180337/646843223?refcode=EM_FR_211209MSNBC_N_SB_90DO_5_G_TESTA_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWViZDU3Ni00MTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nbDp3W7HPr-YRDO2Ai2bMMZwUsZYEDhtI2tBkTlrSz8=) **Classroom sizes in Northeast Ohio and across the country have grown overcrowded** , and it’s hurting our children. We know that smaller class sizes help students succeed. That’s why I joined Rep. Lucy McBath and Senator Jeff Merkley to invest in reducing class size.

Across the country, school boards have become increasingly politicized. **Now more than ever, we need representatives like me who will focus on our shared values to create the change we need.**

name: Tony Vargas
subject: I wish I didn't have to ask --
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
We have to at least try...

|
---

| | I wish I didn’t have to ask you for money. [**_But I’m running for one of the most flippable seats in the country. Winning hinges on having the resources to reach as many voters as possible, and right now I’m trailing behind my Republican opponent's $260,000 fundraising lead. I’m an everyday person and I can’t bankroll my campaign, so I’m asking: will you chip in $5 before midnight? I need 722 gifts before the end of the year to hit my fundraising goal, and it’s going to be a race to the finish._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39513455/320180358/1129282168?refcode=20211209_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=5&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWNkODE5Ny00MTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z_c6WiJ9KqO6f4N-tXvCNPX5nqDR_aNRZD38ngwtOOc=)

Let me explain how I know everyday people, like you and me, can win this race. Growing up, my family didn’t have money. We struggled to make ends meet. When I told my parents I was running for office, they didn’t believe I could win. You see, they’re originally from Perú, where only the elite run for office. But I knew I could win and prove to them that America is different. [**_That was a really tough race. But I won because grassroots supporters like you believed we needed more everyday people in office. We showed everyone that you don’t have to have a personal fortune to get elected -- and now I need your help to do it again. I’m up against my final fundraising deadline before the election year, and I need 722 gifts to hit my goal and catch up to my Republican opponent. Can I count on you to help push me over the finish line?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39513456/320180359/1129282168?refcode=20211209_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=5&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWNkODE5Ny00MTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z_c6WiJ9KqO6f4N-tXvCNPX5nqDR_aNRZD38ngwtOOc=) I know the tough choices everyday Americans face. I know what it’s like to live without a safety net. I know what it’s like to maybe not have the money to donate today. But I promise that in Congress, I will fight for everyday people like us. (Unlike my current Congressman, who left us behind when he voted to cut taxes for billionaires and corporations.) That’s why I don’t like asking you for your hard-earned money. But if I didn’t at least try, we would never have a shot at winning this race. [**_I am so grateful for the support you’ve shown me. I know money around this time of year can be tough. But I also know that if we all band together, we can defy the odds and win this race for everyday folks across the country \-- just like we’ve done before. Can I count on your $5 before my final deadline of the year to help me get there?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39513457/320180360/1129282168?refcode=20211209_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=5&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWNkODE5Ny00MTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z_c6WiJ9KqO6f4N-tXvCNPX5nqDR_aNRZD38ngwtOOc=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39513458/320180361/1129282168?refcode=20211209_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWNkODE5Ny00MTU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z_c6WiJ9KqO6f4N-tXvCNPX5nqDR_aNRZD38ngwtOOc=)

clean_body: We have to at least try... | | | I wish I didn’t have to ask you for money. = Let me explain how I know everyday people, like you and me, can win this race. Growing up, my family didn’t have money. We struggled to make ends meet. When I told my parents I was running for office, they didn’t believe I could win. You see, they’re originally from Perú, where only the elite run for office. But I knew I could win and prove to them that America is different. = I know the tough choices everyday Americans face. I know what it’s like to live without a safety net. I know what it’s like to maybe not have the money to donate today. But I promise that in Congress, I will fight for everyday people like us. (Unlike my current Congressman, who left us behind when he voted to cut taxes for billionaires and corporations.) That’s why I don’t like asking you for your hard-earned money. But if I didn’t at least try, we would never have a shot at winning this race. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you from the bottom of my heart, = = | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream. This fight is also high stakes. name: Dr. Oz
subject: Remember “two weeks to flatten thecurve”?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate
body:
Washington doesn’t have the solutions

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3qegbrgo1vihjmi5s0i5lkhrhcrd06i6o9ead3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1ge9o32c5h2bs)
---
Friends,

**As a Doctor, I spend a lot of time thinking about what went wrong with COVID.** How did we so fundamentally mishandle COVID? I’ve realized that the issue points to our nation’s core issues: our system is broken, and Washington isn’t equipped to find the real solutions.

**Remember the phrase “two weeks to flatten the curve?”** That metastasized into this incredibly authoritarian government overreach that didn’t necessarily make us safer. Career politicians demonstrated hypocrisy at its finest. They sent our kids home, locked us up indoors, and even closed parks and beaches. They demanded that we bow down to all mandates, whether it was curfews, masks, or even vaccines.
| [**STOP THE OVERREACH**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zct3so6kgtjgm0j47ethh9glg2keas64jbn9mkpo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1ge9o32c5h2bs)
---

**They’re threatening the same government overreach now with the Omicron variant.** Our nation can’t go into lockdown again. It’s simply not the solution. It causes businesses to shutter, kids to lose years of education, and put simply: __it’s an assault on our freedoms.__

I’ve fought to empower my supporters, my audience, and now the people of Pennsylvania, to make their own choices. I’ve gone to battle with Big Pharma, Big Tech, and Agrochem companies. I cannot be bought. I’m running for the U.S. Senate to find these solutions and heal America today, but I need your support. [**Join me now!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7encqnugjqlsjv0ubou82a5dt8l7cgl91d1jtk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s1ge9o32c5h2bs)

We came up well short of our November fundraising goal, and I’ve got to say that’s not good. Now I can take a punch, but I don’t want to take one if I can avoid it. **[So, if you’re able and willing to help me out, it’d mean the world to me if you’d rush what you can to support my re-election campaign for 2022.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68762%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aoqVhNbG9WfAzcY18UvGPQ&sysid=1)** | [RUSH YOUR SUPPORT HERE](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68763%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CIXrKyqEyd2UtD47SuI4RA&sysid=1)

name: Wisconsin Senate Alert via SarahforWisconsin.com
subject: Poll shows only one Democrat ahead of Ron Johnson in U.S. Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
A top-rated _FiveThirtyEight_ pollster released a new poll showing Sarah Godlewski leading Ron Johnson in a head-to-head matchup — she’s the only Democrat pulling ahead of him in recent polling. We can’t get too comfortable. Sarah is only ahead by two points and outside groups will pour millions into Wisconsin to keep this Senate seat red. Not to mention, Ron Johnson is expected to announce he’s running for re-election very soon and his allies will spend whatever it takes to try to sink us, which means we need to be ready for anything.

**Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control.** Major election forecasters are already ranking this race a toss-up, and _CNN_ is calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable GOP incumbent senator up in 2022. This latest statewide poll of the U.S. Senate race in Wisconsin proves Sarah is our best shot to defeat him, and your support will make a big difference.

[**We already know this race is going to be a dead heat until the end, which means we’ll need the strongest candidate to take on Ron Johnson. Please, if you can, donate toward our end-of-year FEC deadline to help Sarah Godlewski flip Wisconsin blue and protect the Democratic majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39513641/320181047/-1116050000?refcode=em21_211209_mm1_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211209_mm1_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTEwZDVjNC00MjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a5vtwWvSpI1wQIEowLmpYD-YdhSkxcb98ivqdsRWAbM=)

We have real momentum in this race: We see it in the polls, the energy here in Wisconsin, and even in the desperate actions of the Wisconsin GOP who are already taking cheap shots at our campaign. But we must grow and sustain that momentum to win.

Sarah has never taken a dime from corporate PACs, and she is not going to spend a minute of this campaign asking special interests for donations. That’s not how we plan to win. Our campaign is relying on people like you to stand with us in the fights ahead.

Thank you for all you’ve done so far and will continue to do to help us flip this seat.

— Team Sarah

Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. She's the only Democrat in this race who has won statewide twice. With your help, she can defeat Ron Johnson, too. Hello everyone,
My husband Michael and I had the privilege of serving our nation together for almost three decades.
Different schools, new doctors, different commute, pack up and unpack, good-byes to old friends and hellos to new neighbors — we moved from state-to-state and overseas. I didn’t know married life to a naval officer would be so busy or so enriching when we married in 1989. (Yes, I would do it over again!)
As a family, we were better for it. Our children saw many new schools, sometimes as many as three in a single year, and they were accepting of those disruptions to their lives. Deployments were made more tolerable when email came along, but Michael’s absence was always felt around the dinner table, on holidays, and during family events.
**No challenge we faced these last three decades, though, compares to the demands of running for the U.S. Senate.** Yet this is exactly why my husband is undertaking this next level of service — because he has consistently made the impossible look doable and the difficult look commonplace. If anyone can beat Chuck Grassley, he can do it. My sense is that the nation needs people like him.
Admiral Michael Franken, my hubby, is the right person to be Iowa’s next Senator. I believe in him, and I know he will wow you, as well. His soul is Iowa’s. **But if Mike is going to win, turn Iowa blue, and fix the many challenges Iowa, its citizens, and this nation face, he needs your help today.**
**Getting his message before every Iowa voter will take significant funding, especially against a 46-year incumbent like Chuck Grassley who has the backing of corporate PACs and special interests.** [**Please, can Mike count on you to make a donation right now to his campaign and help him defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect the Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39513931/320182503/-42398318?refcode=em20211209pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWI4MjFjMS00MzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RCkX8SOtoX97iVv3mYjMHJEwUJ9C9ZE2ITMHV7QQ7Hg=)

clean_body: = Hello everyone, My husband Michael and I had the privilege of serving our nation together for almost three decades. Different schools, new doctors, different commute, pack up and unpack, good-byes to old friends and hellos to new neighbors — we moved from state-to-state and overseas. I didn’t know married life to a naval officer would be so busy or so enriching when we married in 1989. (Yes, I would do it over again!) As a family, we were better for it. Our children saw many new schools, sometimes as many as three in a single year, and they were accepting of those disruptions to their lives. Deployments were made more tolerable when email came along, but Michael’s absence was always felt around the dinner table, on holidays, and during family events. No challenge we faced these last three decades, though, compares to the demands of running for the U.S. Senate. Yet this is exactly why my husband is undertaking this next level of service — because he has consistently made the impossible look doable and the difficult look commonplace. If anyone can beat Chuck Grassley, he can do it. My sense is that the nation needs people like him. Admiral Michael Franken, my hubby, is the right person to be Iowa’s next Senator. I believe in him, and I know he will wow you, as well. His soul is Iowa’s. But if Mike is going to win, turn Iowa blue, and fix the many challenges Iowa, its citizens, and this nation face, he needs your help today. Getting his message before every Iowa voter will take significant funding, especially against a 46-year incumbent like Chuck Grassley who has the backing of corporate PACs and special interests. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’ve seen Michael completely at ease when speaking with international leaders and just as easily as the farmers he worked for some 45 years ago. body:
That’s why I want to make it clear where I stand and my vision... | |
---
[](http://links.keeneyforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aed21f976a07410f8206002471f0b00c&_m=d61da053da634fa8acc90e2a918736ab&_e=j4S_BWpg3PsTf9AcQLaeX34kkWXi65a_ZEYm2hIdAN5sDht03poeoagCvH9TX8lN8bwOeXGpNNatyp3QAhIijI76Pws7BxDLvVpwEbA3hjjYdK7kXw-htFT4ed7scP9llzG0x3a5cEcFAhim3_05Ab5YT5iDlrZngqb4rHEkpvKz9MIKitOOe7lvFhd_t_vcQB1PisPd2OwvKfdSimpeJVz_1eyO7Otq9TQbmZ_We5MUgDeHeWGw-spq5A2oiklVGz6q6_9zR19UMT_t52YZN5JunoFIolhvl7CI7ofb2eMG-wvdNY0mocWr00o3kprGtO-c4z9hrJeBW2BtyGmP58SLh0nHiOPfIJW-ZaYR9qCZfOM4ueoIefXsLNzil8llhPHop2zBnBjcax14Ke7cpLyJ5szovHnqZfcRHqLdu_UQ8EJLWfhOx3zuyhZhwcrlz-tWUQ87smN4l4ffnKHUPO7obEFbcVTHSq4YwxaaqQ95jBwPlC66VwK1tSkCtDEvRGiMUOODiqZ9nf0z1qZ97A%3D%3D)
|
---
Hi friend, it’s Taylor Keeney.

In Central Virginia, we’ve gotten accustomed to Abigail Spanberger, who campaigns one way and votes another.

That’s why I want to make it clear where I stand and my vision for Central Virginia.

**Here’s where I stand on the issues:**

** _INFLATION AND SUPPLY CHAIN_ **

Big government handouts are hurting our economy and our fiscal future, leading to small business owners struggling to hire workers and massive inflation across the board.

**Biden has only compounded the problem by further disrupting the supply chain and crushing small businesses across the country.**

Not only will I fight against Washington’s big spending, but I will also work to make sure Main Street flourishes by supporting our small businesses and helping them grow.
[**🇺🇸 I’ll Fight for Main Street 🇺🇸**](http://links.keeneyforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aed21f976a07410f8206002471f0b00c&_m=d61da053da634fa8acc90e2a918736ab&_e=j4S_BWpg3PsTf9AcQLaeX34kkWXi65a_ZEYm2hIdAN5sDht03poeoagCvH9TX8lN8bwOeXGpNNatyp3QAhIijI76Pws7BxDLvVpwEbA3hjjYdK7kXw-htFT4ed7scP9llzG0x3a5cEcFAhim3_05Ab5YT5iDlrZngqb4rHEkpvKz9MIKitOOe7lvFhd_t_vcQB1PisPd2OwvKfdSimpeJVz_1eyO7Otq9TQbmZ_We5MUgDeHeWGw-spq5A2oiklVGz6q6_9zR19UMT_t52YZN5JunoFIolhvl7CI7ofb2eMG-wvdNY0mocWr00o3kprGrb6xPXXi5C03VTu_DrVdicOTOjtlvPsoLG_ELO_G3dl060TydldlfxqmUiTYodxmIWVALc-OMhh30BVsLp3KRpWp4GTo1Li4fvsI67v00bQHyqIgYlMm24jkuS_x8kdvpicpfy5i-fmwDulX-_Px_siWuIaFRGptJuO3DxxsM_xNSBGBQ3GUyXgfOuMMjwmxf2D7IjkvIC-YsWwEksijiQ%3D%3D)
|
---
|
---
|
---
** **_**EDUCATION**_** **

**Children must come first when it comes to education.** Not the teacher’s unions.

We must ensure that every child has access to a high-quality, in-person education.

Parents have lost control over what is being taught to their children and their children’s opportunities to succeed. November 2nd was a referendum led by families; we must keep that progress going. **It’s time we make sure parents have a say in their child’s education.**
[**🇺🇸 I’ll Fix Our Education System 🇺🇸**](http://links.keeneyforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aed21f976a07410f8206002471f0b00c&_m=d61da053da634fa8acc90e2a918736ab&_e=j4S_BWpg3PsTf9AcQLaeX34kkWXi65a_ZEYm2hIdAN5sDht03poeoagCvH9TX8lN8bwOeXGpNNatyp3QAhIijI76Pws7BxDLvVpwEbA3hjjYdK7kXw-htFT4ed7scP9llzG0x3a5cEcFAhim3_05Ab5YT5iDlrZngqb4rHEkpvKz9MIKitOOe7lvFhd_t_vcQB1PisPd2OwvKfdSimpeJVz_1eyO7Otq9TQbmZ_We5MUgDeHeWGw-spq5A2oiklVGz6q6_9zR19UMT_t52YZN5JunoFIolhvl7CI7ofb2eMG-wvdNY0mocWr00o3kprGc-FnNdfe2nSMEZ5Lm668oB8ADRXai5G2JPI3O3PDNVJQfr3OwfnY7tIfMQdvnPSIkEWtwkSnAgrF3OAaVzkkabXjedqiU-o9EmbTvj9xXk-d56S5h7gf9Cv4v96jZaL750Dci5gMrCHmkvBJi97a9E0k8hODePDsy9R39pQXJ_p9tDqpKg1DD3jFDIw-CWAmQHF_nDLIVbxuZh--cT3r0g%3D%3D)
|
---
|
---
|
---
** _THE 2ND AMENDMENT_ **

As a gun owner and constitutional conservative myself, I strongly believe in the importance of our right to keep and bear arms. I will defend every American’s Second Amendment rights.

In Congress, I will push back against gun-grabbing liberals and protect our constitutional rights.
[**🇺🇸 I’ll Safeguard the 2nd Amendment 🇺🇸**](http://links.keeneyforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aed21f976a07410f8206002471f0b00c&_m=d61da053da634fa8acc90e2a918736ab&_e=j4S_BWpg3PsTf9AcQLaeX34kkWXi65a_ZEYm2hIdAN5sDht03poeoagCvH9TX8lN8bwOeXGpNNatyp3QAhIijI76Pws7BxDLvVpwEbA3hjjYdK7kXw-htFT4ed7scP9llzG0x3a5cEcFAhim3_05Ab5YT5iDlrZngqb4rHEkpvKz9MIKitOOe7lvFhd_t_vcQB1PisPd2OwvKfdSimpeJVz_1eyO7Otq9TQbmZ_We5MUgDeHeWGw-spq5A2oiklVGz6q6_9zR19UMT_t52YZN5JunoFIolhvl7CI7ofb2eMG-wvdNY0mocWr00o3kprGGFTIz38d30YK8Up_XrL2ZS5yA7ewASubuSfCuk7bgRsxOmojVb-e69lE3aqGUjLgfvB5MxDrEWatj8v9tZpVRzE_1NzwR9C5vLKZNTdOvfQ9ew3hAFGPdhP8T91ueqazswa3XZTL_uP5kb7cj8irbXVAi6S3p63q8QTDX3TsrDQP96KiwdB1eERRfXcSyWTsmBrKvWjb2UzQXUnTKF545w%3D%3D)
|
---
|
---
|
---
** _ELECTION REFORM_ **

It’s clear that there is a fundamental and dangerous lack of faith in our elections. _Especially now, with Democrats pushing legislation that would amount to a radical takeover of our election system._

The time has come to take action to preserve the integrity of our electoral process. We need real election reform in this country that ensures the integrity of our elections. _**This includes preventing fraud and supporting nationwide voter ID.**_
[**🇺🇸 I’ll Support Nationwide Voter ID 🇺🇸**](http://links.keeneyforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aed21f976a07410f8206002471f0b00c&_m=d61da053da634fa8acc90e2a918736ab&_e=j4S_BWpg3PsTf9AcQLaeX34kkWXi65a_ZEYm2hIdAN5sDht03poeoagCvH9TX8lN8bwOeXGpNNatyp3QAhIijI76Pws7BxDLvVpwEbA3hjjYdK7kXw-htFT4ed7scP9llzG0x3a5cEcFAhim3_05Ab5YT5iDlrZngqb4rHEkpvKz9MIKitOOe7lvFhd_t_vcQB1PisPd2OwvKfdSimpeJVz_1eyO7Otq9TQbmZ_We5MUgDeHeWGw-spq5A2oiklVGz6q6_9zR19UMT_t52YZN5JunoFIolhvl7CI7ofb2eMG-wvdNY0mocWr00o3kprGRG9NtP_xtQnDHwiSLtvmI8N1rptyEJSYoCVQZ1xBylgDUUnbPPiUV_Di7IxTEbF48xzyZ35j6FLpQ4sXcHUxa5z7qbOOLNIY-dQIepIR8ZiDnfR8WAalBOR_NBrrktJIqSr1ocks2FGlt6ZwR5Jui0ItfyrETtWQCzJicOVtadN9_-mxE6d2XndcBO7-m4i2dY17TMwLZmcQz3eZ1badxw%3D%3D)
|
---
|
---
|
---
I know how to tackle these issues and get things done - because I have done it my entire career right here in the 7th District. And that’s exactly what I will do in Congress for VA-07.

**_[Please consider chipping in a small donation of just $5 right now to help me lead on these issues in Congress >>](http://links.keeneyforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aed21f976a07410f8206002471f0b00c&_m=d61da053da634fa8acc90e2a918736ab&_e=j4S_BWpg3PsTf9AcQLaeX34kkWXi65a_ZEYm2hIdAN5sDht03poeoagCvH9TX8lN8bwOeXGpNNatyp3QAhIijI76Pws7BxDLvVpwEbA3hjjYdK7kXw-htFT4ed7scP9llzG0x3a5cEcFAhim3_05Ab5YT5iDlrZngqb4rHEkpvKz9MIKitOOe7lvFhd_t_vcQB1PisPd2OwvKfdSimpeJVz_1eyO7Otq9TQbmZ_We5MUgDeHeWGw-spq5A2oiklVGz6q6_9zR19UMT_t52YZN5JunoFIolhvl7CI7ofb2eMG-wvdNY0mocWr00o3kprGqwIbOaQpx9-fQhP_ovz55DwAAd-0eDI0-nRws0Kt-XxK4Kna6uKGHGUQNgmYdBW71XBHYs44a_NzMgseSzWIKbrH6PDQjywZyjzYBsbze5536wndQ4MpwplsiwVzMc6sdd-X4U0252pldWRG2kVfazzGuvUcUsioSMeQwrrWsWSSJEtgKOj8h6pjtV7JK_ENpvhF7YjtDPFl7jopUu6rtQ%3D%3D)_**

Thank you,
Taylor Keeney
---
---
| |
---

| Taylor Keeney for Congress PO Box 29289 Henrico, VA 23242 |
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com |

In Congress, I will push back against gun-grabbing liberals and protect our constitutional rights. | | | ELECTION REFORM It’s clear that there is a fundamental and dangerous lack of faith in our elections. Especially now, with Democrats pushing legislation that would amount to a radical takeover of our election system. The time has come to take action to preserve the integrity of our electoral process. We need real election reform in this country that ensures the integrity of our elections. This includes preventing fraud and supporting nationwide voter ID. | | | I know how to tackle these issues and get things done - because I have done it my entire career right here in the 7th District. And that’s exactly what I will do in Congress for VA-07. Thank you, Taylor Keeney | | | Paid for by TAYLOR KEENEY FOR CONGRESS | | Taylor Keeney for Congress PO Box 29289 Henrico, VA 23242 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

| Peter,

The midterm elections may seem far away, but Republicans are already deep in preparation. Not only has the National Republican Campaign Committee placed me on their “offensive target” list, but three far-right Republicans have already declared their candidacy against me.

One of those opponents is Lisa Scheller. Her name might sound familiar because she was also my opponent in 2020 when I won one of the most competitive races in the country by just 3.8%.

**Here’s the thing: she wouldn’t run against me again if she didn’t think she had a real chance of winning. But I defeated her once, and I know I can do it again — as long as I have the kind of support from folks like you that I did in 2020.[_Please, can you chip in $10 or more to my re-election campaign right away to ensure I have the resources to hold this seat and keep the House blue?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39514354/320184246/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211209-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzIyYWZiYS00NDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=idIZW2hIKGcCL-fzazghYUrh_Piqh9fUWxSuJG3_x0c=)**

clean_body: she wouldn’t run against me again if she didn’t think she had a real chance of winning. | = | Peter, The midterm elections may seem far away, but Republicans are already deep in preparation. Not only has the National Republican Campaign Committee placed me on their “offensive target” list, but three far-right Republicans have already declared their candidacy against me. One of those opponents is Lisa Scheller. Her name might sound familiar because she was also my opponent in 2020 when I won one of the most competitive races in the country by just 3.8%. Here’s the thing: she wouldn’t run against me again if she didn’t think she had a real chance of winning. But I defeated her once, and I know I can do it again — as long as I have the kind of support from folks like you that I did in 2020.= | = Unlike Lisa Scheller, I don’t have millions in personal wealth to spend on my own campaign. I rely on grassroots supporters like you, Peter. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Grateful for your support, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States | | ---|--- Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. name: Tom Perez
subject: We can flip Georgia and Maryland
body:
We have a chance to turn the tide on Republican voter suppression – if we elect Democratic governors who will protect voting rights in 2022. That’s why I’m asking you to step up and join me in supporting Stacey Abrams for Georgia governor.

Peter,

Voting rights are under attack in this country.

Since the 2020 elections, Republican governors and state legislatures have introduced more than 400 voter suppression bills in an attempt to disenfranchise voters and swing elections in their favor.

Nothing is more imperative in our democracy than protecting the right to vote because the right to vote preserves all others. **With our democracy at stake, Maryland Democrats cannot sit on the sidelines right now.**

We have a chance to turn the tide on Republican voter suppression – if we elect Democratic governors who will protect voting rights in 2022.

**[That’s why I’m asking you to step up and join me in supporting Stacey Abrams for Georgia governor. She’s facing an uphill battle against Republican Brian Kemp and needs our support now more than ever. name: Adam Schiff
subject: One of the best nights of my career, and yet, not all was joy
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
It was one of the best nights of my career. But it was not all joy. Not by any means. November 8, 2000. After a brutal two-year congressional campaign, I was elected to Congress with Eve by my side. It wasn’t an easy race. Far from it. All eyes were on our district as I took on a nationally recognized Republican incumbent in the most expensive congressional race _ever_. A true slugfest until the very end. But at this moment, it was bliss. We won. And we were heading to Washington. (The downside? So were George W. Bush and a Republican House.) This wasn’t my first race. Actually, I had lost my first two races for State Assembly before winning on the third try for State Senate. After those first two losses, I used to quote Winston Churchill a lot. When he was unceremoniously thrown out of office near the end of WWII, he remarked how people kept telling him that his losing was a blessing in disguise. “At the moment,” he replied, “it seems a blessing very effectively disguised!" My Assembly losses had been a blessing in disguise and led to my election to the State Senate. Then, during the middle of my first Senate term, I was encouraged to run for Congress. No Democrat had been elected to that office in our district since Franklin Roosevelt, and I knew it would be uphill. But I was also excited to be part of what I hoped would be an historic Democratic takeover of the House. My opponent was a prominent Republican named Jim Rogan. He was very well known as one of the impeachment managers in the trial against Bill Clinton. As polls tightened, it quickly became a national race with all eyes on us. The thing is, I didn't want to run a national race. I wanted to focus on the issues I was hearing most about in our community. Health care and prescription drug costs. Public safety and guns. Jobs and the economy. So that’s what I talked about, as I campaigned door to door, with a clipboard in hand and plenty of brochures. My opponent, on the other hand, had a different approach. I woke up to blistering advertisements on TV and radio and my mailbox was filled with attack pieces. It was something. **But in the end, we took on the best-funded campaign in the country and we beat it.** Since 2000, campaigns have changed a lot. Back then our record-setting race cost $15 million total. Congressional seats were just beginning to receive national attention in the advent of 24-hour news networks. And there was no Facebook (politically, that was probably a good thing). Skip to present day. In 2020, my far-right Republican opponent raised over $4 million to try to defeat me, and he was only a mediocre candidate. Races around the country get constant coverage, and social media has changed everything. But here’s a good thing that has come out of all of this change: I’m able to be in touch with you, Derek. Campaigns, more than ever, are of the people and by the people. Funded by grassroots donors who give $5, $10, and $20 at a time. I don't spend hours a week calling strangers for money. I rely on people like you reading this email. And the truth is this – these donations all add up and allow me to keep my focus on what's happening in Washington and do the hard work to protect our democracy. **So, what do you say? Can you help me continue my fight in Congress with this campaign of the people, and for the people? If you can, chip in $10, $25, or whatever is meaningful to you so I can keep working on your behalf:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39514680/320185522/-1966934778?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211209_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWE1YmZhMy00NjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6yxpqZT4GOwhEOvLTX2hqNs0JC7rZhsP9mdJOoTJvUU=)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39514681/320185523/-1966934778?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211209_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWE1YmZhMy00NjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6yxpqZT4GOwhEOvLTX2hqNs0JC7rZhsP9mdJOoTJvUU=)

clean_body: | It was one of the best nights of my career. But it was not all joy. Not by any means. November 8, 2000. After a brutal two-year congressional campaign, I was elected to Congress with Eve by my side. It wasn’t an easy race. Far from it. All eyes were on our district as I took on a nationally recognized Republican incumbent in the most expensive congressional race ever. A true slugfest until the very end. But at this moment, it was bliss. We won. And we were heading to Washington. (The downside? So were George W. Bush and a Republican House.) This wasn’t my first race. Actually, I had lost my first two races for State Assembly before winning on the third try for State Senate. After those first two losses, I used to quote Winston Churchill a lot. When he was unceremoniously thrown out of office near the end of WWII, he remarked how people kept telling him that his losing was a blessing in disguise. “At the moment,” he replied, “it seems a blessing very effectively disguised!" My Assembly losses had been a blessing in disguise and led to my election to the State Senate. Then, during the middle of my first Senate term, I was encouraged to run for Congress. No Democrat had been elected to that office in our district since Franklin Roosevelt, and I knew it would be uphill. But I was also excited to be part of what I hoped would be an historic Democratic takeover of the House. My opponent was a prominent Republican named Jim Rogan. He was very well known as one of the impeachment managers in the trial against Bill Clinton. As polls tightened, it quickly became a national race with all eyes on us. The thing is, I didn't want to run a national race. I wanted to focus on the issues I was hearing most about in our community. Health care and prescription drug costs. Public safety and guns. Jobs and the economy. So that’s what I talked about, as I campaigned door to door, with a clipboard in hand and plenty of brochures. My opponent, on the other hand, had a different approach. I woke up to blistering advertisements on TV and radio and my mailbox was filled with attack pieces. It was something. But in the end, we took on the best-funded campaign in the country and we beat it. Since 2000, campaigns have changed a lot. Back then our record-setting race cost $15 million total. Congressional seats were just beginning to receive national attention in the advent of 24-hour news networks. And there was no Facebook (politically, that was probably a good thing). Skip to present day. In 2020, my far-right Republican opponent raised over $4 million to try to defeat me, and he was only a mediocre candidate. Races around the country get constant coverage, and social media has changed everything. But here’s a good thing that has come out of all of this change: I’m able to be in touch with you, Derek. Campaigns, more than ever, are of the people and by the people. Funded by grassroots donors who give $5, $10, and $20 at a time. I don't spend hours a week calling strangers for money. I rely on people like you reading this email. And the truth is this – these donations all add up and allow me to keep my focus on what's happening in Washington and do the hard work to protect our democracy. So, what do you say? Can you help me continue my fight in Congress with this campaign of the people, and for the people? If you can, chip in $10, $25, or whatever is meaningful to you so I can keep working on your behalf: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Your support means the world to me, and Eve. And hopefully will lead to more memories like the one in that photo back on November 8, 2000. — Adam Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

clean_body: Robert Francis O’Rourke is not just wrong for Texas, he is dangerous. | Fellow American, I do not think my radical leftist opponent for Texas Governor could have been clearer. If Robert Francis O’Rourke is sworn into office, every gun owner in Texas will be an immediate target of the state. Murder, assault, rape, and robbery are skyrocketing across Texas and the first thing my Socialist opponent wants to do is take away law-abiding Texans’ most effective tool of self-defense. Robert Francis O’Rourke is not just wrong for Texas, he is dangerous. If you want a leader with a proven track record for defending our Second Amendment, I am hated on the left for my unwavering support of the Second Amendment. Democrats and ultra-Leftist megadonors from across the country will spend millions to keep me out of office. As your next Governor, I have this response that will infuriate the Robert Francis O’Rourke and his army of leftist trolls: “Hell no, you will never take our AR-15s or any of our guns.” This election is about our most fundamental freedom as Americans. Steadfast and Loyal, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN The election laws in Texas allow for unlimited donation amounts as long as the funds are not from an incorporated entity. Make checks payable: Allen West Campaign PO Box 740846 Dallas, TX 75374 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Millions of Americans live in “banking deserts”, rural towns or low-income areas without banks nearby. What every town _does_ have, is a local post office, where we can offer basic banking services such as check cashing, bill payment, wire transfers and low fee ATMs.
**Right now, Congress is considering funding pilot programs for postal banking, which will also provide new revenue for our ailing Postal Service. But Wall Street lobbyists are hoping to shut it down.**
**[Tell Congress: Fund postal banking pilot programs in the 2022 budget appropriations bill!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkVIL9b_UvrMEGhYpeT-jGS-kfXy_8x05yohYuhrlYeNR_p0N3jGj4NcWBp5NoZzHOqrpAyaX0oyzOUNzAOh2121uy_jgi2dnefowDD3LZJuMpy2yAXo51CC3984KgIBWqxsBgRQwfqlqgTD5JS8YXoVMa9_xkiQ65jIVdEfhMdPdxigaxPNze4vA2H00LiV0sPEUgJGgXJnYtTZBsReECR9m_rS0Cm31ahaQ2esnbIdlTAU0R3NiZh3CjFBwbVv7txiNzwu2rrwLKO6Jv_pN36ipLdOQ_nvtLgJf9SsfziODx31sfIQNz2wDHUDMOCUWwBluDE5-MNXeF-thIhXn2akgRJOhyUwY9Rjo6YQ-LMomSSw2Mr8DsV09v2twJn509ijoxMRAnHRgaeaFeB9sqxHxnhbxv77RkRt1us07CukAFf0P0xkg3KQsdo-_urreeSxAH5fE7hkfcoA13DUNEe_iyh3dbnfpLeZZmWkId1h8aIGEq4XLnEkfwOfWCykIOx9xVUpwfXz0dzM6ysyp53dco0vH6gzxPewSEN_thxAC5n15nFq2nZrox4-Iurn-4/3hp/lLg-iIt9Q0mrlV3PAnf9tg/h1/tcCnwJDzH3O-95ASELMLH3Jtk0zpy8N7L6S1FKyKUMY)**
Big banks all too often take advantage of low-income people and people of color who are struggling to pay their bills by driving up overdraft fees.
About half of African American and Latino households are underbanked. And while more and more banks are closing their doors, people are being forced to use predatory services like check cashers.
**_No one_ should be punished for a lack of wealth. **
Dozens of other nations like France, Japan, and Germany offer postal banking. We can too!
**[Join Melanie in telling Congress to fund postal banking pilot programs in the 2022 budget appropriations bill now!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkVIL9b_UvrMEGhYpeT-jGS-kfXy_8x05yohYuhrlYeNR_p0N3jGj4NcWBp5NoZzHOqrpAyaX0oyzOUNzAOh2121uy_jgi2dnefowDD3LZJuMpy2yAXo51CC3984KgIBWqxsBgRQwfqlqgTD5JS8YXoVMa9_xkiQ65jIVdEfhMdPdxigaxPNze4vA2H00LiV0sPEUgJGgXJnYtTZBsReECR9m_rS0Cm31ahaQ2esnbIdlTAU0R3NiZh3CjFBwbVv7txiNzwu2rrwLKO6Jv_pN36ipLdOQ_nvtLgJf9SsfziODx31sfIQNz2wDHUDMOCUWwBluDE5-MNXeF-thIhXn2akgRJOhyUwY9Rjo6YQ-LMooVMCRnAw5_mS4ySUN2d6XyHRGFfMa4Udu54muwjZWtKmkyA3x9AntGAuIpTszsUh_wi1cZ6sUTwA53tiTKuHt9QV91sfz63z7-eIF-HmgHU7vZHNyai-DmyQV8JwUSchMoi35xhdUGVEdqiMGYGzHQTHucLiNqx3v9lG_HuOGRYuVRzfNeXjlpcPB4c3EYUFQzXy2xc4HqH_b-Bh1Vokbc/3hp/lLg-iIt9Q0mrlV3PAnf9tg/h2/QAWmjYMs0CKJ3dPdHcTovfrZYWSQIdcEYZPN37t5PGM)**
Thanks for taking action to save the USPS today.

clean_body: | | | | with the Supply Chain Crisis Friend, After a year of crushing, record-high inflation not seen since the Jimmy Carter era, Joe Biden managed to create a supply chain crisis just in time for Christmas! Shelves across the nation are empty, and our families and children will not be able to get the Christmas presents they want in time. When Biden was asked about this crisis, he did what he typically does—he blamed someone else. In this case, and in his usual confused and condescending way, Like every single issue he has touched, he has created yet another crisis. This Administration and the radical leftist Democrats who control Congress have completely failed the American people, and it is time to hold them accountable. Instead of working to expose Joe Biden, Liz Cheney has joined with Nancy Pelosi to deflect attention from total and complete failure of this Administration. No one is standing up for Wyoming, and all of us will suffer mightily under the Biden economy and the radical agenda coming out of Congress. That’s why I got into this race. If we don’t elect true America First leaders in this upcoming election, we may never take back the country we love. We must act now. Thank you, Team Hageman | | | |

Throughout his career, Senator Ron Johnson has spent his time telling lies, spreading misinformation, and repeating conspiracy theories. **It takes a lot to be America’s worst Senator, but Ron Johnson has done it.**

Bluntly, Ron Johnson’s misinformation is putting people at risk.

**Wisconsin needs a Senator, not a sideshow.** Ron Johnson continues to embarrass Wisconsin on the national stage, and no matter how radical he is, National Republicans will always rush to his defense.
