name: Cora Neumann
subject: Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39515374/320188630/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmZiODhkZi00YjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFUBr_9uTLlfi2_NIAexe3UyEAssK0jupH7hgmmMoLc=) Friend,

There’s been a lot of buzz in the news lately about whether the Supreme Court might overturn _Roe v. Wade_ \-- or at least significantly limit abortion rights in the United States.

I want to make sure you know where I stand on this issue.

As a mother and public health expert, I believe all women deserve the right to a safe, legal abortion. As a Montanan, I stand by our state’s proud history supporting the right to privacy. We respect freedom and privacy. It’s in our bones, it’s our way of life. This is an assault on our rights and freedoms.

I think it's shameful that today's GOP would both undercut policies like paid family leave and comprehensive reproductive care, while still pushing forced pregnancy and birth. It’s hypocritical and we deserve better.

**If elected, I’d be the only pro-choice woman representing Montana at the federal level. And you can bet I'll do everything in my power to defend a woman's right to choose and receive access to quality health care.**

**[Can I count on you to give a donation to protect reproductive freedom in Montana and across the country? This is a fight we cannot afford to lose.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39515375/320188631/102973118?refcode=em-12.9.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmZiODhkZi00YjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFUBr_9uTLlfi2_NIAexe3UyEAssK0jupH7hgmmMoLc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39515376/320188632/102973118?refcode=em-12.9.21-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmZiODhkZi00YjU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFUBr_9uTLlfi2_NIAexe3UyEAssK0jupH7hgmmMoLc=)

clean_body: | = Friend, There’s been a lot of buzz in the news lately about whether the Supreme Court might overturn Roe v. Wade \-- or at least significantly limit abortion rights in the United States. I want to make sure you know where I stand on this issue. As a mother and public health expert, I believe all women deserve the right to a safe, legal abortion. As a Montanan, I stand by our state’s proud history supporting the right to privacy. We respect freedom and privacy. It’s in our bones, it’s our way of life. This is an assault on our rights and freedoms. I think it's shameful that today's GOP would both undercut policies like paid family leave and comprehensive reproductive care, while still pushing forced pregnancy and birth. It’s hypocritical and we deserve better. If elected, I’d be the only pro-choice woman representing Montana at the federal level. And you can bet I'll do everything in my power to defend a woman's right to choose and receive access to quality health care. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks friend, Cora = Paid for by Cora for Montana Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. My opponent, Derrick Van Orden, on the other hand, does not share our values. He was at the January 6th insurrection, attempting to violently overturn our election results.

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: Exciting News from Fair Fight Action, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Last Wednesday, Stacey Abrams filed her Declaration of Intent to run for Governor! This means changes are happening at Fair Fight Action and Fair Fight.

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39515691/320190460/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjhmNjMyNC00YzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=silMMJG3rxfmEt3okZm4BhasJvQ4MLGXBiJBwlblBb4=&emci=05f0f45c-2a59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=5f8f6324-4c59-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend, Last Wednesday, Stacey Abrams filed her Declaration of Intent to run for Governor! She and Senator Warnock will make a tremendous team to lead the ticket in Georgia next year. This means changes are happening at Fair Fight Action and Fair Fight. First, we are thrilled to announce that Cianti Stewart-Reid, previously Managing Director, is now leading both Fair Fight and Fair Fight Action as Executive Director. Most importantly, the work continues at Fair Fight Action. The nationwide assault on voting rights continues to drive our mission to advocate, organize, and litigate to protect the freedom to vote and mitigate voter suppression. We will continue to inspire Americans and move them to take action to strengthen our democracy. We will lift up the stories of the people most harmed by attacks on the freedom to vote, and fight so that their voices can be heard and their votes are counted. [Friend, we can’t do this without you. Will you donate to Fair Fight Action today to ensure that we can continue these efforts together?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39515692/320190488/14898422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjhmNjMyNC00YzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=silMMJG3rxfmEt3okZm4BhasJvQ4MLGXBiJBwlblBb4=) In 2021, Fair Fight Action became an anchor for the voting rights community. Together, we were able to mobilize voters to contact their Congress members resulting in over 83,000 calls to Congress—and mitigate the harm of anti-voter legislation throughout the country. As we head into 2022, we are preparing for a continuation of this year’s relentless attacks on the freedom to vote. In response, we will be:
* Fighting back against anti-voting bills once state legislatures reconvene in January,
* Continuing our national advocacy for federal legislation to protect the freedom to vote, and
* Building voter protection capacity at the state and local level to be prepared for the midterm elections.

In this time of change for Fair Fight Action, we are renewed in our vision for free and fair elections where every eligible Americans’ voice can be counted and heard. [We ask for your support to continue our vital work in 2022 and beyond. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39515693/320190489/14898422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjhmNjMyNC00YzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=silMMJG3rxfmEt3okZm4BhasJvQ4MLGXBiJBwlblBb4=) **Thank you for being a relentless partner in this fight. ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39515694/320190490/14898422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjhmNjMyNC00YzU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=silMMJG3rxfmEt3okZm4BhasJvQ4MLGXBiJBwlblBb4=) |

clean_body: Last Wednesday, Stacey Abrams filed her Declaration of Intent to run for Governor! This means changes are happening at Fair Fight Action and Fair Fight. Fair Fight | | | Friend, Last Wednesday, Stacey Abrams filed her Declaration of Intent to run for Governor! She and Senator Warnock will make a tremendous team to lead the ticket in Georgia next year. This means changes are happening at Fair Fight Action and Fair Fight. First, we are thrilled to announce that Cianti Stewart-Reid, previously Managing Director, is now leading both Fair Fight and Fair Fight Action as Executive Director. Most importantly, the work continues at Fair Fight Action. The nationwide assault on voting rights continues to drive our mission to advocate, organize, and litigate to protect the freedom to vote and mitigate voter suppression. We will continue to inspire Americans and move them to take action to strengthen our democracy. We will lift up the stories of the people most harmed by attacks on the freedom to vote, and fight so that their voices can be heard and their votes are counted. = In 2021, Fair Fight Action became an anchor for the voting rights community. Together, we were able to mobilize voters to contact their Congress members resulting in over 83,000 calls to Congress—and mitigate the harm of anti-voter legislation throughout the country. As we head into 2022, we are preparing for a continuation of this year’s relentless attacks on the freedom to vote. In response, we will be: Fighting back against anti-voting bills once state legislatures reconvene in January, Continuing our national advocacy for federal legislation to protect the freedom to vote, and Building voter protection capacity at the state and local level to be prepared for the midterm elections. In this time of change for Fair Fight Action, we are renewed in our vision for free and fair elections where every eligible Americans’ voice can be counted and heard. = Thank you for being a relentless partner in this fight. ** = | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. | | | **REMINDER:**

This Saturday at 3:30 PM Pacific is the Town Hall with anti-CRT pioneer Chris Rufo and Joe Kent.

The town hall is free to attend and there is an exclusive reception with light refreshments beforehand at 2:30 PM (tickets still available).

The event is taking place at 610 Esther Street in Vancouver.

To register for the town hall or the reception, please go to [https://www.joekentforcongress.com/rufo](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=58c10f2d8f&e=00856e661d).

| | | That was a **weird choice** ,

If you went out and **bought a fancy new Kydex holster...**

**_That’s what I’d say to you._**

Because instead of spending $99+ on a clunky holster that **only fits one kind of gun...and is uncomfortable as hell...**

You could’ve **[gotten this FREE one here](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/40/56327/8c88abdf42afbb810a1ea6ca3ef6c0c797409e84/5f54122dc20c8eed8096c5069fb2b406dde11ed5)** that’s far more comfortable... fits 99% of all handguns... is **way easier** to conceal.

I’m talking about the best selling **“Invisible” Belly Holster** from my friends at _Tactical USA._

**For a short time,** they’re [handing them out at no cost](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/40/56327/8c88abdf42afbb810a1ea6ca3ef6c0c797409e84/5f54122dc20c8eed8096c5069fb2b406dde11ed5) as part of a No More Gun Control campaign.

The only catch here is that they don’t have many left ** _(382 last I checked)._**

And this email just went out to over 120,000 other subscribers who are reading this just like you...

So you’ll need to move fast if you want one.

[Grab your FREE “Invisible” Belly Holster NOW](https://links.gunsandpride.com/a/1634/click/40/56327/8c88abdf42afbb810a1ea6ca3ef6c0c797409e84/5f54122dc20c8eed8096c5069fb2b406dde11ed5), before someone else does.

name: Greg Casar
subject: A big victory for victims of violence today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress**
body:
You helped deliver this victory for Texas families. A new shelter was so badly needed. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOWJY-tixsAGdZ-iepyIpgQwUlTCwVyuxkyHVyPgP75Lyg6ARx4Wcpm1esMobDSIkg7MRXc-RexytvOYIkaFydIYh5aBSDmOFIRWmGT3Iy7W52X6CwsA5Mnl6Es4rSOEMUH5lMZM_8scJicf8-Bi9tbVdslwS07cC4dIWu4KECdmM46Uiy3qGDePIs9fwynOJ2TPkWpgJaiwQlN24NJu9inYkz2NVsrTc3n_10SGygZYrUy_USGohO5di2PKgKMAYnREzKXxHhCsFUIwV-_MXnVM4GGiuMXnlzbwb0oGvM8L/3hp/7CdjLZ1WQrKda4Upa2HyNA/h0/FeWpGmxOkyNBxnGvhYqyGH9a9fv8DRueVXn8DJKcgkU) Hi Peter, Today, **Austin will be doubling our family violence shelter space for the SAFE Alliance**. This is a big deal for survivors of violence. My legislation, which just passed minutes ago, directs the City to purchase a hotel we have identified in East Austin. The City will quickly convert the hotel into a shelter. The need for this shelter space is urgent. Since the start of the COVID-19 pandemic, SAFE has received record-breaking call volumes. Many of these callers, usually moms with kids experiencing domestic violence, get stuck on wait lists while they live in very dangerous situations. Today’s vote will give them a safe place to go. I am committed to continuing my advocacy for survivors in Congress. [**Can I count on you to volunteer at future events to help us take my advocacy to Congress?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuOerNXqIOmkDCCMgwF7K51F9V4ycDokNEC7emsovqPZwnX3-e-eltFpBbU3GMljvov9J5Y-CDDjHe5UbI0LIzVpooSUbFj8OkrO_6GU4D8sxgPK0AcFXWayhOZvySz8YoERLa8o-zzYzkPSUNj2xwrmBKjj8mTVBOkfbUayH7h2OugbRRDZMnZLWF3EWosWwJ3jOuFnaeajiM4va5c9MNcLAbT8Y-s37oSclF5Cnv3_ShYKlro6zQ9DYSxjP6UPUlGcR71p7nQGoIgaEgvPL1OxeXpCeVmsfpAYZlbgz0drITm5CU_Fp8-J5RyBDrvM1j7wfHC_6ohNTDDLJ6EhlA-g/3hp/7CdjLZ1WQrKda4Upa2HyNA/h1/2zdrgWyYT7-9UqWEgQuj_XXGpQto8DQYDsdTNcIA8pM) These victories have a real human impact – and we couldn’t have accomplished this without your support. We’ll have details soon for our upcoming volunteer events! If you can’t volunteer, but want to [**chip in a donation, you can support our campaign here.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xjkVm0yb0-WECUNMTVrLbqsebYAShmha20jRNLNn8DjEPgCJu5if3ntbhRf72OgpMA0ch5dirhrI5t-tDXUGzCgXFUfvjexrbyVO1TFmhZrO4OE_6MtHHppx_87hS_A1LoREs0lMNp_NfFdvzyftcdowZWS60DFc1YXyASVkbO904WUxFuI57VyvDWn-NkFgJkUMxRBT1IZptQGIUPL--RU_D6KiThMSmM7Zw6TCHGkGB-TkBM49L6YKqPg7W3XAaoSqPaB3o4yeos1KKAaPYdcJxWvWeUT0rCPWcD14hg3fp8kWN3uqbcfj_0GVyvsbrfJfhicXLttgIlBwSSbdygy2GNkr9jq869Ub5ixTp_Zh938xrFo42PVKT2l51bDpHixFEROVDsN2MV-3ioB8gu/3hp/7CdjLZ1WQrKda4Upa2HyNA/h2/mrv72qOr19MHpieQ0C2tnPVN-9q-ijrBK7JIODfpxWg) Thank you,

clean_body: You helped deliver this victory for Texas families. A new shelter was so badly needed. | | | Hi Peter, Today, Austin will be doubling our family violence shelter space for the SAFE Alliance. This is a big deal for survivors of violence. My legislation, which just passed minutes ago, directs the City to purchase a hotel we have identified in East Austin. The City will quickly convert the hotel into a shelter. The need for this shelter space is urgent. Since the start of the COVID-19 pandemic, SAFE has received record-breaking call volumes. Many of these callers, usually moms with kids experiencing domestic violence, get stuck on wait lists while they live in very dangerous situations. Today’s vote will give them a safe place to go. I am committed to continuing my advocacy for survivors in Congress. These victories have a real human impact – and we couldn’t have accomplished this without your support. We’ll have details soon for our upcoming volunteer events! If you can’t volunteer, but want to Thank you, Greg | | | Copyright © 2021 Greg Casar, All rights reserved. Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress P.O. Box 301923 Austin, TX 78703 You're receiving this email as one of Greg Casar's contacts. | | Sent via . Friend – Democrats know it. And we know it, too.

The Senate race in Georgia will go down to the wire. Democrats are going to spend whatever it takes to keep their politician in the Senate. Take a look at the panicked email they recently sent:

[](http://email.conservative-alerts.com/c/eJxdkMFuwyAQRL-G3BxhwNg--ODEjlK16iGRerUwbGJaTFLAidKvL07THiqhlXizO9pZVTFMecYWuiKYpCnBZVqmJONLpiRmVLKUYwFFgRHD8mQ9uIsI-gKJMOCCX8rTuBgqTrLyoMo0LzKV9rLEeapYjzlnlLGCwsJUQwhnj2iNyCY-D3JysLxq60DNJpEFEGMygPNyAJNoKyPrYdBWJV4kDtHNFMbOnyYnAdHGwQURPiMpxrPQRxvhT_-Dj6D0NEYKo9AmQi_j55Gz6Lbtbr_eti9d23b7ulu126fXptu1b7-2JxvAhjhipUnea143PSdvLsqdNVpF4R8ctIoRm8-PJtDruHCVOl-1MdrzPJ7vOG9xP1jc1-jDrUL5ChFynyLkfhvSq0IIVogsydvn5MvZdpbIOtZwO8Nf38Ni-YhGUN58Azrvjec)
The Democrats are on a roll with their fundraising. Their supporters understand what's at stake – control of the U.S. Senate and the fate of the Biden-Schumer-Pelosi agenda. In Georgia, we're running against the #1 fundraising senator in the country who already has $17 million in his campaign war chest.

Our campaign is being aggressive in our fundraising, but we're behind our December goal – by a significant amount. We hate writing emails like this nearly a year from Election Day, **but we must hit every fundraising goal along the way if we're going to have the necessary funds to win next November.**

**[In an effort to get back on course, we're asking 1,500 conservatives to make a donation of $10 or more before midnight tonight.](http://email.conservative-alerts.com/c/eJxdkMtuwyAQRb8G72zZ-JmFF0lMlD7URSJV7crCMI5RAbuAE6VfX5ymXVRCI3HuzNXc4XUWp0WeBaLGMU4SHK-SVYLzIso4i7OUZUkRU6iqGGUxG7UFc6ZOnCGkEoyzERtVMNQlA9bjtO96qHKaZLxKugJ3HceM5Z4Fsh6cmyxK1wjv_LPAZgPRRWgDfDHxzAFV4QDGsgFkKDTzrINBaB5aGhqU7manWjvOhgFKGwNnhIsFMaomKk7aw5_-O1fAxaw8BUWF9NAy_7nnrNo9ORy3e_LcEtIe1-2G7B9emvZAXn9tR-1AOz-imQyb0_vhbcPWx0cvt1oK7oV_cBDcR2w-PxqXXlRgaj5dhJTCFqU_32nZ4nYwv68U_bVG5QZhfJvC-HYb3PGK0qyieViSp_DLaLJIeOuru07w13e3iO7RMCqbbyhokC0)**

_The last thing that we want is for complacency to set in. While some conservatives believe we have the wind at our back after Republicans swept the top races in Virginia, that doesn't translate into automatic victory next year. Far from it._

**We must block, tackle, and excel at the basics of campaigning – like raising money, organizing volunteers, and registering voters – to win.**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/5277?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211209-Kati-PrioritiesSurveyRFv1-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211209-Kati-PrioritiesSurveyRFv1-ETG-sl1&akid=2203%2E9716520%2E5RDVKo)
---
Hello,

I know I don't have to explain to you that even though we successfully flipped the Senate, things are still precarious right now. With such a razor-thin margin, we cannot take a single vote -- or a single day -- for granted.

The Senior Leadership Team and I have been reviewing the political landscape ahead, but we need reliable responses from voters to continue to help us inform our strategy. **That's why we selected a few top Democrats to send our Grassroots Strategy Survey as the Biden-Harris administration nears its second year in office -- and you were selected.**

This is one of the DSCC's most exclusive focus groups, and you should feel proud to be chosen at this pivotal moment in American history. But with time running out before we lock in some of our most critical strategy decisions, it's vital that you share your input immediately.

**USER ID:** 9716520
**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**STATUS:** Selected for High-Level Survey
**SURVEY COMPLETION: Incomplete
CUSTOM LINK: [https://www.dscc.org/GSSyear2#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/5277?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211209-Kati-PrioritiesSurveyRFv1-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211209-Kati-PrioritiesSurveyRFv1-ETG-sl1&akid=2203%2E9716520%2E5RDVKo)**

This survey will close at 11:59 p.m. tonight -- any responses received after that point will NOT be included in our update to our Democratic leadership team. Please don't miss this moment -- we need you more than ever.

Here's your custom link again: **[https://www.dscc.org/GSSyear2#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/5277?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211209-Kati-PrioritiesSurveyRFv1-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211209-Kati-PrioritiesSurveyRFv1-ETG-sl1&akid=2203%2E9716520%2E5RDVKo)**

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data** _

Thank you,

Kati
Chief Digital Officer, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2021-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=2203_9716520_5RDVKo&akid=2203%2E9716520%2E5RDVKo)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=2203%2E9716520%2E5RDVKo)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2203%2E9716520%2E5RDVKo)** to unsubscribe.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Call your Rep. to repeal Biden’s vax mandate!!
body:
| |
---
Yesterday, [the Senate voted to repeal Biden’s COVID mandate](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0NjczJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/WNUr_CEpDzuvnQkkUa3VaQ) through the Congressional Review Act (CRA).

**This is a very big deal!**

It now goes to the House. A discharge petition will likely be filed. That takes 20 legislative days to “ripen” before they can file the petition.

In the meantime, here’s what you need to do.
* [Call your Representative](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._cnyw) and ask him or her to vote to use the CRA to repeal Biden’s vaccine mandates.
* **Specifically** , ask them to sign on as co-sponsors of [HJ 65,](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ0NjczJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/W-I8iw1YjMLQu5lIkAev9w) which provides Congressional disapproval of the Department of Labor rule relating to “COVID-19 Vaccination and testing; Emergency Temporary Standard.”

Congressman Fred Keller (PA-12) introduced this resolution.

Again, this is a big deal, and it is our best shot to eliminate the vaccine mandates legislatively.
** **
**Also, the fact that 2 Democrat Senators (Manchin and Tester) joined us is very promising.** **If you have a Democrat Representative in the House, you should feel encouraged and should call.**

Finally, if your Senators [voted](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) for the CRA to repeal the mandate, [call to thank them](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjEzNDMtZGI5MWFhZWMyN2Y1NDc4ZWE2MzAwNmJlMGUyMGE2OTEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL2ZpbmQtc2VuYXRvcnM_bWlkPTQ0NjczJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/zuWyqfaLEDHrZoBQ2YkH4A). All Republicans voted yes, as did Manchin (WV) and Tester (MT).

Please pass this special call to action on to family and friends!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._HrcegIBPig)
|
---

Peter -- this is a longer email but it’s personal, and important, so I really hope you’ll read it.

It’s so easy to forget. But on January 6th, a former Republican president incited an insurrection and an attack on our U.S. Capitol.

**Since then, the organizers of this attack have gone without consequences.**

MAGA Republicans have been further emboldened to undermine and question our elections and our democracy – all so they can cheat their way to public office.

**That’s why I’m working around the clock to pass critical voter reform, protect vulnerable minorities, and fight BACK against misinformation.**

But now we face our biggest threat yet: Keeping our majorities in Congress. After January 6th’s attack, if we lose our majorities, there’s no telling what MAGA Republicans will do to our country.

**Peter, we simply can’t afford to lose.** That’s why I need your help to raise $2,000 TODAY in order to protect our House majority.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: new poll just dropped
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here’s what you need to know:
#
Derek, a brand-new poll just dropped -- and it shows John Fetterman up 2 points against Republican candidate Dr. Oz in the race for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania. 👀
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38168?refcode=ema20211209-3766&t=1&akid=3766%2E434096%2E_lxKvH)
**Here’s what the poll means:** Among likely Pennsylvania voters, John Fetterman is ahead of Dr. Oz, meaning we’re leading this race to replace Pat Toomey and flip this ultra-competitive Senate seat blue in 2022. _But with only a two-point difference, Dr. Oz’s self-funded campaign has the resources to pull ahead._
**[We need all hands on deck if we’re going to hold-- and increase -- our lead over Dr. Oz and the other candidates in the #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate Seat of 2022. Can you make a donation of $5 or more right now to help fund our momentum so we can beat Dr. Oz?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38168?refcode=em20211209-3766&amounts=5&t=2&akid=3766%2E434096%2E_lxKvH)**_How much we can raise while it's still early will play a massive role in building a campaign that can go the distance in the general election._
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38168?refcode=em20211209-3766&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3766%2E434096%2E_lxKvH)**
**Here's what we know:** John Fetterman is the *only* Democrat in this race who has run and won statewide in Pennsylvania before. And with a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate, we can't risk the possibility of Republicans + Mitch McConnell regaining power.
**But here's what else:** As soon as Republicans, including Dr. Oz, see these poll numbers with John in the lead, they're going to flood this race with even more cash. We know this from the last time this seat was up in 2016, when it became the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history.
**[Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to fight back against the attacks that are sure to come our way from our GOP opponents? As Republican super PACs and GOP mega-donors prepare to spend millions to try to buy this Senate seat, John is counting on you to step up in a big way by making your first-ever donation to our campaign right now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38168?refcode=em20211209-3766&t=22&akid=3766%2E434096%2E_lxKvH)**
The great news about this latest poll is that John is in the lead. But that doesn’t mean we can relax. We have to look ahead and build the kind of campaign that can go toe-to-toe against the GOP in the general election -- _and win._
**We know Republicans are going to pour corporate and super PAC money into this race as soon as they see John leading the field -- heck, Dr. Oz has already funneled nearly $2 MILLION of his own money into TV ad buys -- but we can fend off their attacks if we raise enough from grassroots donors _now._**
John doesn't accept a cent of corporate PAC money. **[But that means we're relying on grassroots donors like you from Cresco. Your donation will be immediately put to work building a campaign that can win not just the primary, but the general election, too.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38168?refcode=em20211209-3766&t=23&akid=3766%2E434096%2E_lxKvH)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38168?refcode=em20211209-3766&amounts=5&t=42&akid=3766%2E434096%2E_lxKvH)**
Thank you, 🙏
Team Fetterman HQ
P.S. Not only is John in the lead in this primary, but he's also our *single best shot* at defeating the GOP front-runners in this race and successfully flipping this seat. **We know we're going to face a flood of attacks from Dr. Oz and other Republicans as soon as they see John’s in the lead,[so please donate $5 or more if you can today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38168?refcode=em20211209-3766&amounts=5&t=43&akid=3766%2E434096%2E_lxKvH)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211209-3766-footer&t=44&refcode2=3766_434096__lxKvH&akid=3766%2E434096%2E_lxKvH)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=45&akid=3766%2E434096%2E_lxKvH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=46&akid=3766%2E434096%2E_lxKvH)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Bridie Farrell
subject: FWD: "As a man, I'm not comfortable meeting with you alone."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bridie Farrell for US
body:
| Friend, earlier today I shared that a local party leader refused to meet with me about my campaign for Congress, saying _**“As a man, I’m not comfortable meeting with you alone.”**_ Since then, he has decided to respond on his Party's Facebook account and call me a liar. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39516236/320208954/-1207607143?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211208sexist2_full_bf_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjNkODc1Yi01NDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B-WRBWsAbD7xiPEd2ifU2taap6uljYP6q5l7Tiyboz8=)
---
**I replied to Mr. Kerner, but he is deleting comments on the county page.**
I've included below my reply so you can have the full story, and below this email is my original message.
_Dear Mr. Kerner,_
_You know what you said to me. You just didn’t think I would call you out for it publicly.**Maybe you missed the memo that it is 2021, women now have the right to vote and run, and standing up to child sexual predators is a good thing, not something to be canceled.**_
_I totally acknowledge your right to support whomever you wish. If you speak to others like you spoke to me, I am grateful you have elected to cast your endorsement elsewhere, because that type of misogyny isn’t what my campaign is about. I am about expanding the base, treating our neighbors with the respect they deserve and standing up for all North Country residents. — Bridie Farrell_
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39516237/320209033/-1207607143?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211208sexist2_full_bf_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjNkODc1Yi01NDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B-WRBWsAbD7xiPEd2ifU2taap6uljYP6q5l7Tiyboz8=)
---
\--------Forwarded Message--------
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39516238/320209061/-1207607143?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211208sexist2_full_bf_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjNkODc1Yi01NDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B-WRBWsAbD7xiPEd2ifU2taap6uljYP6q5l7Tiyboz8=)
---
Friend. _**NY-21 County Chairs just jumped in front of your vote.**_
Eleven County Party Chairs tried to wire the NY-21 primary for a candidate without a vote of the people and six months before election day.
**Their goal was simple: get everyone except one guy to drop out and leave the voters with no one else to choose from.** They didn’t even interview all the candidates before endorsing one.
_This is the backroom deal-making that turns people off and leads to reduced enthusiasm for political engagement. But the backroom didn’t stop there._
One of the chairs, Todd Kerner, called me to say I should drop out.
When I pointed out that he hadn’t even met with me yet to discuss why I’m running, he said _**“As a man, I’m not comfortable meeting with you alone.”**_
When I said, “What?” he replied, “Not with all that you’ve said and put out there.” _Clearly, he was referring to my outspoken opposition to child sexual abusers._
He then went on to tell me I was just like Tedra Cobb, last cycle’s nominee, and that _she and I are the problem with the Democratic Party because we make gender an issue._ I am not running on my gender, but neither can I, nor will I, run from it.
Frankly, my exchange with Todd underscores the further problem with all of this.
How is a county chair who throws around misogynistic tropes and accuses a sexual abuse survivor of being a reputational risk to him the kind of person whose judgment we should trust to select the next Democratic standard-bearer against Elise Stefanik?
I believe we are much wiser and much safer placing our confidence in the will of the voters to decide who will take on Elise. That’s exactly what I am doing in this race — placing my trust in the people who live, work and call the North Country home.
[**If you’re with me, could you chip in a donation of $10, $25, $50 — or any amount — so we can prove that North Country voters can make up their own minds?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39516239/320209068/-1207607143?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211208sexist2_full_bf_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjNkODc1Yi01NDU5LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B-WRBWsAbD7xiPEd2ifU2taap6uljYP6q5l7Tiyboz8=)

clean_body: | Friend, earlier today I shared that a local party leader refused to meet with me about my campaign for Congress, saying “As a man, I’m not comfortable meeting with you alone.” Since then, he has decided to respond on his Party's Facebook account and call me a liar. | = I replied to Mr. Kerner, but he is deleting comments on the county page. I've included below my reply so you can have the full story, and below this email is my original message. Dear Mr. Kerner, You know what you said to me. You just didn’t think I would call you out for it publicly.Maybe you missed the memo that it is 2021, women now have the right to vote and run, and standing up to child sexual predators is a good thing, not something to be canceled. I totally acknowledge your right to support whomever you wish. If you speak to others like you spoke to me, I am grateful you have elected to cast your endorsement elsewhere, because that type of misogyny isn’t what my campaign is about. I am about expanding the base, treating our neighbors with the respect they deserve and standing up for all North Country residents. — Bridie Farrell = \--------Forwarded Message-------- = Friend. NY-21 County Chairs just jumped in front of your vote. Eleven County Party Chairs tried to wire the NY-21 primary for a candidate without a vote of the people and six months before election day. Their goal was simple: get everyone except one guy to drop out and leave the voters with no one else to choose from. They didn’t even interview all the candidates before endorsing one. This is the backroom deal-making that turns people off and leads to reduced enthusiasm for political engagement. But the backroom didn’t stop there. One of the chairs, Todd Kerner, called me to say I should drop out. When I pointed out that he hadn’t even met with me yet to discuss why I’m running, he said “As a man, I’m not comfortable meeting with you alone.” When I said, “What?” he replied, “Not with all that you’ve said and put out there.” Clearly, he was referring to my outspoken opposition to child sexual abusers. He then went on to tell me I was just like Tedra Cobb, last cycle’s nominee, and that she and I are the problem with the Democratic Party because we make gender an issue. I am not running on my gender, but neither can I, nor will I, run from it. Frankly, my exchange with Todd underscores the further problem with all of this. How is a county chair who throws around misogynistic tropes and accuses a sexual abuse survivor of being a reputational risk to him the kind of person whose judgment we should trust to select the next Democratic standard-bearer against Elise Stefanik? I believe we are much wiser and much safer placing our confidence in the will of the voters to decide who will take on Elise. That’s exactly what I am doing in this race — placing my trust in the people who live, work and call the North Country home. = **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Sincerely, Bridie Bridie Farrell is a crime victims advocate and former U.S. National Speed Skater running against far-right Rep. Elise Stefanik in her home district of NY-21. = | Paid for by Bridie Farrell for US Bridie Farrell for US PO Box 166 North River, NY 12856 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

I’ll bring that same spirit of service if I’m elected to represent the people of Georgia in 2022. But I need your help to get there. This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to sit with President Trump and enjoy some of the finest dining in the country. Not only will you be able to spend a special evening with President Trump and me, but you’ll also be funding the fight against Biden and Pelosi. Dinner, a photo with President Trump, roundtrip travel to Palm Beach, and lodging will all be 100% covered Friend, we’d love to have you there to help us plan the Republican victories for 2022 and Take Back the House next year! &nbs; p;

I spoke for 8 HOURS & 32 MIN to try and stop a 1.8 trillion dollar socialist spending bill.

I am doing EVERYTHING I can to stop Pelosi & Biden. My 8.5 hour speech is the longest speech ever given on the House floor.

But it wasn’t enough. Pelosi holds too much power.
[**FIRE PELOSI**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31gnh-1ooes-4qqlpo9/)
If you’re frustrated with our current circumstances, believe me, Fellow Conservative, I am too. I’m livid.

The only way our situation gets better is to Fire Pelosi & take back the House! I will do whatever it takes to accomplish this goal. And %%First Name%%, I can’t do this without you.
[**FIRE PELOSI**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31gnh-1ooet-4qqlpo0/)
So I am coming to you, hat in hand, and humbly asking, no I am PLEADING WITH YOU: [**will you chip in $8.32 and help me Fire Pelosi & take back the House?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31gnh-1ooeu-4qqlpo1/) I will personally match every dollar you give. We CANNOT let them keep getting away with this.

Thank you for your support,
[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31gnh-1ooev-4qqlpo2/)
Kevin McCarthy

**A Note from Kevin:**

As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- [**EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-31gnh-1ooex-4qqlpo4/)

The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started.

Kevin McCarthy

name: Greg Murphy, MD
subject: Personal link for Fellow Conservative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by friends to elect Dr
body:
It’s time to reflect and take a few moments to re-prioritize what is most important to the American people. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=92a34e1d998c45b192ced31af27e11f3&_e=AKs-klFh3d35d0As5IpNhwwv7g9ku7OiBjsn6KKR9iOx2xYJCyAb6g9n4MY2pAITMauJhtgmChvOkq9nSCBi_S8qnWsu57zl9SFAu29NoJImSVKfgDBwwhZwkilmoXo9byVL9TLnGmDOcxx2VjpC4K4oqdCVLdad62btdO_s6dtxNm0etWkFxNCVkiL0drEeZiGPiAoVB3IIF2GJu6g2CkFXTuZX5Qjh_fEP81CR6Q8ZpF9brZIMS1Eo7DOZUFI9Ekr-sy1Yedu9I5CzYqIU2aa61XcMoo6p4yU1Sczt7nmVqwyGuY7tpbnG8sb0-2vblix47E_2R4Fpv2IV57SNHK0qSYIgcfN-2-hCUVTLtv4QUuIEjx06V-ciTVYSlLPps22GKAdNCNqXaIRMl6ylwOOwU4TGWvpjVnwvRqThcjDIhajJ1YWTnFFWqbRGUd7R0kxnYMlqYv4GS2WFVQrCMw-eCPc5YLJ1kcjLHBvARhnXuVdnSHNgLQAWtKO6EKtp0x_nwgGBsfFcCdALit_7tWbGHDKL-b7dCee0AQPfOAaj6xkOvS1xdUZdXsXfdzGTdDWJuWuE3wavo-8AS-fZQA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

2021 is about to be over and I’m more concerned about our country than ever. _Inflation, open borders, supply chain crisis’ - the list goes on and on. _

As Republicans, our goal is to continue Trump’s agenda and put America-FIRST. Unfortunately, in the wake of Biden’s failed policies and do-nothing way of leadership our agenda is at a standstill.

It’s time to reflect and take a few moments to re-prioritize what is most important to the American people. [**So, I have to ask, Fellow Conservative, before the year is up, what issues do you think are most important for House Republicans to prioritize next year?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=92a34e1d998c45b192ced31af27e11f3&_e=AKs-klFh3d35d0As5IpNhwwv7g9ku7OiBjsn6KKR9iOx2xYJCyAb6g9n4MY2pAITMauJhtgmChvOkq9nSCBi_S8qnWsu57zl9SFAu29NoJImSVKfgDBwwhZwkilmoXo9byVL9TLnGmDOcxx2VjpC4K4oqdCVLdad62btdO_s6dtxNm0etWkFxNCVkiL0drEeZiGPiAoVB3IIF2GJu6g2CkFXTuZX5Qjh_fEP81CR6Q8ZpF9brZIMS1Eo7DOZUFI9Ekr-sy1Yedu9I5CzYqIU2aa61XcMoo6p4yU1Sczt7nmVqwyGuY7tpbnG8sb0-2vblix47E_2R4Fpv2IV57SNHK0qSYIgcfN-2-hCUVTLtv4QUuIEjx06V-ciTVYSlLPpFePywTUorwGV9-03Elen_3iv7LKZhw9FlofOwsXKSPi5gw6gPkHdtI8Ic1gHW0UMG51MqNUOjXzJhA27hQFVzLSFNBpUk-CarBKL69xi7pWfdG-u-vazzaKOA1dFh_4sVl7SItA_OeALceE-FDZBC-uTDG7MGBIHu42gwNVC-GezJpie4RHnUbMqijd4c_aWLzjgKGV4d9cLwPXTQspGGw%3D%3D)

[**PERSONAL LINK FOR Fellow Conservative ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=92a34e1d998c45b192ced31af27e11f3&_e=AKs-klFh3d35d0As5IpNhwwv7g9ku7OiBjsn6KKR9iOx2xYJCyAb6g9n4MY2pAITMauJhtgmChvOkq9nSCBi_S8qnWsu57zl9SFAu29NoJImSVKfgDBwwhZwkilmoXo9byVL9TLnGmDOcxx2VjpC4K4oqdCVLdad62btdO_s6dtxNm0etWkFxNCVkiL0drEeZiGPiAoVB3IIF2GJu6g2CkFXTuZX5Qjh_fEP81CR6Q8ZpF9brZIMS1Eo7DOZUFI9Ekr-sy1Yedu9I5CzYqIU2aa61XcMoo6p4yU1Sczt7nmVqwyGuY7tpbnG8sb0-2vblix47E_2R4Fpv2IV57SNHK0qSYIgcfN-2-hCUVTLtv4QUuIEjx06V-ciTVYSlLPpHJquv0cWyWcvWkxVLLFxWq24P4we3mVqyYoNeuH6zzMaORYN1jL07gseuYAPkys1Jp4cLVbnAU7Bu_owUH6-QM2_uvrwpG2-OUKA53_cIKLQRFQAsD_cKKz-HoIwuoUSmk_PhzCJPpWjjiQaYX2zYogXwXfnVrgM4stSN4Pr-Kp2CVEoSWlmA1-4bAIculGudxoirogSmwn3D3iQ56L9-A%3D%3D)

All Democrats do is spend your hard-earned money and blame Republican’s for their own problems.

**First** , Biden created a border crisis _and then refused to acknowledge it._

**Then** , Democrats killed our economy and the job market.

**Now** , we’re facing nationwide shortages and delays _right before the holidays._

Democrats need to focus on real issues that affect our country, rather than peddling their radical agenda. [**Will you spare a few moments to help restructure our priorities going into 2022?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=92a34e1d998c45b192ced31af27e11f3&_e=AKs-klFh3d35d0As5IpNhwwv7g9ku7OiBjsn6KKR9iOx2xYJCyAb6g9n4MY2pAITMauJhtgmChvOkq9nSCBi_S8qnWsu57zl9SFAu29NoJImSVKfgDBwwhZwkilmoXo9byVL9TLnGmDOcxx2VjpC4K4oqdCVLdad62btdO_s6dtxNm0etWkFxNCVkiL0drEeZiGPiAoVB3IIF2GJu6g2CkFXTuZX5Qjh_fEP81CR6Q8ZpF9brZIMS1Eo7DOZUFI9Ekr-sy1Yedu9I5CzYqIU2aa61XcMoo6p4yU1Sczt7nmVqwyGuY7tpbnG8sb0-2vblix47E_2R4Fpv2IV57SNHK0qSYIgcfN-2-hCUVTLtv4QUuIEjx06V-ciTVYSlLPpSn4GR8ybl8bLG67BP4stbp2XyABgQdXlrGUvt8ekNd1KlAcxvnj4WOPhqkQC_CgJmWowOQ_uyllNmJOD0wYjRQhLWZV_uw-CWIYjUDa3HGZ--qnmi-oqcpNfVo-Yx_nIl00aDCss9R9JvtO_fEB-RIPoi1t96JhvtV5iN5rIsyyY3uWnn3aaHHxMu6dK7Hc9lAnyuy9uSg11IPET0TG2Mw%3D%3D)

[**PERSONAL LINK FOR Fellow Conservative ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=92a34e1d998c45b192ced31af27e11f3&_e=AKs-klFh3d35d0As5IpNhwwv7g9ku7OiBjsn6KKR9iOx2xYJCyAb6g9n4MY2pAITMauJhtgmChvOkq9nSCBi_S8qnWsu57zl9SFAu29NoJImSVKfgDBwwhZwkilmoXo9byVL9TLnGmDOcxx2VjpC4K4oqdCVLdad62btdO_s6dtxNm0etWkFxNCVkiL0drEeZiGPiAoVB3IIF2GJu6g2CkFXTuZX5Qjh_fEP81CR6Q8ZpF9brZIMS1Eo7DOZUFI9Ekr-sy1Yedu9I5CzYqIU2aa61XcMoo6p4yU1Sczt7nmVqwyGuY7tpbnG8sb0-2vblix47E_2R4Fpv2IV57SNHK0qSYIgcfN-2-hCUVTLtv4QUuIEjx06V-ciTVYSlLPpKuAJeZ8uJ5ue5nAW-2uUPKZ8_3mjkeT4X3-VovSXpBL-btJJoHq5oU0gWwZSCd8hBfDMdz-vmYQ78aZrhdnGjDUBl85umqXmJYV5hSwhWFn1LK1aA_wmtSa0Fkyooq822SLnWfrV2zBcKMpl-JRvr7d9b1pJkHIKrXPeW1Udgb3FaLxZLaps0RR_85YWeoA8c-VYH7-QAA3-y4e6w1jruA%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, day in and day out I’m fighting for the future of this country. But, I can’t continue without YOUR feedback.

[**Please, share your thoughts before 11:59 PM tonight.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=92a34e1d998c45b192ced31af27e11f3&_e=AKs-klFh3d35d0As5IpNhwwv7g9ku7OiBjsn6KKR9iOx2xYJCyAb6g9n4MY2pAITMauJhtgmChvOkq9nSCBi_S8qnWsu57zl9SFAu29NoJImSVKfgDBwwhZwkilmoXo9byVL9TLnGmDOcxx2VjpC4K4oqdCVLdad62btdO_s6dtxNm0etWkFxNCVkiL0drEeZiGPiAoVB3IIF2GJu6g2CkFXTuZX5Qjh_fEP81CR6Q8ZpF9brZIMS1Eo7DOZUFI9Ekr-sy1Yedu9I5CzYqIU2aa61XcMoo6p4yU1Sczt7nmVqwyGuY7tpbnG8sb0-2vblix47E_2R4Fpv2IV57SNHK0qSYIgcfN-2-hCUVTLtv4QUuIEjx06V-ciTVYSlLPpxUQc7o-Y3vLp7j8_wX_HlUFm28CRywcraOa7XX29QehneEHVtZW1OwrP3UyQQM_vhc9hG5qpFyrlHEdr4VdIoyjZHRlXpOkUuFLOsFyQfRXgxSTzhSFARTdK17pd-3QPN71zJtStEypjSDMUN5FyTTimEWFe--y5I8-HK8vOTkZM7bLkIJIlqkTHvMTRg-QMeE2WzzWZDJuZyTsyZsBdHQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: It’s time to reflect and take a few moments to re-prioritize what is most important to the American people. | Fellow Conservative, 2021 is about to be over and I’m more concerned about our country than ever. Inflation, open borders, supply chain crisis’ - the list goes on and on. As Republicans, our goal is to continue Trump’s agenda and put America-FIRST. Unfortunately, in the wake of Biden’s failed policies and do-nothing way of leadership our agenda is at a standstill. It’s time to reflect and take a few moments to re-prioritize what is most important to the American people. All Democrats do is spend your hard-earned money and blame Republican’s for their own problems. First , Biden created a border crisis and then refused to acknowledge it. Then , Democrats killed our economy and the job market. Now , we’re facing nationwide shortages and delays right before the holidays. Democrats need to focus on real issues that affect our country, rather than peddling their radical agenda. Fellow Conservative, day in and day out I’m fighting for the future of this country. But, I can’t continue without YOUR feedback. For America, Greg Murphy, MD | | Paid for by friends to elect Dr. Greg Murphy to Congress Murphy for Congress P.O. Box 1131 Greenville, North Carolina 27835 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Donald J. Trump December 8th, 2021
Mitch McConnell just folded on the Debt Ceiling, a total victory for the Democrats—didn’t use it to kill the $5 Trillion Dollar (real number!) Build Back Worse Bill that will essentially change the fabric of our Country forever. The Old Crow’s two-month extension, and the break up of the Bill into two parts, gave the Democrats everything they needed. The Dems would have folded completely if Mitch properly played his hand, and if not, the Debt Ceiling scenario would be far less destructive than the Bill that will get passed. He has all the cards to win, but not the “guts” to play them. Instead, he gives our Country away, just like he did with the two Senate seats in Georgia, and the Presidency itself. The Old Crow is a disaster!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: Join Me in Supporting the Angel Tree program this Christmas!
body:
'Tis the season to give back. Join me as we help kids in need. | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Hi Friend,

I wanted to personally invite you to participate in the Angel Tree program at your local church this Christmas.
I hope you will take a moment to watch the video below. Kayla and her siblings were in the program when their father was incarcerated. Now, they're giving back by buying gifts for kids who are in the program this Christmas.

If you’re here in Pinellas County, you can also drop off an unwrapped gift by December 12th at Northside Baptist Church in St. Petersburg.

Merry Christmas!

Amanda Makki
www.amandamakki.com

Northside Baptist Church
6000 38th Ave N
St. Petersburg, FL 33710

---

name: BREAKING NEWS (via DCCC)
subject: RE: Chuck Grassley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you CONDEMN Republicans for blocking common-sense gun control measures?
| | **BREAKING: Republican Senator Chuck Grassley blocks latest gun control measure**

| | Senate Republicans just BLOCKED common-sense gun reform measures -- AGAIN.

We're disgusted, _but we 're not surprised._

We know Republicans will always prioritize their special-interest backers over finally ending America's gun violence crisis.

So it's time to send a message that we're DONE with their deadly political games.

**Quickly, let us know: Do you CONDEMN Republicans for blocking common-sense gun control measures?**
---
[YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

This moment demands immediate action.

_Our country is facing an epidemic of gun violence ...

**...But Republicans still fight tooth and nail every day to block common-sense, desperately needed reform.**_

Enough is enough: It's time we put these dangerous, far-right Republicans on notice.

**That 's why we're calling on 25,000 grassroots Democrats to rise up and let us know they CONDEMN Republicans for preventing much-needed action on this life-or-death issue.**
**SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE: Do you CONDEMN Republicans for blocking common-sense gun control measures?**
| [YES ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---
****

Thank you,

DCCC

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Defund the Police advocate Max Rose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chabot for Congress
body:
We can’t sit by Friend, Max Rose is finally out of hiding, he is no longer trying to brand himself as a pragmatist; he is out stumping for AOC’s Green New Deal to be ushered in. Staten Island voters gave Defund the Police advocate Max Rose the boot last year after he ran on the Democrats' failed agenda. Now... He is running as his true self, a Socialist Pelosi Puppet peddling ideas that will hurt the middle class and destroy America as we know it. He knows he can’t win. I know for a fact that Max’s biggest fear is running against a **STRONG, INDEPENDENT, REPUBLICAN WOMAN!** Rose claims to not align with AOC and the socialist wing of the Democrat party, however, he agrees with her on... **DEFUNDING THE POLICE** ... Taxing Americans to pay for a socialist spending spree, a growing government to a point that is unsustainable. **[AOC and her socialist Squad are all about their socialist agenda, they are about defunding the police...So is Max Rose the so-called name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: 169 Democrats voted with Republicans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, 169 Democrats just voted
with Republicans to increase military spending to $768 billion. That’s
more than Trump’s last defense budget. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86454?refcode=em20211209-20901&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=20901%2E1203867%2EUmmy4d ]Fight back and defeat Democrats
wasting money on a bloated military »

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86454?refcode=em20211209-20901&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=20901%2E1203867%2EUmmy4d ]Fight Back

Why is a Democratic Congress and a Democratic President increasing
military spending? Last year, Trump got an already massive $738 billion
for the U.S. military. Now, Democrats want $768 billion for the military.

169 Democrats in the U.S. House just voted with Republicans to throw
billions more at defense contractors, weapons, and war. The Democratic
establishment has learned nothing from decades of trillion dollar wars and
disinvestment in housing, education, and the social safety net.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86454?refcode=em20211209-20901&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=20901%2E1203867%2EUmmy4d ]It’s time to replace the establishment with Justice Democrats who will
fight for Medicare for All and a Green New Deal, not a military budget in
excess of what Trump wanted. If you’re in to elect more Justice Democrats,
chip in $3 today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86454?refcode=em20211209-20901&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20901%2E1203867%2EUmmy4d ]Contribute $3

Justice Democrats in Congress voted no on this bloated military spending
bill that gives away billions to war, weapons manufacturers, and
corporations who lobby for more war.

Some of the corporate Democrats we’re running against voted for this $768
billion defense bill. They voted for more military spending under Trump
too.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86454?refcode=em20211209-20901&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=20901%2E1203867%2EUmmy4d ]This can’t be the way forward,
Peter. Help us fight back and
transform the Democratic Party with a donation of $3. We
can elect more Justice Democrats and change things in Congress, but only
with your help.

There’s a different, more just way forward and we’re ready to elect 5 more
Justice Democrats who can make it happen.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=20901%2E1203867%2EUmmy4d ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=20901%2E1203867%2EUmmy4d ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211209-20901-footer&t=1027&refcode2=20901_1203867_Ummy4d&akid=20901%2E1203867%2EUmmy4d

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=20901%2E1203867%2EUmmy4d

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: FW: We beat President Biden AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Not sure if you saw my last email, but this is big news. The Biden administration is BLOCKED nationwide from enforcing its unconstitutional vaccine m Friend, Not sure if you saw my last email, but this is big news. The Biden administration is BLOCKED nationwide from enforcing its unconstitutional vaccine mandate for federal contractors. We’re now three for three in blocking President Biden’s vaccine mandates, having already stopped the mandates for private employers and health care providers. I’ve said it from the beginning: I trust Kansans to make their own medical decisions, and no president has the power President Biden is claiming in order to make these decisions for us. The Constitution and our laws are clear. No Kansan should face the choice of taking a vaccine or losing their job. **[The fact that we’re three for three in the fight against these mandates is a big deal... But the fight WILL continue. I need YOU on board to help me continue fighting](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=6e339b96ed714267b603ed6781f51b01&_e=bm88sN1mQsYYW_PRaDhoWgoe99F7_5Gjhf4I5dbH1qsCD7_P-7b29Rp0-wPd-7FB_H_-K6rSb9awQNVsvpfKV9oYnAJdStTa--vFwEXQqBVfMl6VCvrQXIPXpuZ7v2y0oukNNotBSTNKat0g1Oiss7Voc96V1wXTVyXYIvVQTRGDSOggThmMZ61TY2YpEu-PBiHZ3hCaK_wuI3UaUwjchFwh82yqqLXBiVeP75kxOEwv5SsK03S0jkdW0Lbc5llzd4eK5v51oAHAOfIkbEZXf8wYCDRqyxjV32z931RBQW9JvgKTPW8gBiBzrgW8N4f8bBwwlwTAHhNmT4UIT3LBlZMTay9BxYWemQ3gdz3mgrT7qalPx8jH0x8kxAFoyIb7vckOEWCSK47h87D6IdZaW5apTj1DWsjaGjLBel8ZP8PzCBQIJ1nU1gtAjT5UQ7AmFlmC7V0Kbk7w4Y0V_GPa9Eoam6DeEYlY9kHn6628WYG0ZtmCg02sL5APpGMkjhpLK3USS1c-rMCLYikh3nX-cw%3D%3D). ** [**Will you chip in anything you can, right now, to help me fight for FREEDOM and the RULE OF LAW against more government mandates?**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=6e339b96ed714267b603ed6781f51b01&_e=bm88sN1mQsYYW_PRaDhoWgoe99F7_5Gjhf4I5dbH1qsCD7_P-7b29Rp0-wPd-7FB_H_-K6rSb9awQNVsvpfKV9oYnAJdStTa--vFwEXQqBVfMl6VCvrQXIPXpuZ7v2y0oukNNotBSTNKat0g1Oiss7Voc96V1wXTVyXYIvVQTRGDSOggThmMZ61TY2YpEu-PBiHZ3hCaK_wuI3UaUwjchFwh82yqqLXBiVeP75kxOEwv5SsK03S0jkdW0Lbc5llzd4eK5v51oAHAOfIkbEZXf8wYCDRqyxjV32z931RBQW_-fR-lUaAi267duGd4Rciwcsjbr9H3Z6jm5y3bx1YEwJjW6hmp7sodkolFa5-qYsSKRsNYCf5XGJL8nMfbvhLZJAhYKQFFbcdGwREGTajbcy_Dba4pJLLLjCmD_hGLIryg142pjDJoIS1RMIQ_gTF8zC82kXrjh_fGjEFv84J30p1aBvzm8ARCduaFTEEQ3kj58iN3UWOee9-GDBFe1_TD2-_MrFShTDQ1y4NLGm35GA%3D%3D) Derek Schmidt

—--Forwarded Message Below—-- Friend, I’m very excited to share some big news with you – We are now three for three in blocking the unconstitutional Biden vaccine mandates. **A federal district court has GRANTED our motion for a preliminary injunction temporarily blocking the Biden administration from enforcing its vaccination mandate for federal contractors.** Today’s ruling means we’ve stopped each of the three vaccine mandates that we have challenged - the OSHA mandate for private employers, the CMS mandate for health care providers, and now the one for federal contractors. Mandates are not the answer. The appropriate way for government to respond to COVID is to provide Kansans with the best available information and trust Kansans to make the right decisions with that information. As attorney general, I’ll keep fighting the Biden administration when it overreaches. As governor, I promise to never repeat the damaging mistakes of Governor Kelly’s COVID response. No lockdowns, no business shutdowns, no school closings. No mandates. **[Will you chip in NOW if you agree with clean_body: Not sure if you saw my last email, but this is big news. The Biden administration is BLOCKED nationwide from enforcing its unconstitutional vaccine m Friend, Not sure if you saw my last email, but this is big news. The Biden administration is BLOCKED nationwide from enforcing its unconstitutional vaccine mandate for federal contractors. We’re now three for three in blocking President Biden’s vaccine mandates, having already stopped the mandates for private employers and health care providers. I’ve said it from the beginning: I trust Kansans to make their own medical decisions, and no president has the power President Biden is claiming in order to make these decisions for us. The Constitution and our laws are clear. No Kansan should face the choice of taking a vaccine or losing their job. . Derek Schmidt —--Forwarded Message Below—-- Friend, I’m very excited to share some big news with you – We are now three for three in blocking the unconstitutional Biden vaccine mandates. A federal district court has GRANTED our motion for a preliminary injunction temporarily blocking the Biden administration from enforcing its vaccination mandate for federal contractors. Today’s ruling means we’ve stopped each of the three vaccine mandates that we have challenged - the OSHA mandate for private employers, the CMS mandate for health care providers, and now the one for federal contractors. Mandates are not the answer. The appropriate way for government to respond to COVID is to provide Kansans with the best available information and trust Kansans to make the right decisions with that information. As attorney general, I’ll keep fighting the Biden administration when it overreaches. As governor, I promise to never repeat the damaging mistakes of Governor Kelly’s COVID response. No lockdowns, no business shutdowns, no school closings. No mandates. I will continue to fight for individual liberty because there is no pandemic exception to the Constitution. But I can’t do this without your support. Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

Fellow Conservative,

2021 is about to be over and I’m more concerned about our country than ever. _Inflation, open borders, supply chain crisis’ - the list goes on and on. _

As Republicans, our goal is to continue Trump’s agenda and put America-FIRST. Unfortunately, in the wake of Biden’s failed policies and do-nothing way of leadership our agenda is at a standstill.

clean_body: It’s time to reflect and take a few moments to re-prioritize what is most important to the American people. | Fellow Conservative, 2021 is about to be over and I’m more concerned about our country than ever. Inflation, open borders, supply chain crisis’ - the list goes on and on. As Republicans, our goal is to continue Trump’s agenda and put America-FIRST. Unfortunately, in the wake of Biden’s failed policies and do-nothing way of leadership our agenda is at a standstill. It’s time to reflect and take a few moments to re-prioritize what is most important to the American people. All Democrats do is spend your hard-earned money and blame Republican’s for their own problems. First , Biden created a border crisis and then refused to acknowledge it. Then , Democrats killed our economy and the job market. Now , we’re facing nationwide shortages and delays right before the holidays. Democrats need to focus on real issues that affect our country, rather than peddling their radical agenda. Fellow Conservative, day in and day out I’m fighting for the future of this country. But, I can’t continue without YOUR feedback. For America, Greg Murphy, MD | | Paid for by friends to elect Dr. Greg Murphy to Congress Murphy for Congress P.O. name: Morgan Harper
subject: What it’s going to take to win in 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Let’s get something straight right now, team.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211209-447-footer-ak&t=2&akid=447%2E90090%2EDIbVmh)
Our opponent Rep. Tim Ryan _still_ won’t agree to a debate, and now he’s telling the press that he wants to ignore our requests until after the filing deadline – in February – because he’s not sure if we’re actually running!
**Let’s get something straight right now: I am running for the U.S. Senate.** Ohioans deserve a real choice in this election, and Tim Ryan needs to stop running away and agree to debate me.
[**_If you’re with me, help send a message to Tim Ryan that we’re in this race for real by rushing a donation of any amount right now._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17809?t=3&akid=447%2E90090%2EDIbVmh)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17815?refcode=em20211209-447&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=447%2E90090%2EDIbVmh)**
The GOP candidates in this election have been debating each other for months, getting their message out to the voters. Democrats need to do the same if we want any chance of winning this Senate seat.
But Tim Ryan is clearly underestimating what it’s going to take to win. He’s been in Washington for 20 years — and this behavior is the epitome of insider arrogance, aloofness, and condescension. He thinks he can stroll right to the Democratic nomination without anyone hearing what he’ll do to help people here in Ohio.
**That’s not what Ohio needs in a Senator.** I’m in this because I know that only by uniting working people around a bold vision for our state can we flip this seat blue.
[**_Can you chip in right now to prove to Tim Ryan that we’re done with his kind of insider politics in our state?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17809?t=23&akid=447%2E90090%2EDIbVmh)
I’m ready to debate Tim Ryan anytime, anyplace. What’s he so afraid of?
Together,
Morgan Harper
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17809?t=24&akid=447%2E90090%2EDIbVmh)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211209-447-footer&t=25&refcode2=447_90090_DIbVmh&akid=447%2E90090%2EDIbVmh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=447%2E90090%2EDIbVmh)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

name: Alex Padilla for Senate
subject: Three reasons your contribution today makes a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
We’ll put your donation immediately to work organizing across California to hold this seat.
#

**$5.**
That’s the amount we are asking you to contribute to Alex Padilla’s campaign today.
We know that November 2022 seems like ages from now, so we hope you’ll take a minute to read why your contribution _today_ makes such a big difference, and then [**chip in $5 to keep Alex in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21?refcode=em211209-1-30&t=1&refcode2=494_159979_l6BZ4D&akid=494%2E159979%2El6BZ4D)
1. **The stakes are very high:** Democrats are operating on a 50-50 margin in the Senate. There’s no room for error, and it means that Alex’s race could make the difference. We can’t risk being caught unprepared.

2. **Our opponents are going to be very well-funded:** Now that the recall failed, California Republicans are setting their sights — and their millions of dollars — on Alex. Making sure we have the resources to fight back against whatever they throw at us is critical if we’re going to hold this seat.

3. **We have a LOT of ground to cover:** We’re committing to organizing across the state and meeting people where they are — _but with almost 25 million eligible voters in California, it’s only going to be possible if we start now._

[**If you can afford it, please make a $5 contribution to Alex Padilla's campaign today. We’ll put your donation immediately to work organizing across California to hold this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-dec21?refcode=em211209-1-30&t=2&refcode2=494_159979_l6BZ4D&akid=494%2E159979%2El6BZ4D)

clean_body: We’ll put your donation immediately to work organizing across California to hold this seat. $5. That’s the amount we are asking you to contribute to Alex Padilla’s campaign today. We know that November 2022 seems like ages from now, so we hope you’ll take a minute to read why your contribution today makes such a big difference, and then 1. The stakes are very high: Democrats are operating on a 50-50 margin in the Senate. There’s no room for error, and it means that Alex’s race could make the difference. We can’t risk being caught unprepared. 2. Our opponents are going to be very well-funded: Now that the recall failed, California Republicans are setting their sights — and their millions of dollars — on Alex. Making sure we have the resources to fight back against whatever they throw at us is critical if we’re going to hold this seat. 3. We have a LOT of ground to cover: We’re committing to organizing across the state and meeting people where they are — but with almost 25 million eligible voters in California, it’s only going to be possible if we start now. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | As long as we stand together, we can win this race and keep Alex in the Senate and in the fight for real immigration reform, a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and more. Thank you! Team Padilla ** Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate

* The costs of food, gasoline, and heating fuel are skyrocketing.
* We can't keep store shelves stocked heading into the holidays due to supply chain problems or lack of workers.
* Brazen criminals are on smash-and-grab crime sprees in cities across the country.
* And around the world, our friends don't trust us and our enemies don't fear us after President Biden abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan in a hasty pull-out against military advice.

**We've got to get this country back on the right track.**

Our Democrat opponent in the Georgia Senate race is off to a record-breaking fundraising pace, and he already has $17 MILLION in his war chest. If 450 new grassroots supporters will chip in just $3 right now, it will give our conservative campaign the boost it needs to WIN! I entered this Senate race because our country is going in the wrong direction. The costs of food, gasoline, and heating fuel are skyrocketing. We can't keep store shelves stocked heading into the holidays due to supply chain problems or lack of workers. Brazen criminals are on smash-and-grab crime sprees in cities across the country. And around the world, our friends don't trust us and our enemies don't fear us after President Biden abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan in a hasty pull-out against military advice. We've got to get this country back on the right track. The Democrats are determined to defeat our campaign because they know if Republicans WIN in Georgia - we'll WIN BACK the Senate majority and STOP the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer agenda. So how about it? Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

---
**Paid family leave, climate legislation, and Joe Biden’s ENTIRE agenda hang in the balance.**

Luckily, we have a plan: to elect more bold Democrats to weigh down his vote!

[We’re exhausted, and we’re asking for you to DEMAND Joe Manchin do what’s right and pass the Build Back Better Act »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4181?t=6&akid=1000%2E878179%2EijDCri)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4181?t=7&akid=1000%2E878179%2EijDCri)

TO: SENATOR JOE MANCHIN
FROM: YOU
DATE: DECEMBER 9, 2021

**Dear Senator Manchin,
** Listen up.

With the Senate majority so slim, passing Joe Biden’s agenda is going to take all Democrats standing up and working together.

President Biden’s Build Back Better bill is sitting in the Senate, waiting for your vote.

**But instead of working with your fellow Democrats, you are standing in the way of progress!**

[I’m enraged, Senator, so right now, I’m giving $2 to VPP to expand the Senate Majority -- because I REFUSE to let you stonewall all the work we need to get done »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4181?t=8&akid=1000%2E878179%2EijDCri) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4181?t=9&akid=1000%2E878179%2EijDCri)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
Enough is enough, Senator — MAGA Mitch McConnell is laughing in our faces!

**If you refuse to stand up for Democratic priorities, our only choice is to expand the Senate majority and drown out your vote.**

The people of your state _(and the whole country)_ deserve more. That’s why I’m imploring you to do the right thing and PASS the Build Back Better act.

[So right now, I’m giving $2 to VPP to do just that! It’s time to elect more Democrats who will vote to protect the American people »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4181?t=10&akid=1000%2E878179%2EijDCri)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4181?t=11&akid=1000%2E878179%2EijDCri)

Sincerely,

**_x. A CONCERNED DEMOCRAT_**
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4181?t=12&akid=1000%2E878179%2EijDCri)

_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Friends,

Enough is enough.

Biden, the federal government, social media, and the establishment media are trying to **rob Americans of their freedoms.**

Biden’s vaccine mandate on private employers is adding salt to the wound of businesses in Indiana and across the nation that are JUST getting back on their feet.

This is going to be an uphill battle -- and here in Indiana, we are ready to fight.

The Biden Administration has broken faith with the American people through false information, conflicting messaging, suppressing the facts, and **taking away our freedoms.**

This fight is about **freedom.** _This fight is about giving a voice to the American people who have been living in insufferable silence and fear._ | | [**NO MORE MANDATES!**](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=ee73c9be5b664918bd262e0e1af4452f&_e=BQmLkPdKacKZRlUCHCcS0t8zRC-4d8yeqdBkbzehv8poT09YqLlaW7BS7d3Zzy8GR8KXahbL1p-jQbkizzJj6DFK7ENFGO2Y0QPK4ta4xX4FghiIAVZnAT5ykwSfB8aDjZ739WIEcNtfYmzi_R4sYVlOViBX9Cc-LckIn9MIvowR8P_CoQobtpirRbaeVQJSW18j08IuDk5saScEsNzduP5JSXkcFUyxEuzYsVup8ed4Avmy1_tt3c9PZtkEo5UtEUZ-om_qSYSd7eVJhtHKroARRopo-OZiZc2j7TseeRPpP7xSIjJkwXOwgaCsiWY6zLvIMYqBV_xCubGESgxefQt32SoEMyHNdS88IryQBSgTMAwrW8XCQwn0Jmn4HgY-Cxe9tCUbTNYBtSmO-RQj9I4K6XZeAt1F3uYvBaDsKd8zaDqKZS5sxSz0oPJju7fm0pNm2_65JljSJacxGWxMv20-cZ1z5LtdFdzev9a-zQhjHVfxkFvG9FD_sAyyHkPX)

| [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=6edf57ad94284ee5877d19f1c4149d78&_e=g5JZ7qRrjo2NrcO072YHYhsw8pZXoPCQ4aKpHpjWoN8ARDdcJwZpv2vJMA99l9EgdD8-nrVllXOO9VwFYsaqq_CmoYf73uHpqX2WFZwj_648hqDQtcjQ_KcVSn1D8EGwakDAfSS2kNT4fMDWSKcyBOXuXo2M1ORqA6RTiU5bC_dRst1mdtSFrvUTrgb_Qy9wndCxAykkgDapXYygfwUoMHKvTLXBSUkqfYDp8KwJANPTIJ_2akTsa2XNIyXOe0MAVkgSbscheCjUFW70LqClWX40m7rruHsRlerRdgiappiKuhinrlqAwIutvj4MwG4T5ujZ0tNoLGvSrP9EE9dDDwOTyfd13bHt4bXVzxfjfweB0IPKn8_2_7NssA1YqDUz4F3gR_84ixKxbqOfz_Q4Gx9CMuzQluv6h7tWEjxFhqmE_F1GIdOgYNDDEfsk38MboI4wi4pFQu-Mi6FCiqxz5Hod7AtyGuLQ7mDqBTzkJ_cdvhGjasmEFkDfOxdFpaKoBtBw9ffIuM4GD-7fCoDMSw%3D%3D)

Friends-

It’s House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy.

I’ve got some bad news. Democrats spent millions of dollars to try and take down Nicole Malliotakis last year, and now Nancy Pelosi’s campaign machine is gearing up to do the exact same thing in 2022. They’re even trotting out the same diminutive Defund the Police Democrat to run against Nicole.

**We cannot let that happen.**

Nicole is a staunch, America First conservative, fighting for our freedom every single day in the House of Representatives. But now, Nicole needs us to fight for her.

**[Pitch in anything you can right now to help Nicole defeat the Democrats in her next election.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=6edf57ad94284ee5877d19f1c4149d78&_e=g5JZ7qRrjo2NrcO072YHYhsw8pZXoPCQ4aKpHpjWoN8ARDdcJwZpv2vJMA99l9EgdD8-nrVllXOO9VwFYsaqq_CmoYf73uHpqX2WFZwj_648hqDQtcjQ_KcVSn1D8EGwakDAfSS2kNT4fMDWSKcyBOXuXo2M1ORqA6RTiU5bC_dRst1mdtSFrvUTrgb_Qy9wndCxAykkgDapXYygfwUoMHKvTLXBSUkqfYDp8KwJANPTIJ_2akTsa2XNIyXOe0MAVkgSbscheCjUFW70LqClWX40m7rruHsRlerRdgiappiKuhinrlqAwIutvj4MwG4T4U2ug2qfq03rdvzUDqg9tklR4llgS-RtzgOUHw_fn-qW26HE9pHJ_brVWTDrh2TXTJ8FzfRnKjKYUrTfgzoe8kHNh3C5bMtwZolmlyIg8nrB1jgtud8rznIizMCNOiASZeyL1qCUIqyBkJw9q5pJiMv1Tr8DRQxOzJajNgDXoLbubHGZZ6x_QmuQ9EfUTzIYtSSzCef9ZCFT3P5Piv0NpQ%3D%3D)** | [**Help Fund Nicole Malliotakis for Re-Election!**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=6edf57ad94284ee5877d19f1c4149d78&_e=g5JZ7qRrjo2NrcO072YHYhsw8pZXoPCQ4aKpHpjWoN8ARDdcJwZpv2vJMA99l9EgdD8-nrVllXOO9VwFYsaqq_CmoYf73uHpqX2WFZwj_648hqDQtcjQ_KcVSn1D8EGwakDAfSS2kNT4fMDWSKcyBOXuXo2M1ORqA6RTiU5bC_dRst1mdtSFrvUTrgb_Qy9wndCxAykkgDapXYygfwUoMHKvTLXBSUkqfYDp8KwJANPTIJ_2akTsa2XNIyXOe0MAVkgSbscheCjUFW70LqClWX40m7rruHsRlerRdgiappiKuhinrlqAwIutvj4MwG4ThpHMWvqttuwYUosj_y0OngzApMcJT8AXLjqKJOdIQbaqxhy4-PiCHhCocDo72xZVy82wa9zRrIP6aSTqFS_FPuZmFgq9mcjaJsTZMQfNL2PzJTUwDenlpyP70EU34CsgzizGEHK074OgWb9MT98taW1etO5GOzjrGPekZ7nsIHOzzBpMDu6MvNC-iYU9SeSCKLEPvAoYuCqbC2leBrP4pg%3D%3D)
---

Nicole represents a critical district in our fight to Take Back the House in 2022. She’s the only Republican member representing deep-blue New York City, **and now Max Rose (who she defeated) is going to spend Millions of dollars to take this seat back.**

It is critical that we make sure Nicole’s campaign is as well-funded as possible going into 2022. She’s standing up against the Socialist Squad and Max Rose.

**[Let’s make sure we keep incredible, conservative women like Nicole Malliotakis in Congress. Will you chip in to help Nicole BEAT Max Rose and Take Back the House in 2022?](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=6edf57ad94284ee5877d19f1c4149d78&_e=g5JZ7qRrjo2NrcO072YHYhsw8pZXoPCQ4aKpHpjWoN8ARDdcJwZpv2vJMA99l9EgdD8-nrVllXOO9VwFYsaqq_CmoYf73uHpqX2WFZwj_648hqDQtcjQ_KcVSn1D8EGwakDAfSS2kNT4fMDWSKcyBOXuXo2M1ORqA6RTiU5bC_dRst1mdtSFrvUTrgb_Qy9wndCxAykkgDapXYygfwUoMHKvTLXBSUkqfYDp8KwJANPTIJ_2akTsa2XNIyXOe0MAVkgSbscheCjUFW70LqClWX40m7rruHsRlerRdgiappiKuhinrlqAwIutvj4MwG4TpbVBTNT1IZirzo43Gq3X65W7VyKnFytaLTt2EU-uy27dJM3Qmsmy7JQM1ckJfJjzJdaricYVNRGf3e-huOLqouqd4GQRwRRMgvjG22IlDYL2BP30DMRA8dB39zYUPYI33DtPz8k8eJS8VmSvPIoHVWjkbRHtq4z9CBqENxLq00q2tXMxCU817mQ4OyLY2Txoce0-ySn0Tbj0OEDKER8PgA%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy
