name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Insulin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
No one in this country should have to pay hundreds of dollars for insulin. But unfortunately, that's the reality for too many Americans:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211209?refcode=em20211209-864&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=864_420207_e-K82I&akid=864%2E420207%2Ee-K82I)
Our Build Back Better Act that we passed out of the House includes an important provision to finally cap the out-of-pocket cost for a patient's monthly insulin prescription at $35. **This policy will change lives and save them too — which is why Rep. Cori Bush and I are leading a group of 100 of our House colleagues in urging the Senate to pass this critical bill as soon as possible.**
We can hold Big Pharma accountable for their deadly price gouging on insulin by sending the Build Back Better Act to President Biden's desk. [**Can you help fuel our work to keep the pressure on the Senate by chipping in $3 today so we can finally invest in working people?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211209?refcode=em20211209-864&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=864_420207_e-K82I&akid=864%2E420207%2Ee-K82I)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211209?refcode=em20211209-864&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=864_420207_e-K82I&akid=864%2E420207%2Ee-K82I)**
Here's what we're specifically calling on the Senate to do:
> 1\. Maintain our House provision in the Build Back Better Act that caps the cost for a patient's monthly insulin prescription at $35 for all Medicare beneficiaries and privately insured people — making insulin affordable for the 32 million insured Americans with diabetes.
> 2\. Amend the bill to speed up the implementation of this life-saving provision by allowing these life-saving changes to take effect _next year_ instead of 2023.
> 3\. Extend the $35 monthly insulin payment cap to uninsured people so no person, regardless of coverage, ever dies due to insulin rationing again.
**Majorities of Democrats, Republicans, and independents support lower drug prices, including an insulin price cap. The voters who delivered the White House, the Senate, and the House to Democrats are counting on us to deliver — _let's get this done._**
We can no longer let Big Pharma profit from a medication that millions of Americans depend on to survive. [**If you're still with me in this fight, chip in $3 today to make sure the Senate answers our call and passes the Build Back Better Act without delay.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211209?refcode=em20211209-864&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=864_420207_e-K82I&akid=864%2E420207%2Ee-K82I)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211209-864-footer&t=23&refcode2=864_420207_e-K82I&akid=864%2E420207%2Ee-K82I)**
---

clean_body: Peter, No one in this country should have to pay hundreds of dollars for insulin. But unfortunately, that's the reality for too many Americans: Our Build Back Better Act that we passed out of the House includes an important provision to finally cap the out-of-pocket cost for a patient's monthly insulin prescription at $35. This policy will change lives and save them too — which is why Rep. Cori Bush and I are leading a group of 100 of our House colleagues in urging the Senate to pass this critical bill as soon as possible. We can hold Big Pharma accountable for their deadly price gouging on insulin by sending the Build Back Better Act to President Biden's desk. Here's what we're specifically calling on the Senate to do: 1\. Maintain our House provision in the Build Back Better Act that caps the cost for a patient's monthly insulin prescription at $35 for all Medicare beneficiaries and privately insured people — making insulin affordable for the 32 million insured Americans with diabetes. 2\. Amend the bill to speed up the implementation of this life-saving provision by allowing these life-saving changes to take effect next year instead of 2023. 3\. Extend the $35 monthly insulin payment cap to uninsured people so no person, regardless of coverage, ever dies due to insulin rationing again. Majorities of Democrats, Republicans, and independents support lower drug prices, including an insulin price cap. The voters who delivered the White House, the Senate, and the House to Democrats are counting on us to deliver — let's get this done. We can no longer let Big Pharma profit from a medication that millions of Americans depend on to survive. In solidarity, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. That’s why I’ve set such an ambitious $1,000,000 goal to close out the year strong and send Pelosi packing once and for all -- but I’m counting on YOU to help me crush this goal. The Left has dug their own grave for 2022, Friend. While California and New York LOST 2 congressional seats, the Lone Star State GAINED 2. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: A real person wrote this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Most members of Congress fuel their reelection campaigns by dedicating hours of their time asking rich donors for $500, $1000, or even $2900 donations.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211209-2678-header&t=1&akid=2678%2E2526796%2E589617)
Can we be real with you for a moment?
We understand that a constant stream of emails asking for a contribution can sometimes get on your nerves. That’s okay. Real people wrote this email, we get them as well. We understand how people can get frustrated. _But let us explain why this is vital._
When we’re asking for your support, we don’t expect every person to give. But we ask because we know that when you can support the cause, you will. That’s how this transformative movement works.**It’s a whole lot of people doing their part to make something great.**
[Right now, we’re running behind on an important goal. The only way we can get there is through the support of small-dollar donors chipping in whatever they can. If you have the means, can you donate $3 right now? It’ll go a long way.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211209-2?refcode=em20211209-2678-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2678_2526796_589617&akid=2678%2E2526796%2E589617)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211209-2?refcode=em20211209-2678-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2678_2526796_589617&akid=2678%2E2526796%2E589617)**
We’re not exaggerating. Most members of Congress fuel their reelection campaigns by dedicating hours of their time asking rich donors for $500, $1000, or even $2900 donations.
**Alexandria is different.** This whole movement is fueled by online contributions like the ones we’re asking for in this email. With these contributions, we’ve built a campaign that is...
1. Raising resources, recruiting volunteers, and making calls to help elect progressive allies across Congress, and build a progressive majority.
2. Reaching out to communities across NY-14 to spread awareness about the Green New Deal and how to receive hurricane relief benefits.
3. Raising money for community relief organizations, closing critical resources gaps that the federal government has left unfilled.
4. Working day and night to reelect AOC, defeat our Republican opponents, and show the world what we can do.

[There are more than enough people reading this email that, if they just donated whatever they can spare, we’d make up our fundraising gap instantly. If this movement is the model of what you want in our politics, please donate today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211209-2?refcode=em20211209-2678-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2678_2526796_589617&akid=2678%2E2526796%2E589617)
Thanks for reading,
Team AOC
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211209-2?refcode=em20211209-2678-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2678_2526796_589617&akid=2678%2E2526796%2E589617)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211209-2?refcode=em20211209-2678-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=24&refcode2=2678_2526796_589617&akid=2678%2E2526796%2E589617)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211209-2678-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=25&akid=2678%2E2526796%2E589617)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=2678%2E2526796%2E589617) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=2678%2E2526796%2E589617) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=2678%2E2526796%2E589617)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=2678%2E2526796%2E589617)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=2678%2E2526796%2E589617)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
